Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Dread power spills from this vessel of ebon-black stone.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Shooting Phase

name: AMULET OF BURNING HATE
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, your general’s attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
legend: A sacred relic of the Drazghar order, this amulet is said to contain the merest flicker of Hashut’s depthless spite.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: SERVILE AUTOMATON
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT AUTOMATON unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, the target is this unit’s bodyguard and the following effects apply:
  • While this unit is in combat and its bodyguard is within its combat range, its bodyguard has STRIKE-FIRST.
  • If this unit is INFANTRY, it has WARD (5+)</
legend: This paranoid overlord shuns traditional bodyguards, instead favouring a looming daemon engine entirely bound to them through burning Zharralid carvings.

name: AN EYE FOR WEAKNESS
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT units that target that enemy unit.
legend: Whether bargaining a Wage of Toil or considering the press of battle, this duardin can readily sense vulnerability.

name: ’FIRE, YOU WORMS!’
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT INFANTRY unit that is not in combat and is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target can immediately use the ‘Shoot’ ability as if it were your shooting phase. All attacks must target the same enemy unit, and the enemy unit picked to be the target of the attacks must have charged this phase. If the unmodified hit roll for any of those attacks is 1-5, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: A pitiless enforcer of discipline, this duardin expects their underlings to keep firing even as the foe bears down on them.

name: BLACK FLAMES OF HASHUT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. If the chanting roll was 8+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target for each 4+ instead.
legend: Spitting the Bullfather’s contempt, the priest causes their enemies to be wreathed in abyssal fire – a worthy punishment for the weak.

name: FURNACE BLESSING
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn. If the chanting roll was 8+, that unit’s melee weapons also have Crit (Mortal) for the rest of the turn.
legend: The priest pours burning scorn upon the daemonic essences bound in duardin steel, seeing the weapons of the Hashutites blaze in molten outrage.

name: STORM OF OBSIDIAN SHARDS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target and subtract 3 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn. If the chanting roll was 10+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.
legend: The sheer vitriol of this duardin priest is incarnated as a tumult of flesh-shredding stone splinters.

name: HATEFUL FRACTURES
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Halve the target’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn.
legend: The sorcerer clenches a contemptuous fist, seeing firm ground beneath their foes suddenly splinter and crack.

name: ASHEN SMOG
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible terrain feature within 18" of them that has a friendly desolation token to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: That terrain feature has the ‘Obscuring’ ability (Terrain, 1.2) until the start of your next turn. Then, roll a D3 for each enemy unit contesting the target terrain feature. On a 2+, inflict an amount of damage equal to the roll on
legend: Clouds of choking ash seep from the sorcerer’s outstretched talon before settling across the lands as an impenetrable, blinding pall.

name: MOLTEN METAL
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the unmodified casting roll. Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target for each roll that equals or exceeds the target’s Save characteristic.
legend: A wave of hellish, liquid metal that strips armour and melts flesh surges forth into the enemy line.

name: REINFORCE DAEMONSTEEL
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GRAND FORGEHOST WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, ignore the first damage point allocated to each friendly HELSMITHS OF HASHUT unit in each phase while they are wholly within 12" of the caster.
legend: At a sorcerer’s chanting, the sigils inscribed on their minions’ armour glow with protective power.

name: TALISMAN OF OBSIDIAN
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit.
legend: The obsidian jewel set within this amulet shrouds the bearer and protects them from harm.

name: GRASP OF STONE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GRAND FORGEHOST PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn. If the chanting roll was 8+, the target also has STRIKE-LAST until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Drazghar have observed Urak Taar’s ability to channel his curse. They attempt to replicate this via invocations, though Taar ensures that none learn too much…

name: RUTHLESS OVERSSER
description: Effect: Each time a friendly GRAND FORGEHOST unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.
legend: The magnates and warlords in service to Urak Taar are hungry to distinguish themselves and demand faultless discipline.

name: RISING FIRE
description:
Effect: The following cumulative effects apply to friendly GRAND FORGEHOST units in each battle round after the first.

Battle Round 2:
Daemonic Weaponry: Those units’ weapons have Crit (2 Hits).

Battle Round 3:
Harnessed Sorcery: Add 1 to casting rolls and chanting rolls for those units.

Battle Round 4:
Channelled Power: Attacks made by those units score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.

Battle Round 5:
Arcane Dominance: Add 1 to the power level of those units if they are a
legend: The hosts of Urak Taar fight with obsessive precision instead of haste – but once the furnaces are lit, victory is inevitable.

name: LAVA STORM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GRAND FORGEHOST PRIEST to chant this prayer. Pick an enemy unit to be the target and roll 6 dice. For each 6, pick an additional enemy unit to be a target. Then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: If the chanting roll was 7+, pick an additional enemy unit to be a target. Inict D3 mortal damage on each target.
legend: The skies above burn a polluted red as globs of black lava are called to rain onto the enemy.

name: SHACKLING CURSE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GRAND FORGEHOST WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the target’s attacks cannot score critical hits (treat them as regular hits instead).
legend: A daemonic hex of Urak Taar’s own devising is placed upon the foe, blunting their strikes.

name: MASTERFUL DAEMONWORKS
description: Effect: Friendly GRAND FORGEHOST WAR MACHINES have WARD (6+).
legend: Those engines marshalled by the First Daemonsmith are masterworks of cursed engineering.

name: DREAD RANKS UNBROKEN
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NON-HERO GRAND FORGEHOST INFANTRY unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up), wholly within 6" of the battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Serried legions of duardin march in service to Urak Taar and the Forge Anathema.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: LET THE REALMS TREMBLE
description: Effect: Add X to charge rolls for friendly ZIGGURAT STAMPEDE units, where X is the number of friendly ZIGGURAT STAMPEDE units that have already charged this phase.
legend: The onslaught of Hashutite war machines are a tide of annihilation that cannot be resisted.

name: VISAGE OF THE GREAT BULL
description: Effect: In your charge phase, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for this unit, to a maximum of 3.
legend: This graven, gilded mask is wrought in the visage of a Taurus, supplanting the bearer’s will with Hashut’s crushing purpose.

name: RAGING ANIMUS
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict D3 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Within this Taurus is bound an especially diabolical spirit – one that takes any opportunity to violently burst free.

name: SEARING DETONATION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ZIGGURAT STAMPEDE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick each enemy unit in combat with them to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The sorcerer grasps dark fire in their claws, crushing it into a dense and howling nova before unleashing it in a wave of devastation.

name: ’BREAK THEM, ONE AND ALL...’
description: Effect: Any number of friendly ZIGGURAT STAMPEDE units can use the ‘Power Through’ command in the same turn.
legend: A Ziggurat Stampede is unleashed for one reason – to crush all in its path.

name: FLAMING WEAPONS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ZIGGURAT STAMPEDE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly ZIGGURAT STAMPEDE unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: At a gesture, the cuneiform-inscribed weapons of the sorcerer’s host glow white-hot and ignite.

name: RUN ROUGHSHOD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ZIGGURAT STAMPEDE unit in combat to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • The target can use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn.
  • No mortal damage is inflicted on the target by RETREAT abilities.
legend: Only a fool believes they can stop Hashut’s chosen from going where they wish.

name: BURN TO ASH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ZIGGURAT STAMPEDE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a terrain feature within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target has a Health characteristic, inflict 2D3 mortal damage on it. Then, if the target was not destroyed or does not have a Health characteristic:
  • The target gains the ‘Obscuring’ terrain ability for the rest of the battle (Terrain, 1.2).
  • If the target is FACTION
legend: Twisted Zharralid cantrips ignite the land until it is blackened and withered.

name: ICON OF INFINITE EXCESS
description:
Declare: Pick a non-HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Slaanesh’s most opulent standard drives both followers and enemies of the Dark Prince into orgiastic fits of violence.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: THRENODY VOICEBOX
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: When swallowed and held in the gullet, this tiny music box allows the bearer to let fly a mournful melody that can lull enemies into a stupor.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: PENDANT OF SLAANESH
description: Effect: If any damage points were allocated to this unit this turn, Heal (3) this unit.
legend: This pendant burrows deep into the owner’s chest and nestles next to their heart, invigorating them whenever they feel pain.

name: THE ECSTATIC THRONGS
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for friendly SYBARITE INFANTRY units while they are damaged or if they had any models slain in the same turn.
legend: To the massed supplicants of Slaanesh, any form of sensation – even the most agonising – is to be embraced as a sacrament to their loathsome god.

name: PRODIGY OF EXCESS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH HERO that has an artefact of power to be the target.

Effect: Give the target a heroic trait from the ‘Figureheads of the Dark Prince’ or ‘Hedonistic Obsessions’ tables.

Designer’s Note: This heroic trait is given to the target during the deployment phase, not during army composition.
legend: A narcissistic monstrosity, this follower of the Dark Prince possesses a grotesque surfeit of hedonistic qualities that inspire craven envy in their followers.

name: ECSTATIC REVELLERS
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly SYBARITE INFANTRY units while they are wholly outside friendly territory.
legend: The thrill of piercing the lands of their enemies like a hot needle through flesh gives strength to these avaricious revellers.

name: EXQUISITE PALATE
description: Effect: Each time a friendly non-HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.
legend: The Mortal Realms are vistas of depraved fascination to Slaanesh’s daemons, who will resist banishment with all their might.

name: GODLY AMBITIONS
description: Effect: Add 3 to the control scores of friendly non-HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH units while they are within the combat ranges of any friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH HEROES.
legend: There are many who would now seek to supplant imprisoned Slaanesh, and their force of personality fills their worshippers with reverent mania.

name: RECKLESS HASTE
description: Effect: Friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH CAVALRY units can use a RETREAT ability and still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on HEDONITES OF SLAANESH CAVALRY units by RETREAT abilities.
legend: Whether seeking their lost god or simply chasing new heights of speed, the mounted hosts of Slaanesh make war at a breakneck pace.

name: AN EXCESS OF DEPRAVITY
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH units to be the targets.

Effect: The targets have the EUPHORIC keyword for the rest of the battle round.

In addition, for each friendly unit you pick, give your opponent 1 temptation dice. During this battle round, instead of making a wound roll, save roll, ward roll or run roll, your opponent can use 1 temptation dice to replace the roll they would have made with a 6, or instead of making a charge roll they can use 2 temptation dice to replace 2 of the dice in a charge roll with two 6s (other dice could then be rolled normally). Rolls that have been replaced count as unmodified rolls and cannot be re-rolled. You cannot use temptation dice to replace a re-roll.
<
legend: Wherever the Hedonites of Slaanesh roam, reality is unmade. Those who stand against them are assailed by titillating phantasms and mind-bending illusions until they become slaves to their own base urges.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: EUPHORIC KILLERS
description:
Effect: While a friendly unit has the Euphoric keyword:
  • That unit’s weapons, including Companion weapons, have Crit (2 Hits).
  • That unit can use a RUN ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
Designer’s Note: Note that ‘Sadistic Spite’ does not affect Companion weapons.
legend: The followers of Slaanesh revel in slaughter, the thrill of battle sending them into an electrified frenzy as they mutilate their foe.

name: UNPARALLELED SPEED
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability.

Effect: That unit has STRIKE-FIRST this phase.
legend: They say the first blow struck is the sweetest…
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: SCEPTRE OF DOMINATION
description:
Declare: Roll a dice for each enemy unit in combat with your general.

Effect: On a 5+, the unit being rolled for has STRIKE-LAST this phase.
legend: The staff carried by this Shardspeaker contains magic that can seduce the minds of their foes.

name: LOCUS OF DIVERSION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, that unit can use a RETREAT ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: These warriors release perfumed mists that fill the foes’ minds with everything but the matter at hand.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase

name: CACOPHONIC CHOIR
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, make a cacophony roll of D6. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit (roll for each) within 6" of your general that has a Control characteristic less than the cacophony roll.
legend: The Shardspeaker summons a sanity‑shattering symphony of sound.

name: TWISTED MIRROR
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 9" of your general and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 4+, subtract 1 from save rolls for that unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: A Twisted Mirror tests the spirit of any who gaze into it, immobilising those who fall victim to its illusions.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Shooting Phase

name: PENDANT OF SLAANESH
description: Effect: Heal (D3) your general.
legend: This pendant burrows through the Shardspeaker’s rich fabrics and scarred chest before nestling next to their heart, invigorating them with sublime energy whenever they feel pain.

name: GLORY HOG
description: Effect: If an enemy HERO is destroyed by this unit, this unit has the EUPHORIC keyword for the rest of the battle.
legend: This hero wants nothing more than to revel in the defeat of their enemies.

name: CELEBRITY WARLORD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO SYBARITE unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: This hero has gained a cult following that seeks them out on the battlefield.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: STRONGEST ALONE
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s attacks while it is more than 6" from all other friendly units.
legend: This hero fights most fiercely on their own, lest their followers sully their greatness with their lesser presence.

name: MASTER OF TEMPTATION
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if your opponent has any temptation dice. Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, while your opponent has not used any of their temptation dice to replace a roll for the target this turn, the target can only use CORE abilities.
legend: Twisting the old adage, this hero demonstrates that good things do not come to those who wait.

name: INTO THE FRAY
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn and the unmodified charge roll was 8+, this unit has Strike-first for the rest of the turn.
legend: The first blow struck is the sweetest, and this warlord makes sure they slake their desire for violence with force and skill.

name: THE NEED FOR PERFECTION
description: Effect: The first time each turn that an unmodified charge roll, casting roll, unbinding roll or banishment roll for a friendly non-EUPHORIC unit wholly within 12" of this unit is 5 or less, that unit has the EUPHORIC keyword for the rest of the turn.
legend: This hero inspires a compulsive, self‐destructive desire in their allies to push themselves ever further, all thoughts of temperance and restraint dismissed from their minds.

name: SUMMON MESMERISING MIRROR
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Mesmerising Mirror on the battlefield, pick a friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Mesmerising Mirror wholly within 18" of the caster, visible to them and more than 3" from all enemy units.
legend: Smashing a small glass mirror to the ground, the wizard uses magical energy to cause it to reform and grow in size.

name: SUMMON DREADFUL VISAGE
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Dreadful Visage on the battlefield, pick a friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Dreadful Visage wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Inhaling draughts of hallucinogenic incense, the caster externalises their most unnatural desires in the form of a screaming daemonic visage.

name: SUMMON WHEELS OF EXCRUCIATION
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Wheels of Excruciation endless spell on the battlefield, pick a friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Wheels of Excruciation endless spell wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Throwing a small multi-bladed knife into the air and channelling magical energy into it, the caster summons forth a storm of swiftly moving razor-sharp blades.

name: SADISTIC SPITE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly EUPHORIC unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target’s melee weapons have Crit (Mortal) instead of Crit (2 Hits) for the rest of the battle round.
legend: The caster bombards their allies with visions of their most visceral and bloody desires until they can no longer tell what is real and what is fantasy.

name: OVERWHELMING ACQUIESCENCE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for attacks that target that enemy unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: The wizard engulfs the foe in an arcane haze of dreams and unattainable desires.

name: PHANTASMAGORIA
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time the target is picked to use a FIGHT ability, you can pick a friendly unit in combat with the target. That friendly unit can move 2D3" after the FIGHT ability has been resolved. It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units and can end that move in combat.
legend: The sorcerer summons illusory creatures that flit across the battlefield, bewildering the enemy and enabling their allies to retreat.

name: THE SPEAR OF ASPHOREN
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat to use this ability.

Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for that unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Those Idoneth who wish to follow the example of legendary commander Asphoren must strike at the foe like the surging tide.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: DUTIFUL SOULS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.

Effect: You can return 1 slain model to the target unit. If the target is an INFANTRY unit, you can return D3 slain models to it instead.
legend: The Tide Guard will fight to protect their King even when gravely wounded.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: ROYAL IMPERATIVE
description:
You can only use this ability in the third battle round.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the battle round:

Into Them!: Friendly units have STRIKE-FIRST.

Strike Sure: Friendly units’ melee weapons have Crit (Mortal).
legend: Desperate to honour their liege, the Tide Guard strike a decisive blow.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: VOLTAIC CHARGE
description: Effect: Your general’s Akhelian Royal Weapons have Charge (+1 Damage).
legend: This general’s weapons crackle with electric power, ready to be discharged.

name: THE SHIELD OF ULCHISS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit in combat to use this ability.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, each time that unit uses a RETREAT ability, no mortal damage is inflicted on it.
legend: Mastery of the ebb and flow of battle is core to the teachings of Ulchiss, which state that a timely withdrawal can open up enemy vulnerabilities.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: SHIMMERING AMULET
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (5+).
legend: This void-pearl amulet conceals its wearer behind a shimmering cloak of refracted magic.

name: SOUL STEALER
description: Effect: If your general is in combat, Heal (D3) your general.
legend: This warrior is said to siphon the spirits of fallen foes to sustain them in battle.

name: ARMOUR OF THE CYTHAI
description: Effect: If this unit has not charged this turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks made by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: This gleaming panoply was given by Teclis to the ancestors of the Idoneth. Upon the command of its bearer, it can radiate the power of Hysh – a fitting property for a gift from the Great Illuminator.

name: LIFEKELP POD
description: Effect: Heal (D3) each friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN CAVALRY unit within this unit’s combat range.
legend: Radiant with Ghyranite energy, this golden seed pod bursts in a spray of vital power.

name: DRITCHLEECH
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from casting rolls for enemy WIZARDS while they are within 18" of this unit. In addition, each time an enemy spell fails, after that ability has been resolved, Heal (1) this unit.
legend: Incredibly rare, these worms feed upon magic and are capable of draining arcane energies.

name: BLOOD IN THE WATER
description:
Declare: If any friendly or enemy units were destroyed this turn, pick a friendly Akhelian Allopex unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: As the gore of the slain diffuses through the ethersea, ancient predators are drawn to battle.

name: OUTFLANK THE ENEMY
description:
Effect: While a friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN unit is wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge:
  • Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target that unit if it has not charged this turn.
  • Add 2" to the Move characteristic of that unit.
legend: Used to living on the periphery of society, these Idoneth are expert at blending into the shadows and using hidden paths to traverse the battlefield.

name: FADE LIKE MIST
description: Effect: When using the ‘Unpredictable Tide’ ability, you can pick up to 2 eligible targets instead of 1.
legend: The Soul-raid Ambushers are experts in hit-and-run tactics, riding the currents of the ethersea to strike the foe from new directions.

name: FEROCIOUS PREDATORS
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made with Companion weapons by friendly AKHELIAN units.
legend: With the aid of the Embailors, the Akhelian Beastmasters are able to turn oceanic carnivores into truly terrifying weapons of war.

name: WISDOM OF THE DEEP
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls, Isharann ritual rolls and lurelight rolls for friendly ISHARANN units while they are within the combat ranges of any other friendly ISHARANN units.
legend: The Isharann are born with a talent for harnessing arcane forces. This power is only amplified when these aelves convene an Isharann Council and head to war.

name: SURGE FORWARD
description: Effect: You can re-roll run rolls and charge rolls for friendly NAMARTI units while they are wholly within 12" of a friendly AKHELIAN unit.
legend: The Namarti are the lowest caste in Idoneth society, but when formed into a Namarti Corps and led to battle by their Akhelian masters, they strike swiftly and with devastating effect.

name: UNPREDICTABLE TIDE
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you did not use it in the previous battle round and you have not used any other TIDAL abilities this battle round. Pick a friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN unit that is not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 7" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Only the Deepkin can anticipate the mercurial currents of the ocean.
condition: Once Per Battle Round, Your Hero Phase

name: CONCEALING TIDE
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you did not use it in the previous battle round and you have not used any other TIDAL abilities this battle round.

Effect: For the rest of the battle round, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units that did not use any CHARGE abilities in the same turn.
legend: Freezing and impenetrable mists descend across the battlefield.
condition: Once Per Battle Round, Any Hero Phase

name: INEXORABLE TIDE
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you used the ‘Unpredictable Tide’ ability in the previous battle round and you have not used any other TIDAL abilities this battle round.

Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units for the rest of the battle round.
legend: When the tide sweeps in,no force of nature or maglc can keep It at bay.
condition: Once Per Battle Round, Any Hero Phase

name: SWIFT TIDE
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you used the ‘Concealing Tide’ ability in the previous battle round and you have not used any other TIDAL abilities this battle round.

Effect: For the rest of the battle round, friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units can use RUN abilities and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: The sheer rapidity of the sea’s advance sees the Idoneth outpace their foes.
condition: Once Per Battle Round, Any Hero Phase

name: STORM'S WRATH
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you used the ‘Inexorable Tide’ ability in the previous battle round and you have not used any other TIDAL abilities this battle round.

Effect: Friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units’ melee weapons have Crit (Mortal) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Woe to those caught in the path of the storm's destructive fury.
condition: Once Per Battle Round, Your Hero Phase

name: SEA’S EMBRACE
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you used the ‘Swift Tide’ ability in the previous battle round and you have not used any other TIDAL abilities this battle round.

Effect: Friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units have STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Those engulfed by the vast ocean can do nothing but await their fate.
condition: Once Per Battle Round, Your Hero Phase

name: MERCILESS RAIDER
description: Effect: If this unit is within 6" of a damaged enemy unit, this unit can move 6". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but must end that move in combat with a damaged enemy unit.
legend: This aelf gives no quarter to the enemies of the Idoneth. When in the vicinity of a wounded foe, they surge forwards to finish the job.

name: FORM OF THE FANGMORA
description: Effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-3, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: This champion has mastered a defensive sword-art that mimics the fluid movements of the swift Fangmora Eels.

name: HUNTER OF SOULS
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following weapon abilities for this unit’s melee weapons to have this battle:
  • Anti-CAVALRY (+1 Rend)
  • Anti-INFANTRY (+1 Rend)
  • Anti-MONSTER (+1 Rend)
legend: This hero seeks neither glory nor territory; their only interest is the capture of potent soul-stuff.

name: LORD OF STORM AND SEA
description: Effect: Each time an ability returns at least 1 slain model to a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit, after that ability has been resolved, you can return 1 additional slain model to it.
legend: This hero is a living embodiment of the glory of Mathlann and an inspiration to all those who still worship the Lord of the Deep.

name: NIGHTMARE LEGACY
description: Effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are within 6" of this unit.
legend: The repressed horror of the Idoneth’s long incarceration emanates from this dark-visaged warrior in palpable waves of doom.

name: ENDLESS SEA-STORM
description:
Effect: If this unit is a WIZARD, add 1 to its power level for the rest of the turn. If this unit is not a WIZARD, it gains WIZARD (1) for the rest of the turn.

In addition, add 2 to the next casting roll or banishment roll for this unit this turn.
legend: This hero summons the force of the ethersea to batter their foes with waves of pelagic force.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase

name: SUMMON INCARNATE OF THE DEEP
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Incarnate of the Deep on the battlefield, pick a friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up an Incarnate of the Deep wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The spellcaster awakens a terrifying manifestation of the ocean’s wrath.

name: BATTLE DAMAGED
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Mighty Sea-beast’s Jaws is 3.

name: ARCH-RITUALIST
description: Effect: Add 1 to rolls for your general’s ‘Ritual of the Creeping Mist’ ability.
legend: This general is a master at manipulating the ethersea to conceal the approach of their forces.

name: WAY OF THE CRESTING WAVE
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly Namarti Thralls units that charged in the same turn.
legend: The Thralls of this raiding party have been trained in techniques that see them strike like a tsunami.

name: MIND FLARE
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general.

Effect: Until the end of the phase, attacks made by that unit only score hits on unmodified hit rolls of 6.
legend: A brilliant pulse of bioluminescence suddenly illuminates the gloom of the ethersea, temporarily blinding those unprepared for it.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: ETHERSEA PREDATORS
description: Effect: Pick a friendly CAVALRY unit that used a FIGHT ability this turn. Heal (D3) that unit.
legend: The deep-sea beasts these warriors ride are driven into a feeding frenzy during battle.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: STEELSHELL ARMOUR
description: Effect: Ignore all modifiers to save rolls for your general (positive and negative).
legend: This pearlescent armour offers uncanny protection, regardless of the strength behind the blows that strike it.

name: DELICIOUS MORSELS
description: Effect: Heal (1) each friendly CAVALRY unit within your general’s combat range.
legend: This general carries with them rare crustaceans favoured by Allopexes and Fangmora Eels.

name: STEED OF TIDES
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN unit wholly within 12" of them and not in combat to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The wizard conjures an agile elemental to transport comrades through the ethersea.

name: COUNTER-CURRENT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, halve run rolls and charge rolls for the target.
legend: The wizard summons a powerful current to hold their enemies at bay.

name: PRESSURE OF THE DEEP
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The wizard enfolds their victims in a shimmering bubble of crushing force.

name: VOID CHILL DARKNESS
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit if this unit charged this turn.
legend: This breed can turn the ethersea around it ice-cold and dark.

name: THE LAST LIVING CYTHAI
description: Effect: The friendly Volturnos has STRIKE-FIRST.
legend: High King Volturnos is the greatest Idoneth warrior to have ever lived, and few can match his blinding speed in battle.

name: PRODIGY OF THE ASYDRZOR
description: Effect: No asydrazor points are spent to use that ability.
legend: A true product of the Deepkin’s martial enlightenment, this warrior is renowned for their strategic brilliance.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared an <ky>ASYDRAZOR</ky> ability for a friendly %000017229FIRST PHALANX% unit wholly within 12" of this unit

name: CREST OF THE IONRACH
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (6+).
legend: This crystal relic of the Ionrach is granted only to its greatest heroes and most rigorous defenders.

name: DEEP CONNECTION
description: Effect: Ignore the effect of the Companion weapon ability on this unit’s weapons.
legend: These mounts are so attuned to their riders' emotions that they can instinctively predict their next command.

name: TEACHINGS OF THE ASYDRAZOR
description: Effect: You gain D3 asydrazor points.
legend: As part of their asydrazor training, Akhelians must study the strategic theorems and methods of war set down by the legendary Cythai heroes of yore.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: SWIFT-FINNED SKIRMISHER
description: Effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that this unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.
legend: These mounts are so attuned to their riders' emotions that they can instinctively predict their next command.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009837Redeploy%’ command for this unit

name: THE SHIELD OF ULCHISS
description:
Declare: You must spend 1 asydrazor point each time a friendly FIRST PHALANX unit uses this ability. Pick a friendly unit in combat to use this ability.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • That unit can use a RETREAT ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
  • No mortal damage is inflicted on that unit by RETREAT abilities.
legend: Mastery of the ebb and flow of battle is core to the teachings of Ulchiss, which state that a timely withdrawal can open up enemy vulnerabilities.

name: THE SPEAR OF ASPHOREN
description:
Declare: You must spend 1 asydrazor point each time a friendly FIRST PHALANX unit uses this ability. Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat to use this ability.

Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for that unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Those Idoneth who wish to follow the example of legendary commander Asphoren must strike at the foe like the surging tide.

name: THE SWORD OF GWYNNAR
description:
Declare: You must spend 1 asydrazor point each time a friendly FIRST PHALANX unit uses this ability. Pick a friendly unit in combat to use this ability.

Effect: That unit has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn.
legend: To emulate Queen Gwynnar is to anticipate the enemy’s next move and gain the upper hand in combat.

name: THE OCEAN CONCEALS
description:
Declare: THis ability must be used to deploy the friendly CHORRILEUM EIDOLON instead of the ‘Deploy Unit’ ability or the ‘Deploy Regiment’ ability.

Effect: Set up the friendly CHORRILEUM EIDOLON in reserve awaiting a summons. It has now been deployed.
legend: Hidden by the froth and churn of the ethersea, an Eidolon of Mathlann can emerge in the very midst of its enemies.

name: SERVE THE ENCLAVE
description: Effect: While this unit and a friendly CHORRILEUM NAMARTI unit are contesting the same objective, this unit has a control score of 10 that cannot be modified.
legend: With the fate of their people at stake, this hero inspires a fearless resolve in those Namarti under their command.

name: AMMONITE CARNYX
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CHORRILEUM NAMARTI unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: This war-horn is carved from pearlescent shell. When blown, its thundering call summons every nearby Idoneth to battle.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: ESSENCE OF THE CHORRILEUM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CHORRILEUM WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly CHORRILEUM unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is NAMARTI, you can return D6 slain models to it. Otherwise, Heal (D3) the target
legend: The powerful energies of an Idoneth soul-reef can heal flesh and mend shattered bones.

name: SUMMON INCARNATE OF THE DEEP
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Incarnate of the Deep on the battlefield, pick a friendly CHORRILEUM WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up an Incarnate of the Deep wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The spellcaster awakens a terrifying manifestation of the ocean’s wrath.

name: SLIPSTREAM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CHORRILEUM WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly CHORRILEUM unit that is not in combat and is wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target can move up to D6". at move cannot pass through or end within the combat range of an enemy unit.
legend: The wizard deftly manipulates the surging currents of the ethersea to aid allies.

name: SPIRITS OF THE CHORRILEUM
description:
Effect: Each turn, you can gain up to 1 chorrileum spirit point. You gain 1 chorrileum spirit point the first time 1 of the following occurs in a turn:
  • You make an unmodified casting roll of 8 or more for a friendly ISHARANN WIZARD.
  • An enemy unit is destroyed while it is within 12" of any friendly ISHARANN units.
  • A friendly unit is destroyed while it is wholly within 12" of any friendly ISHARANN units or while it is contesting an objective you control
legend: The spirit matter that animates an Eidolon is a malleable force that ebbs and surges in power as battle ensues.

name: CALL FORTH THE TSUNAMI
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have 3 or more chorrileum spirit points. Pick a friendly unit awaiting a summons to be the target.

Effect: Set up the target anywhere on the battlefield. Then, inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit in combat with it.
legend: When summoned to defend the legacy of the Idoneth, an Eidolon’s fury is terrible indeed.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Combat Phase

name: WRATH OF THE MATHLANN
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CHORRILEUM EIDOLON unit that has not used any RAMPAGE abilities this turn to use this ability.

Effect: That unit can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, that unit has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn. The unit using this ability cannot use any other RAMPAGE abilities for the rest of the turn.
legend: Calling upon every vestige its of strength and rage, the Eidolon comes crashing down upon the foe.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: TROPHY SKULLS
description: Effect: Add 10 to this unit’s control score.
legend: Festooned with the skulls of those who crossed them, be they ferocious beast or mighty warrior, there’s no doubt that this orruk means business.

name: ARMOUR OF GORK
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (6+).
legend: This bashed-together armour is thick, heavy and possessed of its own fierce fighting spirit.

name: AMBERBONE WHETSTONE
description: Effect: Pick 1 of this unit’s weapons. Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of that weapon for the rest of the battle.
legend: This prized sharpening stone, laced with veins of realmstone, is found deep in the crags of Ghur. It is loved by the Ironjawz for its ability to make a weapon ‘ded sharp’.

name: MIGHTIEST DESTROYERS
description:
Effect: If there are any friendly Megabosses on the battlefield, for the rest of the turn, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target when using the ‘Mighty Destroyers’ ability.

If there are no friendly Megabosses on the battlefield, roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target when using the ‘Mighty Destroyers’ ability.
legend: Wherever the Megabosses lead from the front lines, the Ironjawz surge forward as an unstoppable tide of green muscle and heavy armour plates.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: DUFF UP DA BIG THING
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONJAWZ unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks that target an enemy unit that has a Health characteristic greater than its own.
legend: The ladz get ready to bash some uppity git who thinks that being bigger than an orruk gives them some kind of advantage.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: ’ERE WE COME!
description: Effect: Add the number of enemy units that have been destroyed this battle to the Move characteristic of friendly Gore-gruntas and MAW-GRUNTA units, to a maximum of +4.
legend: Once a grunta stampede gets going and the hogs are all riled up, there are few forces in the realms with the power to halt its momentum.

name: SMASHIN’ AND BASHIN’
description: Effect: The first time each turn that an enemy unit is destroyed by a FIGHT ability used by a friendly IRONJAWZ unit, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by the next friendly IRONJAWZ unit that is picked to use a FIGHT ability for the rest of the turn.
legend: The orruks of an Ironfist won’t be outdone by each other – when one mob duffs up the enemy, it inspires others to show them how to do it properly!

name: SPIRIT OF GORK
description: Effect: Friendly IRONJAWZ INFANTRY units have WARD (6+) while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly IRONJAWZ WIZARDS or PRIESTS.
legend: The roiling Waaagh! energy that emanates from the Weirdfist shamans fills nearby Ironjawz with the fighting spirit and hardiness of Gork.

name: NATURAL DISASTER
description: Effect: If you make an unmodified charge roll of 8+ for a friendly non-HERO IRONJAWZ unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: A mass of heavily armoured orruks and their bulky beasts of war, an Ironjawz Brawl hits the enemy line like a landslide if it gains enough momentum, leaving a trail of carnage and blazing ruin in its wake.

name: MIGHTY DESTROYERS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONJAWZ unit that was not set up this turn to be the target.

Effect: The target can move up to 3". It can move into combat. If it was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.
legend: The Ironjawz won’t let anything get between them and a good scrap.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: IRONJAWZ WAAAGH!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONJAWZ HERO to be the target. You cannot pick the same HERO to be the target of this ability more than once per battle.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the following effects apply to friendly IRONJAWZ units while they are wholly within 18" of the target:

  • Add 1 to charge rolls for those units.
  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those units’ melee weapons.
legend: With a roar that shakes the battlefield, the Ironjawz charge as one, eager to crack skulls.

name: DA SNEAKY STAB-SLAB
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: This simple slab of metal is bound by kunnin’ enchantments that turn the force of an enemy’s blows back against them.

name: SUMMON FOOT OF GORK
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Foot of Gork on the battlefield, pick a friendly BIG WAAAGH! WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Foot of Gork wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. A Foot of Gork has 2 parts that must be set up within 9" of each other.
legend: Stamping a furiously belligerent beat, the shaman dares Gork himself to stomp the battlefield flat.

name: UNSTOPPABLE WAAAGH!-BEATS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly BIG WAAAGH! PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly non-HERO BIG WAAAGH! INFANTRY unit that is in combat and wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: The target can use 2 FIGHT abilities this turn. After the first is used, however, the target has S
legend: Warchanter’s manic percussion spreads a frenzy to their Gorkish and Morkish mates.

name: TWO HEADZ AS ONE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly BIG WAAAGH! WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly BIG WAAAGH! INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is an IRONJAWZ unit, until the start of your next turn, add 3 to the target’s control score while it is wholly within 12" of any friendly KRULEBOYZ units.

If the target is a KRULEBOYZ unit, until the start of your next turn, add 2" to the ta
legend: Shamans conveying the Twin-Headed God’s will spur the ladz to commit acts of kunnin’ brutality – or brutal kunnin’ – as necessary.

name: TAKIN’ NAMES
description: Effect: If an enemy HERO is destroyed by this unit, this unit has the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword for the rest of the battle.
legend: The best way to keep your position at the head of a rowdy orruk horde is by duffing up anyone who looks like a challenge.

name: NOTORIOUS BOSSES
description:
Declare: Pick up to 1 friendly non-UNIQUE BIG WAAAGH! IRONJAWZ HERO and up to 1 friendly non-UNIQUE BIG WAAAGH! KRULEBOYZ HERO that do not have a heroic trait to be the targets.

Effect: Give each target 1 heroic trait from the Big Waaagh! heroic traits.

Designer’s Note: These heroic traits are given to the targets during the deployment phase, not during army composition.
legend: It takes orruks of propa might and kunnin’ to keep a Big Waaagh! in line.

name: THE POWER OF THE WAAAGH!
description:
Declare: Pick up to 1 friendly BIG WAAAGH! IRONJAWZ unit and up to 1 friendly BIG WAAAGH! KRULEBOYZ unit to be the targets.

Effect: The targets have the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword for the rest of the battle round.
legend: The power of Gorkamorka reaches a climax of violent energy when orruks gather as a Big Waaagh!.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase

name: A PROPER SNEAK
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if this unit has the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword and a friendly unit has not used a BRUTAL KUNNIN’ ability this turn.

Effect: For the rest of the battle round, friendly BIG WAAAGH! units have WARD (5+) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: When they get their Mork muscles flexin’, this boss can even get the Ironjawz moving with a semblance of stealth.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: POSSESSED BY THE POWER OF THE WAAAGH!
description:
Effect: While a friendly unit has the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword:
  • If that unit has the IRONJAWZ keyword, add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for that unit.
  • If that unit has the KRULEBOYZ keyword, that unit’s attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
legend: When a Waaagh! really gets going, the orruks become a terrifying force to be reckoned with.

name: DA OLD ONE-TWO
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if this unit has the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword and a friendly unit has not used a BRUTAL KUNNIN’ ability this turn.

Effect: For the rest of the battle round, friendly BIG WAAAGH! units’ melee weapons have CRIT (2 HITS) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This boss and their boyz are the masters at piling on the pain.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: RALLY THE WARCLANS
description:
Declare: If your general is on the battlefield, pick a friendly BIG WAAAGH! unit that started the battle with 3 or more models and that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of your general and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: With a great bellow, the boss encourages a mob from the seemingly endless hordes to get stuck in.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase

name: GET KRUMPIN’!
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if this unit has the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword and a friendly unit has not used a BRUTAL KUNNIN’ ability this turn.

Effect: For the rest of the battle round, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly BIG WAAAGH! units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Watching this boss go to town on an unfortunate target gets the mobs under their command well up for a brawl.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: AN EYE FOR DA FIGHT
description: Effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.
legend: This orruk is among the most dangerous of their brutal kind: one who instinctively understands the flow of battle and knows just where the best fights are likely to kick off.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009837Redeploy%’ command for a friendly %000001744IRONJAWZ% unit wholly within 12" of this unit

name: MEGA BOSSY
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly IRONJAWZ units while they are wholly within 18" of this unit.
legend: This boss’s booming voice constantly rings out across the battlefield, ‘encouraging’ their ladz to get krumpin’.

name: HULKING BRUTE
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If this unit’s unmodified charge roll this turn was 8+, roll a D6 instead of a D3.
legend: Even by orruk standards, this boss is huge, and he is ever eager to throw his immense weight around in battle.

name: 'ERE WE GO!
description: Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: The din of battle draws in Ironjawz from leagues around.

name: NATURAL DISASTER
description: Effect: If you make an unmodified charge roll of 8+ for a friendly unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: A mass of heavily armoured orruks hit an enemy line like a landslide if they gain enough momentum, leaving a trail of carnage and blazing ruin in their wake.

name: AMBERSTONE WHETSTONE
description: Effect: The Rend characteristic of your general’s melee weapons is 2.
legend: This prized sharpening stone, laced with veins of realmstone, is found deep in the crags of Ghur. It is loved by the Ironjawz for its ability to make a weapon ‘ded sharp’.

name: A PROPER RUCKUS
description: Effect: All friendly units on the battlefield that were not set up this turn are the targets of that ability instead.
legend: Delighted by the scrap before them, the orruks barge and jostle their way into the fray.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared the ‘%000023128Mighty Destroyers%’ ability

name: ARMOUR OF GORK
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (6+).
legend: This bashed-together armour is thick, heavy and possessed of its own fierce fighting spirit.

name: MIGHTY DESTROYERS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that was not set up this turn to be the target.

Effect: The target can move up to 3". It can move into combat. If it was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.
legend: The Ironjawz won’t let anything get between them and a good scrap.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: TROPHY SKULLS
description: Effect: Your general’s Control characteristic is 5.
legend: Festooned with the skulls of those who crossed them, be they ferocious beast or mighty warrior, there’s no doubt that this orruk means business.

name: MEGA BOSSY
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This boss’s booming voice rings out across the battlefield, ‘encouraging’ their ladz to get krumpin’.

name: 'Up and At ’Em!'
description: Effect: When making run rolls for friendly IRONSUNZ units, if you roll a 1-2, you can use a value of 3 instead.
legend: The Ironsunz love battle in all its forms and are always raring to get into the fight.

name: SUMMON FOOT OF GORK
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Foot of Gork on the battlefield, pick a friendly IRONSUNZ WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Foot of Gork wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. A Foot of Gork has 2 parts that must be set up within 9" of each other.
legend: Stamping a furiously belligerent beat, the shaman dares Gork himself to stomp the battlefield flat.

name: Brutal Troof
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONSUNZ WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly IRONSUNZ unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s attacks if it charged in the same turn or if it is in combat with an enemy unit that charged in the same turn.
legend: The shaman prods around the rather simple minds of a group of Ironsunz warriors, hoping to enhance their fighting prowess.

name: Ghurish Beat
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONSUNZ PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible terrain feature within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, enemy units cannot be set up within 9" of the target terrain feature. If the chanting roll was 9+, you can pick 2 eligible terrain features to be the targets instead of 1.
legend: The Warchanter settles into a nostalgic rhythm that reminds the Ironsunz of home.

name: Seen Dat Before
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target charged this turn. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, the target’s weapons cannot be affected by weapon abilities other than the Companion weapon ability.
legend: This battle-hardened boss has faced every fighting technique known in the Mortal Realms.

name: Soulkrumpa
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by this unit’s combat attacks to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the battle:
  • The target cannot be healed.
  • Slain models cannot be returned to the target unit.
legend: A relic looted from the underworld of Hallost, this mace is especially good at killing things that won't stay dead.

name: Animosity
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONSUNZ WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time the target uses an ability, roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target after that ability has been resolved.
legend: A familiar feeling to the orruks. Time to return it with interest to their enemies.

name: 'Let’s Try Dis...'
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONSUNZ INFANTRY unit wholly within 3" of a terrain feature and not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Ironsunz are willing to try all manner of otherwise un-orruky tactics, provided it gets them into the fight.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Krumpin’ Beat
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONSUNZ PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 damage on the target. In addition, if the chanting roll was 8+ inflict D3 damage on each enemy unit within 3" of the target.
legend: The furious pounding of the Warchanter’s beat painfully reverberates through the heads of their enemies.

name: Mork’s Melee Miracle
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONSUNZ WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly IRONSUNZ unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6, subtracting the current battle round number from the roll.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add the number of the current battle round to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.
legend: The longer the fighting continues, the more powerful this shaman’s spell becomes.

name: Ironsunz Beat
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONSUNZ PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll ofD6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for attacks that target an enemy unit whose Health characteristic is lower than the target’s.
  • Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for attacks that target an enemy unit whose Health characteristic is the same as or greater than the target’s.
If the chanting roll was 10+, until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic and Damage characteristic of the target’s mele
legend: Rising to a walloping crescendo, the Ironsunz signature beat is heard in every corner of the battlefield.

name: Keep on Smashin'
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONSUNZ unit that destroyed an enemy unit this turn to be the target.

Effect: The target can move 3". It can end that move in combat. If the enemy unit that was destroyed was a MONSTER, the target can move 6" instead of 3".
legend: Once one fight is over, it's time to get stuck into the next one.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Ironsunz WAAAGH!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONSUNZ HERO to use this ability, then pick each friendly IRONSUNZ unit wholly within 18" of them to be the targets. Dakkbad Grotkicker must be picked to use this ability ifhe is on the battlefield.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • Melee weapons used by the targets have Anti-MONSTER (+1 Rend)
  • The targets cannot be picked as the target of RAMPAGE abilities.
  • The targets can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: An almighty roar sweeps across the battlefield, empowering the Ironsunz to fight all the harder.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Charge Phase

name: DA BOOM SKULL
description: Effect: Pick an enemy unit in combat with that friendly unit to be the target and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The Waaagh! magic imbued within this grunta skull amplifies the bearer’s voice into a thunderous roar that shakes the battlefield.
condition: Reaction: You declared a command for a friendly <ky>GRUNTA STAMPEDE</ky> unit wholly within 18" of this unit

name: TROPHY HUNTA
description: Effect: This unit’s Pig-hakka has ANTI-MONSTER (+1 REND) and ANTI-WAR MACHINE (+1 REND).
legend: This heavily scarred orruk is always on the lookout for the largest and most ferocious beasts of the realms. After all, their skulls make the flashiest trophies!

name: INCESSANT DRIVE
description: Effect: Add 1 to the momentum scores of friendly MAW-GRUNTA units.
legend: As the Stampede moves ever faster, they accrue more and more power and momentum.
condition: End of the First Battle Round

name: FAST AND FURIOUS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO GRUNTA STAMPEDE unit to be the target.

Effect: The target can immediately use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: Riders of the Grunta Stampedes compete to be the first to slam into the enemy, urging their porcine steed on with kicks, curses and much incoherent bellowing

name: MONSTROUS MOMENTUM
description: Effect: Add the current battle round number to the Move characteristic of friendly GRUNTA STAMPEDE units.
legend: The longer the Grunta Stampede goes on, the more it picks up speed…

name: EATIN’ ON DA HOOF
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GRUNTA STAMPEDE MONSTER that has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn to use this ability, then pick a visible enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice and add the momentum score of the unit using this ability to the roll. If the result exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: Maw-gruntas have mastered the art of feeding on the move, snatching up unlucky victims and mashing them between their oversized teeth as they hurtle onwards.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: WALL OF HOGFLESH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GRUNTA STAMPEDE HERO to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target that HERO while it is wholly within 6" of a friendly non-HERO GRUNTA STAMPEDE unit.
legend: It is no easy thing to pick your target when the ground is shaking and several dozen tonnes of ironclad meat are thundering in your direction.

name: GRUNTA WAAAGH!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GRUNTA STAMPEDE HERO to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the following effects apply to friendly GRUNTA STAMPEDE units while they are wholly within 18" of the target:
  • You can re-roll charge rolls for those units.
  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those units’ Maw-grunta’s Trotters.
  • Roll a D6 instead of a D3 when determining the amount of mortal damage inflicted by the ‘Goregrunta Charge’ ability of those units.
legend: Just before the stampede crashes headlong into the enemy lines, the Tuskboss bellows a mighty ‘Waaagh!’, encouraging the ladz and their steeds cause as much carnage as possible with their impact.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Charge Phase

name: SUMMON FOOT OF GORK
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Foot of Gork on the battlefield, pick a friendly IRONJAWZ WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Foot of Gork wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. A Foot of Gork has 2 parts that must be set up within 9" of each other.
legend: Stamping a furiously belligerent beat, the shaman dares Gork himself to stomp the battlefield flat.

name: SUMMON MORKSPIT MARSH
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Morkspit Marsh on the battlefield, pick a friendly IRONJAWZ WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Morkspit Marsh wholly within 18" of the caster and visible to them.
legend: The shaman summons a cruel, glowing swamp that channels memories of Gorkamorka’s past brawls.

name: SUMMON GORK-ROARA
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Gork-Roara on the battlefield, pick a friendly IRONJAWZ WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Gork-Roara wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The shaman summons a leering visage of Gorkamorka that spills forth Waaagh! power.

name: BIG ’UN
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Companion weapons.
legend: This beast is noticeably more muscular and krumpier than others of its kind.

name: MAD ’UN
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If any models are slain by this ability, after those models are removed from the battlefield, if this unit is still in combat, this unit can immediately use this ability again.
legend: Once this crazed beast starts its rampage, it will keep going until everything nearby has been smashed into a red paste.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: FAST ’UN
description: Effect: If this unit was not set up this turn, it can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: This beast lurches forward at a speed that would take anyone by surprise.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: GET ’EM BEAT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONJAWZ PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly IRONJAWZ unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to charge rolls for the target. In addition, if the chanting roll was 8+, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a maximum of 3.
legend: A pounding rhythm is played by the Warchanter, inspiring nearby Ironjawz to wreak destruction and ruin upon their enemies.

name: FIXIN’ BEAT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONJAWZ PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly IRONJAWZ unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Heal (D6) the target. If the chanting roll was 8+, HEAL (D3+3) the target instead.
legend: The Warchanter pounds a restorative rhythm that gives the ladz a second wind.

name: KILLA BEAT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONJAWZ PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly IRONJAWZ unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: AAdd 1 to the Damage characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn. If the chanting roll was 10+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.
legend: The Warchanter drums a thumping beat that causes raw Waaagh! energy to course through the weapons of the orruks.

name: BASH ’EM LADZ!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONJAWZ WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly IRONJAWZ unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) until the start of your next turn.’
legend: Pulsing waves of Waaagh! energy radiate from the shaman, boosting the fighting prowess of nearby Ironjawz.

name: MIGHTY ’EADBUTT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONJAWZ WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. If the target is a WIZARD, inflict 3 mortal damage on the target instead.
legend: The shaman headbutts the air, projecting a wave of green energy that seeks out enemies, especially spell-flingas, to nut.

name: DA GREAT BIG GREEN HAND OF GORK
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONJAWZ WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them and not in combat to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 24" of the caster and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: A ghostly green hand picks up a mob of Ironjawz and plonks them back down where they are most needed.

name: DA GREAT WOLLOPA
description:
Effect: If any damage points are allocated to an enemy unit by attacks made by this unit, that enemy unit is krump’d until the start of your next turn.

While a unit is krump’d:
  • Subtract 1 from save rolls for that unit.
  • Ignore positive modifiers to save rolls for that unit.
legend: Infused with the arcane indignation of the Waaagh!, da Great Wollopa is good for krumpin’ whatever needs krumpin’.

name: THE GREEN GOD’S HAMMER
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ZOGGROK’S IRONMONGERZ WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly ZOGGROK’S IRONMONGERZ INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a maximum of 3.
legend: At the urging of the Weirdnobs, Waaagh! energy surrounding the Ironmongerz pounds like a hammer on an anvil.

name: SUMMON GORK-ROARA
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Gork-Roara on the battlefield, pick a friendly ZOGGROK’S IRONMONGERZ WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Gork-Roara wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The shaman summons a leering visage of Gorkamorka that spills forth Waaagh! power.

name: GET ’EM, GORK!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ZOGGROK’S IRONMONGERZ PRIEST to chant this prayer, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: If the chanting roll was 5-9, pick a visible terrain feature wholly within 12" of the chanter. If the chanting roll was 10+, pick a visible terrain feature wholly within 18" of the chanter instead. That terrain feature is trampled by Gork for the rest of the battle.

Roll a D3 each time an enemy unit ends a move within 6" of a terrain feature that is trampled by Gork. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
legend: The bellowing and pounding of an Ironmongerz Warchanter can see Gork’s divine belligerence unleashed upon enemy battlements.

name: LEGENDARY VANDALS
description: Effect: Melee weapons used by friendly ZOGGROK’S IRONMONGERZ units have ANTI-FACTION TERRAIN (+1 REND) and ANTI-WAR MACHINE (+1 REND).
legend: Zoggrok’s Ironmongerz have inherited their boss’s taste for crushing not only their enemies but also their edifices and artifice too.

name: OI! BACK TO IT!
description: Effect: If a friendly ZOGGROK’S IRONMONGERZ Ardboyz or Brutes unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.
legend: A harsh bark from Zoggrok or his enforcers can put steel into the spine of any orruk.

name: INTO DA BREACH!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ZOGGROK’S IRONMONGERZ unit that is more than 9" from any enemy units and had any damage points allocated to it this turn.

Effect: That unit can move D6". It cannot pass through the combat ranges of enemy units. It cannot end that move in combat.
legend: Zoggrok’s ladz live for the moment when it’s time to storm the enemy gates with every ounce of ferocity they can muster.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: IRONCLAD SCRUMS
description: Effect: Friendly ZOGGROK’S IRONMONGERZ Ardboyz units with 3 or more models have WARD (5+) while they are wholly within 12" of a different friendly ZOGGROK’S IRONMONGERZ Ardboyz unit with 3 or more models.
legend: Ardboyz share Zoggrok’s brutally pragmatic views on war, enough to advance on a fortress wall or artillery battery in some sort of defensive formation.

name: SHIELD OF SCRAP AND MUSCLE
description:
Effect: While a friendly Zoggrok Anvilsmasha is within the combat range of a friendly Ardboyz unit:
  • That Zoggrok Anvilsmasha has WARD (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for that Zoggrok Anvilsmasha, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly Ardboyz unit within its combat range after the damage sequence has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Zoggrok’s boyz believe it’s better to die fighting than to let anything distract their surly boss while he’s engaged in his destructive craft. After all, they’d suffer the consequences…

name: MORK’S EYE PEBBLE
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly KRULEBOYZ units have WARD (5+) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: When rubbed, this dark-grey rock produces a swirling bank of thick fog that protects the bearer and their allies from harm.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: Opponent declared an <ky>ATTACK</ky> ability

name: SWAMP STAFF
description: Effect: If this unit is not a non-WIZARD, it can use the ‘Unbind’ ability as if it had WIZARD (1). Otherwise, add 1 to this unit’s power level.
legend: Hewn from a root of an ancient bogwood, this gnarled staff grants its bearer mastery over the swamps and can be used to ward off enemy magics.

name: EYE-BITER ASH
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Stored in a heatproof pouch, this strange ash never stops smouldering. The bearer can cast it at a foe, creating a blistering ash cloud that blinds the targets and causes them terrible pain.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: DED SNEAKY
description: Effect: You can use the ‘Sneaky Sneakin’’ DIRTY TRICK ability twice per turn instead of only once per turn.
legend: Comprised of hobgrots and ‘yoofs’, the ladz of the Light Finga are in charge of ‘nikkin’ stuff and are skilled at sneaking up on the enemy.

name: FAR-KILLA BOLTS
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly Man-skewer Boltboyz or Beast-skewer Killbow units to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 3" to the Range characteristic of the targets’ ranged weapons.
legend: The many Deffspikerz of the Middul Finger often keep a limited supply of bolts fletched with bog-shryke feathers, which give their shots that extra bit of distance when needed.

name: MEANEST BEASTS
description: Effect: Companion weapons used by friendly KRULEBOYZ units have Crit (2 Hits).
legend: The warbeasts ridden by the orruks of the Trophy Finga are particularly foul and belligerent specimens of their kind.

name: GANGIN’ UP
description:
