Declare: Pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ unit to be the target. That unit must be in combat with an enemy unit that is in combat with another friendly KRULEBOYZ unit. Kragnos cannot be picked to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.
legend: These orruks like to overwhelm their enemies with a flurry of strikes from all directions interspersed with sneaky stabs and low blows.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: KRULE MOCKERY
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ unit to be the Insult Hurla, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of it to be the target, then make a dirty trick roll.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time the target uses a MOVE ability and does not end that move closer to the Insult Hurla than it was at the start of that move, inflict D6 mortal damage on the target after that MOVE ability has been resolved.
legend: These orruks have perfected the art of hurling biting insults at the enemy to taunt them and lure them into hidden traps.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: SWAMP SHROUD
description: Effect: Friendly KRULEBOYZ units that are wholly within 3" of a terrain feature are not visible to enemy units that are more than 12" away from them.
legend: Before the warriors of a Kruleboyz Klaw strike, the shamans enact a mighty ritual to smother the battlefield in a thick, stinky mist that conceals them from the enemy.

name: DIRTY TRICKS
description:
Effect: Your army can use 1 DIRTY TRICK ability per phase. The effect of a DIRTY TRICK ability is only applied if you make a successful dirty trick roll. The success of a dirty trick roll depends on the number of DIRTY TRICK abilities your army has already used this battle round.
$000001423
legend: Kruleboyz will use whatever devious means they can to gain the upper hand over the foe.

name: LETHAL SURPRISE
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with any friendly KRULEBOYZ units to be the target, then make a dirty trick roll.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. In addition, for the rest of the turn, the target’s weapons cannot be affected by the Charge (+1 Damage) weapon ability.
legend: As the enemy charges into the Kruleboyz line, little do they know that they have been lured into a series of cunningly concealed traps.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: VENOM-ENCRUSTED WEAPONS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ INFANTRY unit to be the target, then make a dirty trick roll.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target’s attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
legend: These weapons are smeared with a lethal mix of toxins extracted from poison sludge, venomous swamp creatures and spit.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: SNEAKY SNEAKIN’
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ INFANTRY unit that has 10 or fewer models, is not in combat and has not been the target of a DIRTY TRICK ability this turn to be the target, then make a dirty trick roll.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of a terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Cloying swamp-mists mask the Kruleboyz’ movements.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: NOISY RACKET
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with any friendly KRULEBOYZ units to be the target, then make a dirty trick roll.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: After a sustained barrage of hurled insults and the clanging of weapons on shields, the Kruleboyz have driven some of their foes to distraction.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: TAKIN’ NAMES
description: Effect: If an enemy HERO is destroyed by this unit, this unit has the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword for the rest of the battle.
legend: The best way to keep your position at the head of a rowdy orruk horde is by duffing up anyone who looks like a challenge.

name: UNSTOPPABLE WAAAGH!-BEATS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly BIG WAAAGH! PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly non-HERO BIG WAAAGH! INFANTRY unit that is in combat and wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: The target can use 2 FIGHT abilities this turn. After the first is used, however, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the re
legend: Warchanter’s manic percussion spreads a frenzy to their Gorkish and Morkish mates.

name: SUMMON FOOT OF GORK
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Foot of Gork on the battlefield, pick a friendly BIG WAAAGH! WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Foot of Gork wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. A Foot of Gork has 2 parts that must be set up within 9" of each other.
legend: Stamping a furiously belligerent beat, the shaman dares Gork himself to stomp the battlefield flat.

name: DA SNEAKY STAB-SLAB
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: This simple slab of metal is bound by kunnin’ enchantments that turn the force of an enemy’s blows back against them.

name: NOTORIOUS BOSSES
description:
Declare: Pick up to 1 friendly non-UNIQUE BIG WAAAGH! IRONJAWZ HERO and up to 1 friendly non-UNIQUE BIG WAAAGH! KRULEBOYZ HERO that do not have a heroic trait to be the targets.

Effect: Give each target 1 heroic trait from the Big Waaagh! heroic traits.

Designer’s Note: These heroic traits are given to the targets during the deployment phase, not during army composition.
legend: It takes orruks of propa might and kunnin’ to keep a Big Waaagh! in line.

name: TWO HEADZ AS ONE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly BIG WAAAGH! WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly BIG WAAAGH! INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is an IRONJAWZ unit, until the start of your next turn, add 3 to the target’s control score while it is wholly within 12" of any friendly KRULEBOYZ units.

If the target is a KRULEBOYZ unit, until the start of your next turn, add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic while it is wholly within 12" of any friendly
legend: Shamans conveying the Twin-Headed God’s will spur the ladz to commit acts of kunnin’ brutality – or brutal kunnin’ – as necessary.

name: A PROPER SNEAK
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if this unit has the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword and a friendly unit has not used a BRUTAL KUNNIN’ ability this turn.

Effect: For the rest of the battle round, friendly BIG WAAAGH! units have WARD (5+) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: When they get their Mork muscles flexin’, this boss can even get the Ironjawz moving with a semblance of stealth.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: THE POWER OF THE WAAAGH!
description:
Declare: Pick up to 1 friendly BIG WAAAGH! IRONJAWZ unit and up to 1 friendly BIG WAAAGH! KRULEBOYZ unit to be the targets.

Effect: The targets have the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword for the rest of the battle round.
legend: The power of Gorkamorka reaches a climax of violent energy when orruks gather as a Big Waaagh!.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase

name: DA OLD ONE-TWO
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if this unit has the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword and a friendly unit has not used a BRUTAL KUNNIN’ ability this turn.

Effect: For the rest of the battle round, friendly BIG WAAAGH! units’ melee weapons have CRIT (2 HITS) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This boss and their boyz are the masters at piling on the pain.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: POSSESSED BY THE POWER OF THE WAAAGH!
description:
Effect: While a friendly unit has the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword:
  • If that unit has the IRONJAWZ keyword, add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for that unit.
  • If that unit has the KRULEBOYZ keyword, that unit’s attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
legend: When a Waaagh! really gets going, the orruks become a terrifying force to be reckoned with.

name: RALLY THE WARCLANS
description:
Declare: If your general is on the battlefield, pick a friendly BIG WAAAGH! unit that started the battle with 3 or more models and that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of your general and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: With a great bellow, the boss encourages a mob from the seemingly endless hordes to get stuck in.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase

name: GET KRUMPIN’!
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if this unit has the POWER OF THE WAAAGH! keyword and a friendly unit has not used a BRUTAL KUNNIN’ ability this turn.

Effect: For the rest of the battle round, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly BIG WAAAGH! units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Watching this boss go to town on an unfortunate target gets the mobs under their command well up for a brawl.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: BACKSTABBA
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with both this unit and another friendly KRULEBOYZ unit to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Add 1 to the mortal damage inflicted for each friendly KRULEBOYZ unit in combat with the target in addition to the first two KRULEBOYZ units.
legend: When their enemy’s back is turned, this boss has no qualms about sticking a dagger in it.

name: SLIPPERY SKUMBAG
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, it can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
legend: This wily boss has mastered the art of the feint, breaking away from fights that aren’t going his way and then coming back for another go when the odds are in his favour.

name: EGOMANIAK
description:
Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly non-HERO KRULEBOYZ INFANTRY unit:
  • This unit has WARD (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly non-HERO KRULEBOYZ INFANTRY unit within this unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for this unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: This self-important boss is willing to use anyone to protect their own hide.

name: SUMMON FOOT OF GORK
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Foot of Gork on the battlefield, pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Foot of Gork wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. A Foot of Gork has 2 parts that must be set up within 9" of each other.
legend: Stamping a furiously belligerent beat, the shaman dares Gork himself to stomp the battlefield flat.

name: SUMMON GORK-ROARA
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Gork-Roara on the battlefield, pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Gork-Roara wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The shaman summons a leering visage of Gorkamorka that spills forth Waaagh! power.

name: SUMMON MORKSPIT MARSH
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Morkspit Marsh on the battlefield, pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Morkspit Marsh wholly within 18" of the caster and visible to them.
legend: The shaman summons a cruel, glowing swamp that channels memories of Gorkamorka’s past brawls.

name: MEAN ’UN
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made with this unit’s Companion weapons.
legend: This beast is a kunnin’ and ruthless predator, targeting vulnerable areas and vital spots with a hunter’s eye.

name: SNEAKY ’UN
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ or ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by RETREAT abilities this phase.
legend: This beast prefers to sneak up on its prey and skulk off when the going gets tough, traits its Kruleboyz masters darkly approve of.
condition: Once Per Battle, Enemy Hero Phase

name: TOUGH ’UN
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target this unit.
legend: This beast has endured the lash of its cruel masters for many a season, which has inured it to pain.

name: SUMMON FOOT OF GORK
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Foot of Gork on the battlefield, pick a friendly MURKVAST MENAGERIE WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Foot of Gork wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. A Foot of Gork has 2 parts that must be set up within 9" of each other.
legend: Stamping a furiously belligerent beat, the shaman dares Gork himself to stomp the battlefield flat.

name: CRAWLY SWARM
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target friendly MURKVAST MENAGERIE units while they are wholly within 12" of a friendly MURKVAST MENAGERIE MONSTER that has not charged this turn.
legend: The beasts of the Murkvast Menagerie are riddled with parasites and other gnashing creepy crawlies.

name: GRIM DIET
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (5+).
legend: Having ridden out the mind-breaking shudders that stem from biting down on poisonous bog-bugs, this orruk is largely blind to pain.

name: SKINWRIGGLA LARVAE
description:
Declare: Pick an objective within 6" of this unit to be infested with bugs for the rest of the battle.

Effect: While an enemy unit is contesting an objective that is infested with bugs:
  • Subtract 3 from that unit’s control score.
  • Ignore positive modifiers to that unit’s control score.
legend: Taken from the marshes of Chitinia, these venomous and swiftly multiplying bugs will infest every nook and cranny they can.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: MORKISH MIST
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MURKVAST MENAGERIE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly MURKVAST MENAGERIE INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target has WARD (5+).
legend: Conjuring a slithering mist from rents in the earth, the shaman cloaks their advancing mobs.

name: PROPA GRISLY
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MURKVAST MENAGERIE MONSTER unit that has not used any RAMPAGE abilities this turn to use this ability. Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the Health characteristic of that MURKVAST MENAGERIE MONSTER. For each 6+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

After this ability has been resolved, this unit cannot use any other RAMPAGE abilities for the rest of the turn.
legend: Covered in grotesque insect swarms and trained to enact frightening carnage, the monsters of the Murkvast Menagerie leave a gory mess wherever they go.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: AFTER IT, LADZ!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MURKVAST MENAGERIE MONSTER unit that was not set up this turn to be the target.

Effect: The target can move up to 3". It can move into combat. If it was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.
legend: When Skumdrekk’s ladz set their sights on their prey, they do not let up.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: DA BLACK PIT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The shaman taps his staff on the ground. Forking out from that spot, and surging towards a nearby foe, the earth turns into a noisome quagmire that sucks victims below its surface to their doom.

name: CHOKING MIST
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: The shaman summons a cloud of corrosive vapour that scorches the lungs of any caught within it.

name: MORK’S KUNNIN’
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly KRULEBOYZ unit wholly within 12" of them, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to save rolls for the target.
legend: The shaman channels the raw power of Mork to imbue their allies with uncanny cunning so they might evade enemy blows.

name: KRULEBOYZ WAAAGH!
description:
Declare: Pick your general to use this ability, then pick another friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target.

Effect: Your general and the target have STRIKE-FIRST this phase.
legend: In typically Morky fashion, Kruleboyz wait until they have the enemy surrounded before calling a Waaagh! – and when they do, the enemy’s fate is usually sealed.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: EGOMANIAK
description: Effect: If any other friendly units are within your general’s combat range, before you allocate a damage point to your general, roll a dice. On a 4+, you must allocate that damage point to one of those units instead.
legend: This self-important boss is willing to use anyone to protect his own hide.

name: COVERED IN MUD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability.

Effect: In this battle, that unit is not visible to enemy models that are more than 12" away from it.
legend: After some ‘hard finkin’, a group of orruks decides to slather themselves in muck so they can sneak up on the unwitting enemy.
condition: Start of the First Battle Round

name: KUNNIN' PLAN
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general.

Effect: If that unit uses a RETREAT ability this turn, no mortal damage is inflicted on it and it can still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: This devious Killaboss likes to feign retreat to draw their prey into a deadly trap.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase

name: NOISY RACKET
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by enemy units in the first battle round.
legend: On the eve of battle, the Kruleboyz make sure the enemy receives no respite as their war drums and rattle-skulls ring out into the night.

name: MORK'S EYE PEBBLE
description: Effect: In the next shooting phase, friendly units have WARD (5+) while they are wholly within 12" of your general.
legend: When rubbed, this darkgrey rock produces a swirling bank of thick fog that protects the bearer and their allies from harm.
condition: Once Per Battle, Enemy Movement Phase

name: EYE-BITER ASH
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 1-4, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by that unit for the rest of the phase. On a 5+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by that unit for the rest of the battle.
legend: Stored in a heat-proof pouch, this strange ash never stops smouldering. The bearer can cast it at a foe, creating a cloud of blistering ash that blinds the targets and causes them terrible pain.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: VOIDSTONE ORB
description: Effect: That spell is unbound.
legend: This small, unassuming black globe contains the power to disrupt enemy spells.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>SPELL</ky> ability for a <ky>WIZARD</ky> within 30" of this unit

name: SPELL IN A BOTTLE
description: Effect: This unit can use a SUMMON ability from the manifestation lore you picked during army composition as if it had WIZARD (1). Instead of making a casting roll for that SUMMON ability, the casting roll is 7 and cannot be modified. That SUMMON ability cannot be unbound.
legend: The bearer pops the rune-stamped cork of this bottle and unleashes an arcane manifestation previously sealed up for safekeeping.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: KARST-BANA AETHER-POWERED COMBAT RIG
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (5+). In addition, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons.
legend: This pioneer is a firm believer that wealth is be wrested from the Mortal Realms at gunpoint or at the business end of an aether-powered hammer. This has led to a custom-built combat harness, commissioned to provide overwhelming strength and protection in equal measure.

name: CELESTIUM BURST GRENADE
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: Typically used by the Grundstok ‘black marines’, this specialised anti-ethereal weapon can nullify magical wards.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Shooting Phase

name: BLAZEBEARD AND SONS BAMBOOZLING FLAKGUN
description: Effect: Pick 1 dice in that charge roll. Then, make a bamboozling flak roll of D6. If the roll equals or exceeds the value on the dice, remove that dice from the charge roll.
legend: This large-barrelled, stumpy weapon fires a mishmash of workshop swarf coated in phosphor-laced aether-gold that produces a blinding, bewildering display when the trigger is pulled – highly effective for stopping an advancing enemy in their tracks.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>CHARGE</ky> ability for a unit within 12" of this unit

name: EMBERSTONE FLARE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly KHARADRON OVERLORDS unit that has FLY and is not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 9" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The bearer shoots a flare into the sky, signalling a skyvessel or a group of endrin-borne Kharadron to rapidly relocate.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: EXTRA RAPPEL ANCHORS
description: Effect: Friendly Grundstok Gunhaulers can transport up to 2 friendly KHARADRON OVERLORDS INFANTRY units instead of 1 and with a combined model count of up to 6 instead of 5 (see Battle Traits).
legend: The Grundstok Gunhaulers in this force have been fitted with extra ports to which privateers can tether themselves in order to hitch a ride in battle.

name: SPECIAL PROCUREMENT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-UNIQUE KHARADRON OVERLORDS HERO that does not have an artefact of power. The target can be in reserve.

Effect: Give that Hero 1 artefact of power from the ‘Inventions of the Sky-ports’ or the ‘Ingenious Innovations’.

Designer’s Note: This artefact of power is given to the unit during the deployment phase, not during army composition.
legend: The Endrineers Guild often charter expeditionary forces equipped with the most advanced inventions in the realms.

name: GRITTY FORTUNE-HUNTERS
description: Effect: Friendly Vongrim Harpoon Crew and Vongrim Salvagers units have WARD (6+) while they are contesting an objective.
legend: The Vongrim guilders in this expedition have almost depleted their current reserves of aether-gold. Their very existence depends on the success of this venture, and they’ll be damned if anyone tries to cheat them of their imminent windfall!

name: ENTRENCHED CREWS
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly Arkanaut Company units to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the battle round, if the target has not been set up this battle round and while it has not moved this turn, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of attacks that target that unit.
legend: The Arkanauts in this fleet are no strangers to ground-based combat. Once in position, they will make clever use of the terrain to stymie the attacks of the foe.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: SKYVESSEL COVER
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly KHARADRON OVERLORDS INFANTRY units that have not charged in the same turn while they are wholly within 6" of a friendly Arkanaut Ironclad or Arkanaut Frigate that has not charged in the same turn.
legend: With a mighty skyvessel floating above providing covering fire, Kharadron Overlords are much harder to target.

name: FLYING HIGH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKYVESSEL that is in a regiment from which no units have been deployed, then pick a number of units up to its Transport Capacity (see its warscroll) that are in its regiment.

Effect: Set up all of those units in reserve in the clouds. They have now been deployed.
legend: Often one skyvessel will hold back high above the battlefield, only to descend and deploy additional troops where and when they are most needed.

name: THE FLAGSHIP
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKYVESSEL to be the target. The target can be in reserve.

Effect: The target has the FLAGSHIP keyword for the rest of the battle. If the target does not have a Great Endrinwork, give the target 1 Great Endrinwork.

Designer’s Note: This Great Endrinwork is given to the unit during the deployment phase, not during army composition.
legend: Every fleet commander designates one of their vessels to be their flagship.

name: DESCEND FROM THE CLOUDS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKYVESSEL in the clouds to use this ability.

Effect: Set up that SKYVESSEL anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, set up all other units that were set up in the clouds with that SKYVESSEL wholly within 6" of it and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: As a skyvessel swoops down to the battlefield, its Kharadron passengers scramble to disembark and storm the enemy lines.

name: TRANSPORT SKYFARERS
description:
Effect: Pick a number of units up to that SKYVESSEL’s Transport Capacity (see its warscroll) that are wholly within 6" of it and not in combat to be the targets. Units that have been transported this turn cannot be targets.

Remove the targets from the battlefield. After the SKYVESSEL ends its move, you must set up each target unit on the battlefield, wholly within 6" of that SKYVESSEL and not in combat. Those units have been transported. A unit cannot use CHARGE abilities if it was transported in the same turn.
legend: The Kharadron rule the skies of the realms with fleets of fearsome airships crewed by hardened duardin.
condition: Your Movement Phase, Reaction: You declared a non-<ky>CHARGE MOVE</ky> ability for a friendly %000002931SKYVESSEL%

name: HEGSSON SOLUTIONS ’OLD RELIABLE’ HULLPLATES
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (5+) against damage inflicted by SHOOT abilities.
legend: These hull plates are renowned for their ability to absorb damage without failing.

name: VOIDSTONE REPULSER VENTS
description:
Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+:
  • Ignore the effect of that spell on that friendly unit.
  • Inflict D3 mortal damage on the caster.

This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but you can only roll once for each friendly unit per spell cast.
legend: Clouds of voidstone ground into a fine dust are released from these ports to nullify and deflect enemy spells.
condition: Reaction: A friendly unit within 12" of this unit was picked to be the target of an enemy <ky>SPELL</ky> ability

name: GRUKSSON WIDE-BORE CYLINDERS
description: Effect: Add 2" to this unit’s Move characteristic.
legend: This modified endrin guzzles fuel like Jakkob Bugmansson XI samples his stock, and is similarly energised for doing so.

name: BLAZEBEARD AND SONS EJECTOR POD
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat, pick a visible friendly KHARADRON OVERLORDS HERO wholly within 6" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield, then set it up again wholly within 18" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: This incredible device provides a potent fail-safe for any shrewd Kharadron leader. However after use, the warranty for the device is void, making subsequent uses a risk no sane Kharadron would ever take!
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: ZONBARCORP ’DEALBREAKER’ BATTLE RAM
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the unmodified charge roll. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: A vessel with this best-selling upgrade need not fear full-on collisions. The same cannot be said for those in its way, however.

name: COALBEARD’S COLLAPSIBLE BOMBRACK
description: Effect: Add 1 to each dice roll when using this unit’s ‘Heavy Bomb Racks’, ‘Medium Bomb Racks’ or ‘Light Bomb Racks’ ability.
legend: This munitions storage rig has a clever folding design that allows it to carry additional bombs.

name: TRACER-FIRE ROUNDS
description: Effect: If all of the attacks target the same enemy unit, ignore negative modifiers to hit rolls for those attacks.
legend: Imported Excelsian glimmerings have been worked into the casings of these rounds, causing them to subtly correct their trajectory to their target.
condition: Your Shooting Phase, Reaction: You declared a <ky>Shoot</ky> ability for this unit

name: GRANDIOSE FUSELAGE
description: Effect: Add 5 to this unit’s Control characteristic.
legend: Whether emblazoned with gaudy runic slogans advocating guild sponsors or bearing a particularly impressive figurehead, this vessel is doubly imposing to foes.

name: NULLSTONE GALVANISATION
description: Effect: Inflict D6 mortal damage on each enemy MANIFESTATION within this unit’s combat range.
legend: Thanks to metalwork treated with an anti-magic coating, arcane conjurations that linger in proximity to this ship are gradually undone.

name: AETHERIC NULLIFIER
description: Effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll equals or exceeds the banishment value listed on the MANIFESTATION’s warscroll, it is banished and removed from play. You cannot pick the same MANIFESTATION to be the target of this ability more than once per phase.
legend: This unassuming cylindrical tool is fashioned from a potent anti-magic alloy.
condition: Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>SHOOT</ky> or %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for a %000009952<ky>MANIFESTATION</ky>% within 9" of the bearer

name: TRANSPORT SKYFARERS
description:
Effect: Pick a number of units up to that SKYVESSEL’s Transport Capacity (see its warscroll) that are wholly within 6" of it to be the targets. Units that have been transported this turn cannot be targets.

Remove the targets from the battlefield. After the SKYVESSEL ends its move, you must set up each target unit on the battlefield, wholly within 6" of that SKYVESSEL and not in combat. Those units have been transported. A unit cannot use CHARGE abilities if it was transported in the same turn.
legend: The Kharadron rule the skies of the realms with fleets of fearsome airships crewed by hardened duardin.
condition: Reaction: You declared a non-<ky>CHARGE MOVE</ky> ability for a friendly %000002931SKYVESSEL%

name: ENTRENCHMENT EXPERT
description: Effect: That friendly unit has WARD (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: This hero prefers to engage their foes from heavy cover, keeping their own losses to a minimum.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009662All-out Defence%’ command for a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this <ky>HERO</ky>

name: GUN BUTT LOW BLOW
description: Effect: While a friendly EXPEDITIONARY FORCE INFANTRY unit is contesting an objective that you control, its melee weapons have Crit (Mortal).
legend: Grizzled veterans all, the Grundcorps are used to fighting dirty if it means getting what they want.

name: NO SAFE HAVEN
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit to be the target.

Effect: Subtract 1 from the control score of that unit for each damage point allocated to it this turn by a shooting attack made by a friendly EXPEDITIONARY FORCE unit, to a maximum of 10 damage points.
legend: The firepower of the Grundcorps pelts the ground so aggressively that no cover can protect their targets for long.

name: GRUDGEFIRE ROUNDS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly EXPEDITIONARY FORCE INFANTRY unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, pick 1 of the target’s ranged weapons. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that weapon for the rest of the phase.
legend: This ammunition bursts into white-hot flames when it hits its target.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: GUNHAULER ESCORT
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly KHARADRON OVERLORDS INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 6" of a friendly Grundstok Gunhauler.
legend: The threatening presence of a Grundstok Gunhauler overhead makes it difficult for enemies to focus their attacks on the Trailblazers’ ground forces.

name: RAPID RELOCATION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit with FLY to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units. The target cannot use CHARGE abilities this turn.
legend: The Gunhauler’s pilot assumes a high trajectory before looping around and rejoining the battle from a different direction.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: EMERGENCY FUEL INJECTION PODS
description: Effect: Your general has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn.
legend: By flicking a rune-embossed switch concealed in their suit, this Endrinmaster can give their equipment a boost just when they need it.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: PROPELLER DOWNDRAUGHT
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from charge rolls for enemy units while they are within 9" of a friendly Grundstok Gunhauler.
legend: The buffeting air currents kicked up by the Gunhauler as it flies low mean that nearby foes seeking to engage the Kharadron find themselves charging into a headwind.

name: CELESTIUM-BURST BOMBLETS
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: Long-standing trade agreements with Azyrheim have allowed the production of these munitions, which have a disruptive effect on supernatural defences.

name: PROSPECTOR AND PIONEER
description: Effect: Add 2 to your general’s control score.
legend: Whether they are a cranky taskmaster or a charismatic maverick, this general is a force of nature when it comes to staking new claims for their sky-port.

name: EXTRACTION FAIL-SAFES
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the number of damage points inflicted on this unit when it uses a RETREAT ability.
legend: This Endrinmaster has fitted their Dirigible Suit with non-essential components that can be jettisoned to distract a pursuing foe.

name: SHREWD OPPORTUNIST
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and up to 2 other friendly KHARADRON OVERLORDS non-HERO INFANTRY units to be the targets.

Effect: Each target can immediately use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: This duardin’s mind is as sharp as a gem cutter. They are quick to see openings and do not hesitate to seize upon them. Such a quality is, of course, highly conducive to profit!

name: BOLD AS BRASS
description: Effect: Add 5 to this unit’s control score.
legend: Whether their roared oaths ring louder than the summons to Musterpress or the sheer audacity of their actions speaks volumes, this officer is an imposing presence on the battlefield.

name: COMBAT GRAFTER
description: Effect: This unit can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, this unit has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the phase.
legend: Knuckling down and cracking skulls is what this officer does best.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: TERRITORIAL TRAILBLAZER
description: Effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: This stubborn and audacious duardin is surrounded by an almost tangible aura of defiance that makes enemies think twice about challenging them for control of resources.

name: INITIAL INVESTMENT
description: Effect: Each friendly AUTO-ENDRIN can move 2D6" but cannot finish that move in combat.
legend: Kharadron doctrine emphasises the importance of good reconaissance.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: THORGSSON’S UNIVERSAL AUTOMATON ACTUATOR
description: Effect: Add 6" to the Move characteristic of friendly AUTO-ENDRINS while they are wholly within 6" of this unit.
legend: This portable cartridge radiates an energy field that gives nearby Auto-Endrins that extra bit of spark and verve. No batteries necessary.

name: ROCKBUSTER CHARGES
description:
Declare: Pick a terrain feature that this unit passed across this turn. Each enemy unit within 1" of that terrain feature is a target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.
legend: Dropped from on high, these drill-tipped bomblets bore into the ground before detonating in shredding storms of rock and shrapnel.

name: AGGRESSIVE ACQUISITIONS
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any CODE abilities this turn and if there is a friendly PIONEER unit in each large quarter of the battlefield. Each of those units must be more than 6" from all other large quarters of the battlefield and not in combat.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, enemy units cannot be set up within your territory or within 9" of an objective that you control.
legend: In war and profit, leave no avenue for your enemies to progress.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: COPPER FINGERS
description: Effect: If this unit is wholly within 9" of that Zontari Endrin Dock, instead of resolving the effect of the ‘Endrinworks Outpost’ ability, set up a replacement AUTO-ENDRIN on the battlefield, wholly within 6" of that Zontari Endrin Dock and more than 3" from all enemy units.
legend: Though not a qualified member of the Endrineers Guild, this officer comes from a long line of tinkerers with an aptitude for aethermatics.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared the ‘Endrinworks Outpost’ ability for a %000016903Zontari Endrin Dock%

name: SECURE INVESTMENTS
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any CODE abilities this turn and if any enemy units that were within 3" of your Zontari Endrin Dock this turn were destroyed this turn.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, ignore the Rend characteristic of combat attacks that target friendly NON-INFANTRY PIONEER units or friendly faction terrain features.
legend: The wise profiteer ensures that their assets are well protected.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: SETTLING ACCOUNTS
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any CODE abilities this turn and if a friendly AUTO-ENDRIN was destroyed this turn by an enemy unit.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, each time a friendly AUTO-ENDRIN is removed from the battlefield, before removing it, inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit within 3" of that AUTO-ENDRIN.
legend: The artycles of engagement encourage the settling of one’s debts through the application of heavy explosives.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: MARKET DOMINANCE
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any CODE abilities this turn and if you control every objective that is not wholly within enemy territory.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, each time you use your Zontari Endrin Dock’s ‘Endrinworks Outpost’ ability, you can set up a replacement AUTO-ENDRIN on a manufacturing roll of 3+ instead of 4+.
legend: Even if you have secured an unassailable monopoly, it is vital to aggressively defend your interests.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: HOSTILE TAKEOVER
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any CODE abilities this turn and if an enemy HERO was destroyed by shooting attacks made by a friendly PIONEER unit this turn.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target friendly PIONEER units or friendly faction terrain features.
legend: The simplest route to profit is the elimination of one’s main rivals.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: ASSAULT BOAT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that was transported this turn to use this ability.

Effect: That unit can still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: The speed and manoeuvrability of the Arkanaut Frigate allows it to deliver Arkanaut Companies directly into the fray.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: MASTERWROUGHT ARMOUR
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (6+).
legend: This Admiral’s finely crafted suit of armour is the acme of the armourer’s art.

name: PLY THE SKIES
description:
Used By: The Arkanaut Frigate that is using that MOVE ability.

Effect: Pick a friendly INFANTRY unit that is wholly within the combat range of that Arkanaut Frigate and not in combat to be transported. Remove that INFANTRY unit from the battlefield. Then, when the Arkanaut Frigate ends its move, set up the INFANTRY unit on the battlefield again, wholly within the combat range of the Arkanaut Frigate and not in combat. A unit cannot use CHARGE abilities if it was transported in the same turn.
legend: The Kharadron rule the skies of the realms with fleets of fearsome airships crewed by hardened duardin.
condition: Reaction: You declared a non-<ky>CHARGE MOVE</ky> ability for an Arkanaut Frigate

name: THERE'S NO REWARD WITHOUT RISK
description: Effect: You can re-roll the charge roll for that CHARGE ability.
legend: Under the command of their Admiral, the crew close in on their prize without a moment’s hesitation.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared a <ky>CHARGE</ky> ability for a unit wholly within 12" of your general

name: DISENGAGE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Arkanaut Frigate to use this ability.

Effect: If that unit uses a RETREAT ability this phase, no mortal damage is inflicted on it and it can still use SHOOT abilities later in the turn.
legend: At an officer’s command, the vessel disengages with all guns blazing.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: FLASK OF VINTAGE GOROGNA
description: Effect: Heal (D6) your general.
legend: This rare duardin drink is said to be good for whatever ails you.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase

name: LEAVE NO DUARDIN BEHIND
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Arkanaut Company unit wholly within 12" of your general and roll a dice for each slain model from that unit.

Effect: For each 4+, you can return 1 slain model to that unit.
legend: With a rousing speech, the Admiral rallies his crew and steels their resolve.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: SPIRIT OF THE WHITE DWARF
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DUARDIN ASCENDANT PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly DUARDIN ASCENDANT unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: The target is unified until the start of your next turn. If the chanting roll was 8+, you can pick 2 targets instead of 1.
legend: When Grombrindal takes the field, even the most sceptical Kharadron cannot help but feel a flicker of divine awe.

name: VALAYAN HEARTH-BANNER
description:
Declare: Pick each friendly unified DUARDIN ASCENDANT unit on the battlefield to be the targets.

Effect: Heal (D3) each target.
legend: Wrought in the image of she who guards hold and hearth, this runic standard is a salve to even severe wounds - for those who believe.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: TIRELESS PURPOSE
description: Effect: Each time a friendly DUARDIN ASCENDANT INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the 'Normal Move' ability, add 2" to the distance that unit can move as part of that ability.
legend: This duardin lord shares Grombrindal's vision for their people, and their fervour is infectious.

name: DUARDRAZHAL
description: Effect: Friendly DUARDIN ASCENDANT units are unified while they are wholly within 12" of at least 1 FYRESLAYERS, 1 KHARADRON OVERLORDS and 1 CITIES OF SIGMAR DUARDIN unit.
legend: Grombrindal's goal is no less than the reunification of all the scattered, noble duardin nations.

name: OATH OF RESTORATION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DUARDIN ASCENDANT PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible objective within 18" of them that is contested by 2 or more friendly unified units to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, friendly DUARDIN ASCENDANT units have WARD (6+) while they have any
legend: All that which once belonged to the duardin will be theirs anew - so swear those who hold faith in Grombrindal.

name: 'AS THE ANCESTORS INTENDED!'
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unified DUARDIN ASCENDANT PRIEST to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to chanting rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: To stand with far-flung kin in hours of crisis bolsters every duardin preacher.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: 'PAH! NOW THIS IS A SHOT...'
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unified DUARDIN ASCENDANT INFANTRY unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s ranged weapons for the rest of the turn .
legend: Duardin gunners of every creed never miss an opportunity to show their superior craft before their kin.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: 'AS ONE, KINFOLK!'
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly unified DUARDIN ASCENDANT INFANTRY units to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the targets, to a maximum of 3.
legend: The children of the ancestor gods surge across the field as one mighty throng.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Charge Phase

name: 'SETTLE EVERY GRUDGE! KHAZUK!'
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unified DUARDIN ASCENDANT INFANTRY unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: When fighting as one, the duardin are a red-handed force of raw vengeance.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Comhat Phase

name: AERODYNAMISM
description: Effect: If this unit moved this turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Borne by state-of-the-art endrins, the speed and agility with which this duardin navigates the battlefield makes them a very difficult target.

name: MASTER OF DISCIPLINE
description: Effect: Each time a friendly MAGNATE’S CREW INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Redeploy’ command, you can re-roll the dice.
legend: This duardin is popular amongst their crews but also knows when to crack the whip and remind them who pays their wages.

name: LOYALTY TO THE MAGNATE
description: Effect: While a friendly Brokk Grungsson is wholly within the combat range of another friendly MAGNATE’S CREW INFANTRY unit, both those units have WARD (5+).
legend: Some call it loyalty; Brokk calls it ‘contractual motivation’.

name: GUNS FOR ALL OCCASIONS
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: This canny duardin always has a backup plan in the form of a cleverly stowed aetherblaster.

name: FLANKING FIRE
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for shooting attacks made by friendly MAGNATE’S CREW SKYVESSELS that target an enemy unit in combat with this unit.
legend: A master of tactics, this officer is an expert at orchestrating deadly crossfires, often boldly using themselves as the bait.

name: PAY YOUR DEBTS
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit on the battlefield or in reserve to be indebted.

Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly MAGNATE’S CREW units that target the indebted unit.
legend: Grungsson never forgets an insult and always settles the score with those who have done him wrong.

name: BOLD MOVES
description:
Declare: Pick any number of friendly MAGNATE’S CREW INFANTRY units that are in combat to be the targets. Make an emergency launch roll of 3D6 for each target.

Effect: Each target can move a distance up to the value of its emergency launch roll. It can move through the combat ranges of any enemy units but cannot end that move in combat with an enemy unit that it was not in combat with at the start of the phase.

The target(s) cannot use CHARGE abilities for the rest of the turn.
legend: Massive profits alone have not taken Brokk Grungsson to the apex of Kharadron society. His uncanny ability to take his foes off-guard has proven just as valuable.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: CUTTING-EDGE ENDRINPACKS
description:
Declare: Pick up to 2 friendly MAGNATE’S CREW INFANTRY units that are wholly within 9" of a friendly MAGNATE’S CREW SKYVESSEL to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, each target can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: The Lord-Magnate outfits his soldiers with the latest and most agile endrinharnesses.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: INVICTUNITE-LINED HULL
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGNATE’S CREW SKYVESSEL to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. For the rest of the turn, subtract X from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target that SKYVESSEL, where X is equal to the roll.
legend: Only the Lord-Magnate could afford to line his ships’ hulls with the incredibly strong meteoric metal invictunite.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: CONSTANT BARRAGE
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by a friendly MAGNATE’S CREW unit’s attacks to be the target.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time the target ends a move within 10" of any friendly MAGNATE’S CREW units, roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Brokk’s expert gunners are so precise that they can bombard the enemy even as they move to engage nearby Kharadron infantry.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: CYCLE MANIFESTATION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly AELEMENTIRI CONCLAVE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick 1 of the friendly MANIFESTATIONS below that is not on the battlefield, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
  • Sanctum of Amyntok
  • Hyshian Twinstones
  • Rune of Petrification

Effect: If there is already a friendly MANIFESTATION from the list above on the battlefield, it is immediately
legend: With a deft gesture, the caster dismisses one manifestation and uses its power to summon another.

name: VEXING SPIRITS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly AELEMENTIRI CONCLAVE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the target cannot use commands.
legend: Shifting shingle, stinging winds or sudden fog, minor spirits of the land band together to bedevil and harass the foe.

name: AELEMENTOR FOCUS
description:
Declare: Pick a terrain feature to be the target.

Effect: Measure the range and visibility of the next SPELL ability used by this unit from the target instead of from this unit.
legend: Whether a shard of igneous rock rendered glittering by the weight of a soaring peak, a simple whistle that plays notes pleasing to mischievous air spirits, or a perfectly smooth pebble crafted by the millennia-long caress of a crystal rapid, this object acts as a more direct channel of communion with the spirits of the land.

name: WORLD-MAGE
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for each unique rune depicted on your battle scripture.
legend: While they have dedicated themselves to one of the elements, this mage has meditated long on the Hysh-Mhensa as a whole, unlocking truths that allow them to draw power from all aspects of the World Rune.

name: WORLD RUNES
description:
Effect: Add 1 Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain to your library for each friendly ALARITH unit on the battlefield.

Add 1 Oreali, Rune of the Wind to your library for each friendly HURAKAN unit on the battlefield.

Add 1 Ydriliqi, Rune of the River to your library for each friendly YDRILAN unit on the battlefield.

You can have a maximum of 6 of each type of rune in your library.
legend: The aelementiri are particularly sensitive to the runes of the core elements that constitute the Hysh-Mhensa, for these sigils represent the natural forces to which they have dedicated their lives.

name: DEPICT RUNE
description:
Declare: You must use this ability.

Effect: Remove all runes from your battle scripture. Then, pick any number of runes to remove from your library and depict them on your battle scripture. Runes removed from your library in this way are removed for the rest of the battle.

Designer’s Note: Runes are used to activate powerful abilities on your units’ warscrolls.
legend: Channelling the power of their temple’s runes, the aelementiri bring their extraordinary powers to bear against the foe.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: ENTREAT SPIRITS
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if you have 3 or more runes in your library. Pick a friendly non-UNIQUE MONSTER unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Remove any 3 runes from your library. Then, set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 6" of a terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units. Allocate 6 damage points to the replacement unit (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Even should an aelementor’s war-form be vanquished, the spirit itself is not so easily undone. Amidst its natural environment, the combined power of multiple runes of the land can call it back to battle, seeing it return to inhabit the sacred armour that was forged for it.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: THE REALMS FIGHT BACK
description:
Declare: Pick a terrain feature. Then, pick an enemy unit within 6" of that terrain feature to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3 and apply the corresponding effect for the rest of the turn.

1. Eruption of Earth: Inflict 3 mortal damage on the target.
2. Howling Winds: Subtract 5 from the target’s control score.
3. Flash Flood: The target has STRIKE-LAST.
legend: The spirits of the land itself awaken to aid the Lumineth in their struggle against the powers of ruin.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: PHOENIX STONE
description: Effect: The first time this unit would be destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on it have no effect. Then, Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: This ancient crystal, at once hot and cold to the touch, shatters just as the bearer’s anima is about to flee their body, releasing swirling flames that reknit flesh rather than burn, granting the bearer a precious second chance to fulfil their destiny.

name: SILVER WAND
description: Effect: If this unit is non-NOT A WIZARD, it can use the ‘Unbind’ ability as if it had WIZARD (1). Otherwise, add 1 to casting rolls for this unit.
legend: This slender wand, unassuming in its delicate grace and simplicity, is covered with finely engraved, winding Lumineth runes. It is imbued with the quiet dignity of the one who crafted it, a power that can be channelled by the bearer to dispel wild outbursts of enemy magics and focus their own spellweaving.

name: WAYSTONE
description: Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within friendly territory and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: This small sliver of dark rock hovers above the bearer’s outstretched palm, leading them along hidden paths towards that which they desire. Its use requires exceptional discipline or stillness of the mind, for what one thinks one desires is ever elusive – often perilously so.

name: STRIKE AS ONE
description: Effect: When players are alternating picking units to use a FIGHT ability, when it is your turn to pick a unit, you can pick 2 friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS units instead of 1. Resolve the second FIGHT ability immediately after the first.
legend: Symmetry is fundamental to aelven nature and culture. These warriors exemplify the concept, fighting in awe-inspiring synchrony.

name: ANCIENT SPIRITS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS MONSTER to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to each visible friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS unit in each phase while it is wholly within 12" of the target.
legend: The aelementor spirits that accompany this host are venerable indeed. They have weathered the march of aeons; they will not yield to the petty aggression of short-lived mortals.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: TRICK OF THE LIGHT
description: Effect: Friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS units can use the ‘Power Through’ command even if they have not charged this turn.
legend: These Lumineth have journeyed to the far reaches of Hysh. The wild magic of that region has found purchase in them, occasionally surrounding them with prismatic distortions and mirages that confuse nearby foes as to their precise location.

name: ARCANE FOCUS
description: Effect: SPELL abilities from the Lore of Hysh or the Lore of the Awakened Realms used by friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARDS have the UNLIMITED keyword. However, you cannot pick the same unit to be the target of the same SPELL ability in the same turn.
legend: The Scinari mages in this host have collectively dedicated their lives to studying the magics of the realms.

name: DEPICT RUNE
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following runes to depict on your battle scripture. The effect and conditional enhanced effects of that rune last for the rest of the battle round. Each rune remains on your battle scripture for the rest of the battle or until it is removed or replaced by another ability.

$000002337$000002338$000002339$000002340$000002341
Designer’s Note: We recommend noting the runes you have inscribed in each battle round on a piece of paper to keep track of which are currently depicted on your battle scripture. Feel free to note them by type (Strength, River, Mountain etc.), by initial (each has a different first letter) or, if you are feeling particularly adventurous, you can try your hand at aelven calligraphy and learn to draw each rune!
legend: The Lumineth magically inscribe runes of power into the lands themselves to enhance their armies and heal the realms of Chaos corruption.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: ARCANE PROWESS
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for your general.
legend: The Cathallar of this Glittering Phalanx keeps a hidden reserve of aetherquartz to bolster their sorcery in battle.

name: FACETS OF WAR
description: Effect: You must use this ability at the start of the battle round. Pick 1 FACET OF WAR ability. That FACET OF WAR ability can be used this battle round but the other two cannot.
legend: The arts of war practised by the Lumineth are subtle, precise and devastating.
condition: Once Per Battle Round, Start of Battle Round

name: WAYSTONE
description: Effect: Remove your general from the battlefield and set them up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: This sliver of dark rock illuminates hidden paths around the bearer in stark relief.

name: HEIGHTENED REFLEXES
description: Effect: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly units that use a FIGHT ability immediately after another friendly unit because of the ‘Lightning Reactions’ ability, until the end of the phase.
legend: The keen senses of these warriors are second to none.

name: SHINING COMPANY
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls that target friendly units.
legend: Numinous light shines from this aelven formation, bedazzling the foe.

name: PROTECTION OF HYSH
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 7+, the target has WARD (5+) until the start of your next turn.
legend: The caster opens their arms wide, creating a field of glowing energy that protects all of the caster’s allies that are nearby.

name: SPEED OF HYSH
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of your general, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 5+, double the Move characteristic of that unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Cathallar magically empowers their allies to move with light’s swiftness.

name: POWER OF HYSH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, until the start of your next turn, attacks made by that unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
legend: Vanari can use their innate arcane abilities to empower their sunmetal weapons.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: LIGHTNING REACTIONS
description: Effect: When players are alternating picking units to use a FIGHT ability, when it is your turn to pick a unit, you can pick 2 units instead of 1. Resolve the second FIGHT ability immediately after the first.
legend: Lumineth possess a natural alacrity beyond that of most rivals.

name: OVERWHELMING HEAT
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 24" of your general, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 7+, halve the Move characteristic of that unit until the start of your next turn and roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds that unit’s Save characteristic, inflict D3 mortal damage on it.
legend: The Cathallar summons oppressive heat to sap their foes’ strength.

name: MASTERFUL TACTICIAN
description: Effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.
legend: This shrewd commander has a crystal-clear understanding of the flow of battle, knowing precisely when to direct their warriors to bolster a weak point in their line or exploit one in that of the enemy.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009837Redeploy%’ command for a %000010532visible% friendly <ky>LUMINETH REALM-LORDS</ky> unit wholly within 12" of this unit

name: FLAWLESS COMMANDER
description: Effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Under this aelf’s command, the serried ranks of the Lumineth advance in a perfect march.

name: ACOLYTE OF THE RUNES
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS HERO wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: That HERO can be picked as an additional target the next time you use the ‘Depict Rune’ ability.
legend: This aelf regularly meditates upon the aelven runic scripture. Over time, they have become particularly sensitive to the sigils’ power.

name: AETHERQUARTZ REQUISITIONER
description: Effect: Add 3 to the casting roll for that spell.
legend: This aelf keeps an emergency supply of aetherquartz that can be used to enhance a critical spell.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared a <ky>SPELL</ky> ability for a %000003368LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD% within this unit’s %000009665combat range%

name: FLAWLESS COMMANDER
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 visible friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS INFANTRY units wholly within 18" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Each target can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: This aelf has dedicated their life to mastering battlefield manoeuvres. Infantry formations that march under their banner operate in perfect unison, swiftly making way for each other and allowing them to advance with awe-inspiring discipline.

name: MARTIAL PERFECTIONIST
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit that is damaged or that had any models slain this turn to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS INFANTRY units that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: This aelf expects their warriors to commit fully to each and every task; they will accept no half measures.

name: STORM BREWING
description:
Declare: Pick a battlefield edge to be the target.

Effect: That battlefield edge is leeward. For the rest of the battle, each time a friendly RIDE THE HURRICANE ability is used, after that ability has been resolved, change the leeward battlefield edge to the next edge clockwise.

name: ROARING HEADWIND
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, each time the target uses a MOVE ability, it must end that move closer to the leeward battlefield edge.
legend: The Hurakan call on the greater spirits of the wind to deliver one great gust to push back the enemy.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: SCATTERED TO THE WINDS
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the control scores of enemy units within 6" of your general for each friendly RIDE THE HURRICANE ability used this battle round.
legend: The strong winds that accompany the Windmage throw their enemies to the side to disorientate them.

name: PULLED BY WINDS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat to be the target.

Effect: The target can move D6" but must end that move closer to the leeward battlefield edge. It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.
legend: The Hurakan allow themselves to be pulled by the winds to more tactical locations.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: LIFTED DRBRIS
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that is closer to the leeward battlefield edge than the large terrain feature within friendly territory to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the current battle round number. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The lesser spirits of the wind aid the battle by lifting chunks of debris and hurling them towards the enemy.

name: TEMPLE GUARDIANS
description: Effect: While any friendly INFANTRY units are within your general’s combat range, both your general and those INFANTRY units have WARD (5+).
legend: This Windmage has been assigned a dedicated Vanari bodyguard.

name: GALE FORCE
description:
Used By: The unit using that ATTACK ability.

Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made as part of that ATTACK ability if the target of that ability is closer to the leeward battlefield edge than the unit using this ability.
legend: Aligning their attacks with the direction of the wind allows the Hurakan to strike with deadlier force.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared an <ky>ATTACK</ky> ability

name: WIND WHISPERER
description:
Declare: Pick a battlefield edge to be the target.

Effect: Change the leeward battlefield edge to the target battlefield edge.
legend: Hurakan Windmages have the greatest connection to the wind spirits, able to call on their aid to shift the weather to their advantage.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: CURVED SHOTS
description: Effect: You can measure the range and visibility of your general’s shooting attacks from any point on the leeward battlefield edge.
legend: Hurakan Windmages are trained in using the winds to launch attacks along bewildering and unexpected trajectories.

name: SUMMON HYSHIAN TWINSTONES
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Hyshian Twinstones endless spell on the battlefield, pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Hyshian Twinstones endless spell wholly within 18" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The caster calls forth two giant crystal teardrops that orbit around each other.

name: SUMMON RUNE OF PETRIFICATION
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Rune of Petrification on the battlefield, pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Rune of Petrification wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.
legend: The caster conjures a hovering sigil formed from the very crust of the realm.

name: SUMMON SANCTUM OF AMYNTOK
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Sanctum of Amyntok on the battlefield, pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Sanctum of Amyntok wholly within 12" of the caster and more than 3" from all enemy units. A Sanctum of Amyntok has 3 parts that must be set up touching each other so that they form a ring.
legend: Triple manifestations of the rune Yngra form a protective barrier around the summoner.

name: BEACON OF HYSH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly non-MONSTER LUMINETH REALM-LORDS unit wholly with 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, if the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets that friendly unit is 1-3, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: The caster imbues allies with an aura of brilliance that blinds their opponents.

name: FOCUSED EROSION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of the target’s weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: The caster calls upon nearby spirits of wind, water and stone, which work together to assail the weapons of the foe in a sentient storm that dulls blades and spoils ammunition.

name: BEAM OF HYSH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this ability this battle round to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6. Add 1 to the casting value of this spell for each time it has been cast by a friendly WIZARD this turn.

Effect: Inflict D3+X mortal damage on the target, where X is the number of times, to a maximum of 3, that this spell has previously been cast by a friendly WIZARD this turn.
legend: Tracing the rune of Varinor in the air, the caster looses a brilliant lance of searing light.

name: OVERWHELMING HEAT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Halve the target’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn, then roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Save characteristic, inflict D3 mortal damage on it.
legend: The caster summons the searing light and oppressive heat of the Hyshian deserts to sap their foes’ strength and inflict them with crippling thirst.

name: ELEMENTAL PUSH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS unit wholly within 12" of them that was not set up this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6. Subtract 1 from the roll if the target is in combat.

Effect: The target can move up to 5". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.
legend: Carried upon a shifting patch of earth or sped by a benevolent zephyr, a group of Lumineth are carried to a more advantageous position by the spirits of the land.

name: UNSEEN FORCE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target cannot use RUN abilities. In addition, if that enemy unit has already been picked to be the target of this ability this battle round, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s combat attacks.
legend: Focusing on the balance of the cosmos, the caster turns the foe’s own aggression against them, channelling an invisible barrier to hold back their advance.

name: PIERCING REFRACTION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The caster looses a thin, burning ray of light that leaps between a group of foes in a dazzling series of perfectly straight beams, scorching minute holes through them that can prove instantly lethal.

name: REALMSHIELD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS units have WARD (5+) while they are wholly within 12" of the caster.
legend: Whether buffeting air spirits that hinder incoming attacks or minor earth aelementors that move to obstruct the Lumineth’s foes, the land around the caster is stirred to provide protection to the aelves.

name: BEACONS OF PROTECTION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, ignore the first damage point allocated to friendly non-MONSTER LUMINETH REALM-LORDS units each phase while they are wholly within 9" of a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD. Add 3" to the range for each additional time this spell has been successfully cast by a friendly WIZARD
legend: Glowing with inner light, the Lumineth’s spellcasters envelop themselves and nearby allies in a radiant shield.

name: REWARDS OF VALOUR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-UNIQUE VANARI HERO that does not have an artefact of power to be the target.

Effect: Give the target 1 artefact of power from the ’Vanari Paragons’ Army of Renown rules.

Designer’s Note: This artefact of power is given to the HERO during the deployment phase, not during army composition.
legend: Recognising excellence is a core precept among the ranks of the Vanari. Their finest are often rewarded with powerful heirlooms in recognition of their deeds.

name: SWIFTFEATHER TALISMAN
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn.
legend: This delicate talisman, in the form of a feather engraved with the rune Senlui, can instil sudden swiftness and lightness of step in the bearer or their chosen companions.

name: MASTER DUELLIST
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+:
  • If the target has an artefact of power, it no longer has that artefact of power.
  • The target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Not only is this warrior a paragon of single combat, landing multiple strikes before their opponent even has a chance to respond, but they have also studied an ancient technique of arcane unforging that robs the foe’s magical artefacts of their power.

name: LABOUR OF CONTROL
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if there is at least 1 different friendly unit within 6" of each battlefield edge.

Effect: Add 1 to the number of labours you have completed. For the rest of the battle, add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS units.
legend: As proof of their mastery of battle, the Vanari task themselves with dominating all corners of the battlefield.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn

name: NULLSTONE BEADS
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Unbind’ ability as if it had WIZARD (1).
legend: These beads, each graven with the rune Danoi, are cold to the touch, and the owner risks drifting into a deep slumber should they wear them for too long. However, they possess powerful anti-magic properties and can cause enemy spells to wither and dissipate when brandished with purpose.

name: PHOENIX BLADE
description: Effect: This unit’s combat attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
legend: This blade is imbued with a portion of the Lord Phoenix’s incandescent power; those who feel its bite have the potential to suddenly ignite in purifying flames.

name: LABOUR OF MIGHT
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if 3 or more enemy units have been destroyed this battle.

Effect: Add 1 to the number of labours you have completed. For the rest of the battle, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS units.
legend: The Vanari vow to vanquish those who threaten the sanctity of the realms.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn

name: LABOUR OF PRECISION
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if there are no enemy units with an artefact of power on the battlefield.

Effect: Add 1 to the number of labours you have completed. For the rest of the battle, add 10 to the control scores of friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS units.
legend: The Vanari seek to deliver a series of perfect strikes to unravel the cohesion of the foe, eliminating their commanders with precision and decisiveness.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn

name: BLESSING OF TYRION
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have completed 3 labours.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS units have WARD (5+).
legend: Those who uphold the Decree Tyrionic and the values of the Lord Phoenix shine with a radiant glory that repels evil.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn

name: THE WITHERSTAVE
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Carved from the heartwood of a tormented Treelord, the Witherstave thrums with a soured mockery of the Sylvaneth spirit-song. Those that hear it feel a terrible weakness shiver their limbs as a jarring dirge of despair clouds their minds.

name: THE CARRION DIRGE
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units within 18" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Subtract 5 from each target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
