legend: When blown, this filth-encrusted horn shrieks with the tongues of seven hundred and seventy-seven carrion crows. Those outside Nurgle’s favour who hear it are struck with a deep despondency. Why stand defiant? Why seek victory? Why do anything at all?
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase

name: RUSTFANG
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO or MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Subtract 1 from save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: Rustfang is a cursed battleaxe whose blade crawls with a thick layer of sentient corrosion. The slightest touch of this blade spreads its blight, chewing away the foe’s defences in moments.

name: VECTORS OF CONTAGION
description: Effect: Add 5 to the control scores of friendly non-HERO ROTBRINGERS units while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE DAEMON units.
legend: These Nurglites are empowered by the presence of plague daemons.

name: FILTH-LADEN DAEMONIC BLOOMS
description: Effect: Each time you make a run roll for a friendly non-MONSTER MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE DAEMON unit, you can change that roll to a 4.
legend: Nurgle’s influence has spread far and wide, invigorating his daemonic followers.

name: DENIZENS OF THE GARDEN
description: Effect: Companion weapons used by friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE units have Crit (2 Hits).
legend: The beasts that dwell deep in Nurgle’s Garden carry the most virulent diseases.

name: PLAGUE PROGENITOR
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit on the battlefield to be the plague progenitor for the rest of the battle. You cannot pick a MANIFESTATION or terrain feature.

Effect: Roll 2D3. On a 6, or if the roll equals or exceeds the plague progenitor’s Health characteristic, it has the DISEASED keyword.

In the first battle round, if an ability would heal or return any slain models to a DISEASED plague progenitor, that ability does not heal any damage points or return any slain models to it.

Each time the plague progenitor is picked to be the target of the ’Spread’ effect of the ‘
legend: Simply to be in the presence of this unwitting pathogen incubator is to see one’s body ravaged by disease.

name: BLIGHTED REGROWTH
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if there are no friendly Feculent Gnarlmaws on the battlefield.

Effect: Set up a Feculent Gnarlmaw on the battlefield wholly within 12" of an objective you control and more than 3" from all enemy units, objectives and other terrain features.
legend: Feculent Gnarlmaws burst forth from contaminated lands like pus from a rotting wound.

name: BLESSED BY THE PLAGUEFATHER
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects:

Infect: Pick an enemy unit within 7" of any friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE units to be the target. You cannot pick a MANIFESTATION or terrain feature.
  • If the target is in combat with any friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE units, it has the DISEASED keyword.
  • If the target is not in combat with any friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE units, roll a dice. On a 4+, the target has the DISEASED keyword.

Spread: Pick a DISEAS
legend: Every Maggotkin is a walking vector of disease, a willing incubator for maladies that ravage the body and spirit with horrific virulence.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: WRACKED WITH DISEASE
description:
Declare: Pick each DISEASED enemy unit to be the targets.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.
legend: The Maggotkin wage war with weeping wounds and pustulant boils as well as with rusted weapons.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: CEASELESS INFECTORS
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that was in combat with a friendly ROTBRINGERS unit that was destroyed this turn to be the target. You cannot pick a MANIFESTATION or terrain feature.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has the DISEASED keyword.
legend: Upon their deaths, Rotbringers’ bodies will purge their ‘gifts’, infecting those nearby and ensuring the continued propagation of Nurgle’s diseases.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: BURST PUSTULES
description: Effect: Each time a DISEASED enemy unit is destroyed, before the last model in the unit is removed from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, pick another enemy unit within 9" of that model to be the target. You cannot pick a MANIFESTATION or terrain feature. The target has the DISEASED keyword.
legend: As blighted flesh is pierced and hewn, quivering boils erupt, showering all with Nurgle’s glistening gifts.

name: DESPERATE REMEDIES
description: Effect: If an ability would heal or return slain models to a DISEASED enemy unit, that ability does not heal or return any slain models to it. Instead, it no longer has the DISEASED keyword.
legend: When fighters are afflicted with the plagues of Nurgle, all efforts must be made to stem the spread of those diseases.

name: SUMMONER OF PLAGUEBEARERS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Plaguebearers unit wholly within 14" of your general.

Effect: Return 1 slain model to that unit.
legend: Channelling a link to the Realm of Chaos, the Spoilpox Scrivener brings forth more minions.

name: LOCUS OF FECUNDITY
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit.

Effect: Heal (D3) that unit.
legend: Nurgle bestows a blessing of bountiful regrowth upon his children.
condition: Once Per Phase, Your Hero Phase

name: DAEMONIC SUMMONING
description: Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: The scions of Nurgle enter the battlefield through rifts torn in reality.

name: INFESTED WITH WONDERS
description: Effect: Each time a friendly model is slain, before it is removed from play, you can pick an enemy unit within 1" of it and roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit.
legend: These foul warriors invite the most horrific and repulsive diseases into their flesh, and they cannot wait to share them.

name: DISEASED
description: Effect: Each time an attack made by a friendly model scores a critical hit, you receive 1 disease point, to a maximum of 7.
legend: Each of the Maggotkin is a walking vector of diseases that ravage both body and spirit.

name: PESTILENT BREATH
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 7" of your general and roll a dice for each model in that unit.

Effect: For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit.
legend: This Spoilpox Scrivener has breath so foul that it can stun a full-grown rhinox.

name: GARDENER OF NURGLE
description:
Declare: If your general is contesting an objective not contested by any enemy models, roll a dice.

Effect: On a 3+, that objective is considered by you to be desecrated. Friendly units have WARD (4+) while they are contesting a desecrated objective. If your opponent gains control of a desecrated objective, it is no longer desecrated.
legend: This daemon seeks to expand the borders of Nurgle’s Garden.

name: NURGLE'S EMBRACE
description: Effect: Spend any number of your disease points. For each disease point you spend, pick an enemy unit that is in combat with any of your units and roll a dice. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit (you can pick the same unit more than once).
legend: The Grandfather’s generosity proves overwhelming for many…

name: GIFT OF FEBRILE FRENZY
description: Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 7" of your general.
legend: A reeking miasma rises around the daemon Herald that drives nearby followers into a wild delirium.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: NUMBERLESS PESTS
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly units.
legend: The Nurglites are obscured by flies.

name: CORRUPTION OF THE LAND
description:
Declare: Pick a terrain feature, then roll a dice for each enemy unit within 3" of that terrain feature.

Effect: On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.
legend: The mere presence of Nurgle’s followers sees the land defiled.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn

name: UNNATURAL VITALITY
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (4+).
legend: Disease may have ravaged this mage’s form, but somehow they never seem to succumb to it.

name: NAUSEOUS REVULSION
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from charge rolls for enemy units.
legend: These revolting warriors are too hideous to gaze upon for too long.

name: PUTREFIED GROUND
description:
Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • Subtract 1 from the Move characteristic of enemy units.
  • Subtract 1 from run rolls for enemy units.
legend: The earth bubbles and liquefies beneath the enemy’s feet.
condition: Once Per Battle, Enemy Hero Phase

name: GASEOUS EMANATION
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within your general’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The sorcerer releases a vile cloud of gas that chokes their enemies.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: PLAGUE OF MISERY
description: Effect: While enemy units are within 6" of any friendly units, they cannot use abilities that heal or return slain models to a unit.
legend: A pall of despair covers the battlefield.

name: SUBCUTANEOUS SUPPURATION
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target your general.
legend: The sheer abundance of pus beneath the sorcerer’s skin acts as another layer of armour.

name: BURGEONING FILTH
description: Effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with any friendly units.
legend: Nurgle’s followers grow bolder as their infestations multiply.

name: OVERRIPE DEATH'S HEADS
description:
Declare: If your general is not in combat, pick a visible enemy unit within 7" of them to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: After carefully weighing a death’s head in their palm, the bearer hurls it at a nearby foe.

name: EPIDERMAL CRUSTITIS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CYCLE OF CORRUPTION WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of melee weapons used for attacks that target the caster.
legend: The caster grins widely as their skin hardens into a crusty layer.

name: BACTERIAL BLESSING
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CYCLE OF CORRUPTION PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly CYCLE OF CORRUPTION unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks. If the chanting roll was 7+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.
legend: The priest blesses their comrades’ weapons with colonies of bacteria.

name: UTTERLY DISGUSTING
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit.
legend: The sight of this hero’s hideously mutated body is truly nauseating.

name: REVOLUTION AND REVULSION
description:
Declare: You must use this ability at the start of each battle round.

Effect: If it is the first battle round, roll a dice to determine which CYCLE ability is ripe for the rest of the battle round.

1 ‘Unnatural Vitality’
2 ‘Fecund Vigour’
3 ‘Burgeoning Filth’
4 ‘Plague of Misery’
5 ‘Nauseous Revulsion’
6 ‘Rampant Disease’
7 ‘Corrupted Regrowth’

If it is not the first battle round, the next CYCLE ability in the sequence is ripe for the rest of the battle round. If the 'Corrupted Regrowth' ability was ripe last battle round, the 'Unnatural Vitality' ability is ripe this battle round.

You can only use a CYCLE ability if it is ripe. Only 1 CYCLE ability is ripe each battle round.
legend: Nurgle’s power and blessings follow a never-ending cycle of fecundity and decay.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: CANKEROUS NAIL
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons.
legend: This nail has been dipped in Nurgle’s cauldron and seethes with corruption.

name: EVER TURNING
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CYCLE OF CORRUPTION PRIEST to chant this prayer, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: The next CYCLE ability in the sequence is ripe for the rest of the battle round instead of the current CYCLE ability. If the chanting roll was 12+, you can pick which CYCLE ability is ripe.
legend: The priest beseeches Nurgle to bestow his gifts upon his Rotbringer followers.

name: RANK AND VILE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CYCLE OF CORRUPTION WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy INFANTRY unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time a model in the target unit is slain, after removing it from the battlefield, roll a dice. On a 4+, return 1 slain model to a friendly non-HERO CYCLE OF
legend: Slain foes are festooned with disease only to rise again amidst the Nurglite ranks.

name: UNNATURAL VITALITY
description: Effect: Friendly non-MONSTER CYCLE OF CORRUPTION HEROES have WARD (4+).

name: VIRULENT AGONIES
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CYCLE OF CORRUPTION PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. Then, inflict 1 mortal damage on each other enemy unit within the target’s combat range. If the chanting roll was 7+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target instead of 1.
legend: The priest calls forth a painful, nerve-burning malady to blight their foes.

name: SPITTLEDRAIN
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CYCLE OF CORRUPTION WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from the target’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn. Then, roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target, to a maximum of 7.
legend: The wizard coughs up a expanding wad of corrosive phlegm to spit at the foe.

name: FECUND VIGOUR
description: Effect: Heal (D3) each friendly CYCLE OF CORRUPTION unit.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: BURGEONING FILTH
description: Effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with any friendly CYCLE OF CORRUPTION units.

name: PLAGUE OF MISERY
description: Effect: While enemy units are within 12" of any friendly CYCLE OF CORRUPTION units, they cannot use abilities that heal or return slain models to a unit.

name: NAUSEOUS REVULSION
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from charge rolls for enemy units.

name: RAMPANT DISEASE
description: Effect: Melee weapons used by friendly non-HERO CYCLE OF CORRUPTION units have Crit (2 Hits).

name: CORRUPTED REGROWTH
description:
Effect: Heal (7) each friendly Feculent Gnarlmaw.

If there are no friendly Feculent Gnarlmaws on the battlefield, you can set up a Feculent Gnarlmaw on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units and more than 3" from all objectives and other terrain features.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: LIVING PLAGUE
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: The target has the DISEASED keyword.
legend: As this hero slams into the foe, they spread Nurgle’s potent gifts of contagion.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: GRANDFATHER’S BLESSING
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat with a DISEASED enemy unit, Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: This mighty Nurglite is so diseased that they are rejuvenated by decay and plague.

name: GIFT OF FEBRILE FRENZY
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly non-HERO MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE unit that is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: This general can invigorate their usually sluggish minions by releasing a fever upon them that drives them into a wild delirium.

name: UNCTUOUS PREACHER
description: Effect: If this unit is not a PRIEST, it has PRIEST (1). If this unit is already a PRIEST, add 1 to chanting rolls for this unit.
legend: Even this hero’s brethren consider them to be far too enthusiastic in their preachings of Grandfather Nurgle’s blessings.

name: CORPULENT AVALANCHE
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to this unit’s Move characteristic. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

If any damage points were allocated to the target by this ability, this unit can move 2D3". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but must end that move in combat with the units it was already in combat with at the start of the move.
legend: As this hulk’s momentum builds, its bulk becomes nothing less than a blubbery, pus-filled battering ram.

name: OVERPOWERING STENCH
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: You and your opponent must roll off. If your roll is higher, pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the turn:
  • Ignore positive modifiers to save rolls for the target.
  • Subtract 1 from ward rolls for the target.
legend: This general exudes an odour so wretched that even Nurgle’s daemons cannot adequately describe it. Enemies recoil, choking on their own vomit at the slightest whiff, rendered speechless as their senses are overwhelmed.

name: INFECTIOUS SURGE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn. In addition, if the chanting roll was 6+, for the rest of the turn, the target can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn.
legend: As the power of Nurgle waxes, his followers gain the momentum of a spreading pandemic.

name: GIFT OF DISEASE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE PRIEST to chant this prayer, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are in combat with the chanter. In addition, if the chanting roll was 10+, each enemy unit in combat with the chanter, excluding MANIFESTATIONS and terrain features, has the DISEASED keyword.
legend: The priest licks an oozing sore, savouring the tangy flavour of a ripe contagion, before coughing a phlegmy litany that wreathes them and their allies in a pain-inuring ague.

name: AGONISING VOMITING
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Roll 7 dice. If the chanting roll was 6+, add 2 to each roll. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Presaged by a deep rumble within their distended guts, the priest belches forth a deluge of thick, corrosive vomit.

name: FAVOURED POXES
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of the chanter to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 2 from charge rolls for the target. If the chanting roll was 10+, until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1, instead.
legend: With an overwide grin, the priest generously anoints some unwilling victims with a slew of debilitating contagions.

name: BLOATED WITH SICKNESS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly non-MONSTER MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE unit wholly within 12" of the chanter to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to the target in each phase. If the chanting roll was 10+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a
legend: The priest hawks a glob of green-black mucus into their palm, leaving fat, writhing parasites in their grasp. With a swift clench of their fist, they grant their followers a putrefying resilience.

name: FROTHING MUCUS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, the Charge (+1 Damage) weapon ability has no effect on combat attacks that target the target. If the chanting roll was 6+, weapon abilities other than the Companion weapon ability have no effect instead.
legend: The priest blesses their kin with a rancid layer of protective slime.

name: FLESHY ABUNDANCE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Heal (D3) the target.
  • Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target that friendly unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: The sorcerer generously bestows a growth spurt of the most repulsive kind upon their allies, causing their bodies to bloat with great wobbling mounds of grey-green fat.

name: CRIPPLING DESPAIR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: With a sweep of their hand, the sorcerer imbues upon their victim with an overwhelming sense of hopelessness that renders them oblivious to their surroundings.

name: CLOYING QUAGMIRE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • Halve the target’s Move characteristic.
  • If the target’s Save characteristic is 3+ or better, subtract 1 from run rolls and charge rolls for the target.
legend: The sorcerer thrusts their hands into the soil, causing the ground beneath their enemies to putrefy into a sucking, grasping quagmire.

name: STINKING SPORESEED
description: Effect: Set up a Feculent Gnarlmaw within 3" of this unit and more than 3" from all enemy units, objectives and other terrain features.
legend: Chewed by blackened teeth, this seed is ripe with putrescence. Once planted, it germinates into a pestilential bloom of magnificent proportions.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: FOETID ORCHARDIST
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s combat attacks while it is wholly within 7" of any friendly Feculent Gnarlmaws.
legend: Those who tend the copses of Feculent Gnarlmaws will fight vigorously to protect their arboreal charges.

name: THE GARDEN GROWS
description: Effect: Set up a Feculent Gnarlmaw on the battlefield more than 3" from all enemy units, objectives and other terrain features.
legend: The tendrils of decay reach ever outwards to find fresh places of purity to contaminate.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: MUNIFICENT BLIGHTS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GARDENERS OF NURGLE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the amount of mortal damage inflicted on the target by the ‘Putrescent Sap’ ability.
legend: This pestilential rite makes the Garden even more generous with gifts for its guests.

name: TRANSPLANTING
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Feculent Gnarlmaw to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again within 3" of a friendly GARDENERS OF NURGLE HERO and more than 3" from all enemy units, objectives and other terrain features.
legend: The most proficient of Nurgle’s gardeners can coax a Feculent Gnarlmaw to their side.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: SCUMFALL
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GARDENERS OF NURGLE WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, friendly GARDENERS OF NURGLE units that are wholly within 12" of a friendly Feculent Gnarlmaw are not visible to units more than 9" away.
legend: With murmured incantation, the caster coaxes forth a scummy dust from Nurgle’s orchards to blanket his followers in an obfuscating cloud.

name: HEAD GARDENER
description: Effect: The friendly Horticulous Slimux can use his ‘Cultivating the Garden of Nurgle’ ability this phase even if there are 1 or more friendly Feculent Gnarlmaws on the battlefield.
legend: The daemon responsible for tending the Garden has no equal in the propagation of its blighted orchards.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: CANOPY OF VIRULENCE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GARDENERS OF NURGLE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly GARDENERS OF NURGLE unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, while the target is wholly within 12" of any friendly Feculent Gnarlmaws, ward rolls cannot be made for enemy units in combat with the target.
legend: Those who labour in the shadow of Nurgle’s orchards are empowered by this arcane rite.

name: PUTRESCENT SAP
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit within 3" of any friendly Feculent Gnarlmaws to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Vile black fluid oozes from bark-sores and withered tree limbs.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase

name: FOUL FAUNA
description: Effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly GARDENERS OF NURGLE Beasts of Nurgle and Plague Drones units while they are wholly within 6" of any friendly Feculent Gnarlmaw.
legend: The creatures that inhabit the Garden of Nurgle are ebullient monstrosities…

name: SICKLY SORES
description: Effect: While a friendly GARDENERS OF NURGLE INFANTRY unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly Feculent Gnarlmaw, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to it in each phase.
legend: The blighted seeds released by the Feculent Gnarlmaws invigorate those who tend the Garden.

name: STAVE OF SUFFERING
description: Effect: While this unit is within 12" of any damaged enemy units or enemy units that have had any models slain, add 1 to casting rolls for friendly NIGHTHAUNT units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This staff drinks in the misery and pain of nearby living things and converts it into powerful magic that can be harnessed by Nighthaunt spellcasters.

name: BRAZIER OF NAGASHIZZAR
description: Effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.
legend: Green flames billow from this brazier, lashing at nearby gheists and ensuring that there is no rest for the wicked.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ’%000009837Redeploy%’ command for a friendly %000011651NIGHTHAUNT INFANTRY% unit wholly within 12" of this unit

name: TOMBSTONE OF THE PENITENT
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for each non-FACTION TERRAIN terrain feature that is being contested by friendly units, to a maximum of 8.
legend: This tombstone, chained to the gheist cursed to bear it, begins to burn with spectral flames as the land around them is suffused with deathly energies.

name: LIGHTSHARD OF THE HARVEST MOON
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly NIGHTHAUNT units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: This lightshard is filled with a baleful gloom that, upon release, casts the battlefield in an eerie glow, readying the enemy for the reaping.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: AMULET OF WAKING NIGHTMARES
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, the target cannot be affected by the ‘Guarded Hero’ ability or the ‘Obscuring’ terrain ability.
legend: This loathsome amulet afflicts harrowing visions on a chosen victim, whose subsequent throat- rending screams allow Nighthaunt marksmen to locate their target no matter where they hide.

name: MIRROR OF ECHOING FAILURES
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy WIZARD and PRIEST within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, for the rest of the phase:
  • Subtract 1 from casting rolls and chanting rolls for the targets.
  • Each time any of the targets fails to cast a spell or chant a prayer, inflict 1 mortal damage on that target.
legend: To fail in front of this awful artefact is to have those miseries echoed in excruciating detail by a caterwauling reflection of your own face deriding your futile efforts.
condition: Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>SPELL</ky> or <ky>PRAYER</ky> ability for a <ky>WIZARD</ky> or <ky>PRIEST</ky> within 12" of this unit

name: GREEDY FOR SOULS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Nexus of Grief to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the target has a Move characteristic of 3". It can immediately move up to 3" and can move into combat but cannot end that move on a terrain feature or within 3" of an objective.
legend: A Nexus of Grief’s bricks fly apart and its metal rails extend outwards like a grasping claw, dragging it ever nearer to living, breathing victims.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Enemy Turn

name: BLADES OF ETERNAL RUST
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that is in combat with any friendly NIGHTHAUNT units to be the target.

Effect: Subtract 1 from save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: The weapons of these Nighthaunt constantly shed flakes of spectral rust that cause whatever physical substance they come to rest upon to corrode in moments.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: VANISH AND REAPPEAR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit that is in combat to use this ability.

Effect: Roll a dice. The unit using this ability can move a distance up to its Move characteristic added to the roll. It can pass through other models and the combat ranges of enemy units, and it can end that move in combat.
legend: These mercurial spirits are feared for their ability to dissolve into nothingness before suddenly reappearing elsewhere - often right behind their next targets' backs.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: THERE IS NO ESCAPE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • The target can use CHARGE and SHOOT abilities even if it has used a RETREAT ability in the same turn.
  • The target can use the ’Retreat’ ability without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
legend: Death Stalkers are spectral killers that relentlessly hunt down a chosen enemy. They are constantly on the move in pursuit of their quarry and nigh impossible to pin down.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: PETRIFY
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT HERO to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, enemy units cannot use RETREAT abilities while they are in combat with the target.
legend: The screams and wails of this procession's bloodthirsty champions are so terrifying that their foes often become rooted in place, ripe for the slaughter.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: LETHAL RANCOUR
description:
Declare: Pick up to 2 friendly NIGHTHAUNT units to be the targets.

Effect: The targets’ melee weapons have Anti-charge (+1 Rend) for the rest of the turn.
legend: The gheists of this horde are drawn from haughty nobles and obsequious courtiers who refused to admit fault even at the very end. They rail constantly at their kingdom's doom, and their undying bitterness renders their spectral touch even more deadly against those they perceive as interlopers.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: ETHEREAL
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for friendly NIGHTHAUNT units, excluding Nagash.
legend: Nighthaunt spirits can rarely be harmed by blows delivered by those caught in the grip of a spiritual terror.

name: ETHEREAL TRANSLOCATION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit that is not in combat to use this ability.

Effect: Remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Nighthaunt appear and disappear from sight to torment their prey.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: MOUNTING DREAD
description: Effect: Subtract the current battle round number from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with any friendly NIGHTHAUNT units.
legend: The keening wails and harrowing shrieks of the Nighthaunt are a continuous assault on the courage of those who face them in battle, until their will to fight has all but crumbled.

name: SEPULCHRAL APPARITIONS
description:
Effect: If there is a friendly Nexus of Grief on the battlefield, you can set up up to 2 additional Nexuses of Grief on the battlefield. Each must be set up wholly outside enemy territory, more than 3" from all objectives and other terrain features, and more than 12" from all other friendly Nexuses of Grief.

Designer’s Note: The original Nexus of Grief is set up in Step 1 of the deployment phase using the ‘Deploy Faction Terrain’ ability. This ability allows you to set up a second and third such terrain feature and is used in Step 3 of the deployment phase, after armies have been deployed.
legend: Like sinister visions intruding upon reality, the haunted crypts of the Nighthaunt shimmer into existence wherever there are souls to be captured and tortured.

name: DISCORPORATE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: If given the order, the Nighthaunt can flicker between the realms of the living and dead.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: UNHOLY VISAGE
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of your general to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target must immediately use a RETREAT ability as if it were the enemy movement phase. Immediately after that ability has been resolved, if the target is in combat, inflict 2D3 mortal damage on it.
legend: Even the mightiest feel a glimmer of fear in the face of this creature's unutterably foul appearance.

name: CACKLING ARRIVAL
description:
Declare: Pick 1 of your units in reserve.

Effect: Set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: Whether diving from the skies or rising suddenly from the very ground, a host of gheists catches the foe unaware.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: DEATHLY POSSESSOR
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO within 12" of your general to be the target, then pick another enemy unit within the target’s combat range to be the victim.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, pick one:
  • Inflict mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
  • Inflict mortal damage on the victim equal to the roll.
legend: In a flash of balefire, the Nighthaunt vanishes. An instant later, a nearby foe's eyes glow with spectral power and they lash out at their allies, cackling in a voice not their own.

name: ETHEREAL
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for friendly units.
legend: Nighthaunt spirits can rarely be harmed by blows delivered by those caught in the grip of a spiritual terror.

name: MOUNTING DREAD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract the current battle round number from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with the target.
legend: The wails and shrieks of the Nighthaunt are a continuous assault on the courage of those who face them in battle.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: TALES OF HORROR
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY or CAVALRY unit within 6" of your general to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, if the target is replaced using the 'Call for Reinforcements' ability, halve the number of models in the replacement unit, rounding up.
legend: Desertions are all too common when battling this spectral terror.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: SPECTRAL HOWL
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
legend: A soul-shattering howl pierces the din of battle, rooting the enemy in place.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase

name: RULER OF THE SPECTRAL HOSTS
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly non-HERO NIGHTHAUNT units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+:
  • If the target is damaged, Heal (X) the target, where X is an amount equal to the roll.
  • If the target is not damaged, return a number of slain models to it with a combined Health characteristic of up to X, where X is an amount equal to the roll.
legend: The deathly power of this spirit is like a siren call, an unseen signal that beckons to those who have passed beyond the grave.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: DEATHLY POSSESSOR
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with this unit to be the target, then pick another enemy unit within the target’s combat range to be the victim.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, pick 1 of the target’s melee weapons. Immediately resolve combat attacks for the target with that weapon against the victim.
legend: In a flash ofbalefire, the Nighthaunt vanishes. An instant later, a nearby foe's eyes glow with spectral power and they lash out at their allies, cackling in a voice not their own.

name: SHADOWY AURA
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit.
legend: A pall of gloom hangs over this champion, concealing the movements of nearby gheists and allowing them to ambush their victims.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ’%000009837Redeploy%’ command for a friendly <ky>NIGHTHAUNT</ky> unit wholly within 12" of this unit

name: SUMMON SHYISH REAPER
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Shyish Reaper on the battlefield, pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Shyish Reaper wholly within 12" of and visible to the caster and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The wizard sweeps down their arm as they utter this spell’s final incantation, and a fearsome scythe formed of purest amethyst magic tears through their foes with unstoppable force.

name: SUMMON MORTALIS TERMINEXUS
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Mortalis Terminexus on the battlefield, pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Mortalis Terminexus wholly within 18" of the caster and visible to them.
legend: A spectral hourglass filled with shifting grave-sand takes shape, promising temporal grace or doom to mortal and immortal alike.

name: SUMMON VAULT OF SOULS
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Vault of Souls on the battlefield, pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Vault of Souls wholly within 18" of the caster and visible to them.
legend: This summoned chest siphons souls, filling itself to overflowing with the rich spirits of mortalkind.

name: WAVE OF TERROR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability if it charged this phase and the charge roll was 10+. Then, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST this turn.
legend: Many foes freeze in fear when faced by a swarming Nighthaunt charge.

name: DEATH STALKERS
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit on the battlefield.

Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used for attacks that target that unit.
legend: These spectral killers relentlessly hunt down quarry whose names have been whispered to them in darksome rites.
condition: Start of the First Battle Round

name: SOULFIRE RING
description: Effect: If any models were slain by your general this turn, Heal (D6) your general.
legend: Gouts of lashing green flames leap forth from this ring as it consumes the souls of those slain by the wearer.

name: CHORUS OF TERROR
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target a friendly unit that charged in the same turn.
legend: Warriors are frozen in place by the shrieks of the Nighthaunt as they wash over the enemy lines in a wave of terror.

name: BEACON OF NAGASHIZZAR
description: Effect: Return 1 slain model to each friendly unit on the battlefield.
legend: This malignant light summons departed souls.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: ETHEREAL
description: Effect: Ignore all modifiers to save rolls for friendly units (positive and negative).
legend: Nighthaunt spirits can only be harmed by blows delivered with great conviction.

name: CLOAKED IN SHADOW
description: Effect: No more than 1 enemy unit can target your general with attacks (shooting or combat) per phase.
legend: Eerily intangible, this spirit’s ethereal form fades in and out of existence like some wispy cloud of supernatural mist.

name: SHADOW'S EDGE
description: Effect: Your general’s Sword of Stolen Hours has Crit (Mortal).
legend: It is impossible to tell if this ebon blade is corporeal or mere shadow, yet its touch tears through flesh and bone with ease.

name: FELL BLADES
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time the target uses a FIGHT ability, if all of its attacks targeted the same enemy unit, after that ability has been resolved, subtract 1 from save rolls for that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: A malignant curse screeched to blackened skies coalesces on spectral blades, causing the weapons to glow with the magics of ending.

name: WRENCH SOULS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly non-HERO NIGHTHAUNT INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target can immediately use the ’Normal Move’ or ’Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: With a clasped fist and a horrible twist, the caster drags a horde of gheists to their desired location.

name: CHAINS OF DEATH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy HERO unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: With an unearthly howl, hundreds of spectral chains burst from the caster's billowing form, ensnaring their straining victim from head to foot.

name: ETHEREAL
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for friendly NIGHTHAUNT units.
legend: Nighthaunt spirits can rarely be harmed by blows delivered by those caught in the grip of a spiritual terror.

name: SPECTRAL LASHES
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION unit wholly within 12" of them and that has not been picked to be the target of this ability this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn.
legend: With a rattling shriek, the caster causes spectral lashes to manifest around the ethereal steeds of the Clattering Procession, driving them forward with pitiless blows.

name: TALISMAN OF THE NADIR
description: Effect: If a friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION unit wholly within 12" of this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, this unit can use the ’Unbind’ ability as if it had WIZARD (1). Add 1 to the unbinding roll for that ability.
legend: A tiny, spell-eating mote of the Shyish Nadir rages in this ornate hourglass, devouring enemy magics with eager abandon.

name: SILENT OVERSEER
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the targets can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RETREAT ability in the same turn.
legend: With a gesture of a translucent finger, this gheist orders those spirits who have fled from their enemies to charge again, heedless of the cost.

name: SUMMON SHYISH REAPER
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Shyish Reaper on the battlefield, pick a friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Shyish Reaper wholly within 9" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The wizard sweeps down their arm as they utter this spell's final incantation, and a fearsome scythe formed of purest amethyst magic tears through their foes with unstoppable force.

name: FELL RIDERS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION WIZARD to cast this spell, pick the caster and up to 1 other visible friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION unit wholly within 12" of them to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: You can re-roll run rolls and charge rolls for the targets for the rest of the turn.
legend: Words of power twist the air and ghostly green flames explode from the hooves of the Clattering Procession's steeds, giving them a deadly burst of speed.

name: THE SPEED OF DEATH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION unit that used a CHARGE or RETREAT ability this turn, is not in combat and is wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge to use this ability.

Effect: Remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 3" from all enemy units.
legend: With terrifying speed, the ethereal steeds of the Clattering Procession climb into darkened skies, leaving a steep trail of burning spectral hoofprints in the air.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn

name: SPECTRAL SWIFTNESS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION unit that is in combat to use this ability.

Effect: That unit can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through other models and the combat ranges of enemy units, but it cannot end that move in combat.
legend: The incorporeal cavalry of the Clattering Procession are impossible to surround and pin down.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: PITILESS REAPERS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION unit that passed across any enemy units this phase to use this ability, then pick 1 of those enemy units to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the CLATTERING PROCESSION unit that passed across the target. Add 1 to the roll if any friendly CLATTERING PROCESSION Black Coaches passed across the target this phase. For each 6+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The chill blades of the Clattering Procession flash down and reap a deadly harvest as they pass through the enemy ranks.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: THE SEAL OF NAGASH
description: Effect: Allocate 3 damage points to this unit (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points). Then, Heal (3) the friendly Nagash.
legend: This sigil, magically seared into this gheist's spectral form, binds them to Nagash so that he may readily drain their power to sustain himself at a moment's notice.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: DAMNED VESSEL
description: Effect: Measure the range and visibility of that SPELL ability from this unit instead of that Nagash.
legend: With a wretched wail, a gheist's will is temporarily eclipsed as Nagash channels his power through their ragged shape.
condition: Reaction: You declared a SPELL ability for a friendly %000017408Nagash% within 18" of this unit

name: ETHEREAL
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for friendly NIGHTHAUNT units, excluding Nagash.
legend: Nighthaunt spirits can rarely be harmed by blows delivered by those caught in the grip of a spiritual terror.

name: SUMMON SHYISH REAPER
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Shyish Reaper on the battlefield, pick a friendly ETERNAL NIGHTMARE WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Shyish Reaper wholly within 9" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The wizard sweeps down their arm as they utter this spell's final incantation, and a fearsome scythe formed of purest amethyst magic tears through their foes with unstoppable force.

name: DIVINE TERROR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ETERNAL NIGHTMARE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 3 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: The inevitability of Nagash's return inspires utter dread, and it is a matter of little effort for the wizard to magnify that fear tenfold.

name: GATHER POWER
description:
Effect: The following effects apply to the friendly Nagash during the first and second battle rounds, as shown:

Battle Round 1:
  • His Move characteristic is ’-’ and he cannot make pile-in moves.
  • He has WARD (3+).
  • He has a Control characteristic of 1.
  • Alakanash and Zefet-nebtar each have an Attacks characteristic of 2 instead of 4.

Battle Round 2:
  • His Move characteristic is 6".
  • He cannot end a move more than 6" from the ritual site.
  • He has WARD (4+).
  • He has a Control characteristic of 5.
  • Alakanash and Zefet-nebtar each have an Attacks characteristic of 2 instead of 4.
legend: Nagash's formidable will gathers magical power to reinvest his divine spirit with corporeal raiment once more. During his unholy resurrection, there is a brief window where he is at his most vulnerable.

name: SUMMON MORTALIS TERMINEXUS
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Mortalis Terminexus on the battlefield, pick a friendly ETERNAL NIGHTMARE WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Mortalis Terminexus wholly within 18" of the caster and visible to them.
legend: A spectral hourglass filled with shifting grave-sand takes shape, promising temporal grace or doom to mortal and immortal alike.

name: THE WILL OF NAGASH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ETERNAL NIGHTMARE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly ETERNAL NIGHTMARE INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, if the unmodified hit roll or unmodified wound roll for an attack that targets the target unit is 1-3, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: Eye sockets flaring with power, the wizard renders nearby gheists almost invulnerable to enemy attacks.

name: THE RITUAL BEGINS
description:
Declare: You must use this ability to set up the friendly Nagash. Pick a friendly Nexus of Grief wholly within friendly territory to be the ritual site.

Effect: Set up the friendly Nagash within 1" of the ritual site and wholly within friendly territory. After you have done so, he has been deployed. That Nexus of Grief is the ritual site for the rest of the battle.
legend: Nagash's potent spirit anchors itself to a nearby Nexus of Grief, and it is from here that his form shall be remade once more in all its macabre glory.

name: SUMMON VAULT OF SOULS
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Vault of Souls on the battlefield, pick a friendly ETERNAL NIGHTMARE WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Vault of Souls wholly within 18" of the caster and visible to them.
legend: This summoned chest siphons souls, filling itself to overflowing with the rich spirits of mortalkind.

name: UNHOLY VESSEL
description: Effect: The ritual site has WARD (4+) and cannot use the ’Hungry Crypts’ ability.
legend: As Nagash gathers his power, a tiny portion of his godly might is invested in the Nexus of Grief that plays host to his disembodied spirit.

name: SHARD OF NECRIS
description: Effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4 and this unit did not charge in the same turn, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: This ancient shard is a fragment of the armour known as the Necris Infinus. Though it was shattered in a war long ago, the remaining piece is still imbued with the darkest of Shyishan sorceries. Once worn by Haakesh the Indomitable and Kheramet the Undying, its potent magics render the wearer almost invulnerable. Almost...

name: BLADE OF THE NADIR
description: Effect: Pick 1 of this unit’s non-Companion melee weapons. For the rest of the battle, each time you make an unmodified wound roll of 6 for a combat attack made with that weapon, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target of the attack after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Compressed to a barely visible sliver by the metaphysical weight of the Shyish Nadir itself, this weapon is so incomparably sharp that flesh and steel dissolves around it as it sweeps through enemy ranks.

name: AMULET OF GNOSIS
description: Effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on friendly OSSIARCH B0NEREAPERS units by RETREAT abilities while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This talisman contains the siphoned intellects of many esteemed martial leaders distilled into a single black gemstone, which bestows upon the bearer the knowledge of a thousand battles. Such military acumen ensures any troops under their command will act with supreme precision on the battlefield.

name: PLENTIFUL BONE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-UNIQUE OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD to use this ability, then pick up to 3 visible friendly non-FLY OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS units wholly within 12" of that WIZARD to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+:
  • If the target is damaged, Heal (X) the target where X is an amount equal to the roll.
  • If t
legend: Guarded supply lines provide this force with near-limitless bone reserves, allowing for swift repair of damaged constructs.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: DISCIPLINED HEKATOI
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO non-FLY OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS INFANTRY unit to be the target.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply until the start of your next turn:
  • The target has WARD (5+).
  • Add 1 to charge rolls for the target.
  • Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s attacks.
  • The target’s melee weapons have Anti-charge (+1 Rend).
legend: Crafted with specially selected soul-stuff from skilled officers, the Hekatoi of this legion exhibit an unusual degree of battlefield initiative.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: UNFALTERING PACE
description:
Used By: The unit using RUN ability

Effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.
legend: The soldiers of the Ossiarch legions neither rest nor tire; their expansions are limited only to the availability of osseous matter with which to create fresh soldiers.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>RUN</ky> ability for a friendly <ky>OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS</ky> unit

name: NADIRITE WEDGE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit that charged this turn to use this ability.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit’s melee weapons, including Companion weapons, have Crit (2 Hits) for the rest of the turn.
legend: As the attacking speartip of the Ossiarch legions drive home their charge, enemy defences quail and then shatter outright.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: SILENT EMPIRE
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, the target has a maximum control score of 1 while it is within neutral territory or your territory.
legend: To invade the Ossiarch Empire is to enter a realm of doleful columns, grim architecture and deathly silence.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: GRIM SENTINELS
description: Effect: Melee weapons used by friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS units have Anti-charge (+1 Rend) while they are wholly within neutral territory or wholly within 6" of both enemy and friendly territory.
legend: The borders of the Ossiarch Empire stretch across continents in every Mortal Realm, and they are ever expanding ...

name: IMMORTAL ELITE
description:
Declare: You must use this ability if there are any friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS HEROES on the battlefield. Pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS HERO to be the target.

Effect: You gain a number of relentless discipline points equal to the number after the target’s RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE keyword. At the end of the battle round, any unspent relentless discipline points are lost.
legend: The Ossiarch legions march to war in perfect unison, efficiently and precisely enacting the will of their generals without the mortal inadequacies of doubt, fear or regret.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: REMORSELESS MARCH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit that has not used a RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE ability this phase to use this ability.

Effect: Spend 1 relentless discipline point. If that unit is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 relentless discipline points instead. Add 3" to the Move characteristic of that unit for the rest of the phase. That unit cannot use RUN abilities for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Ossiarchs advance into battle swiftly and mercilessly.

name: IMPASSIVE RETREAT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit that has not used a RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE ability this phase to use this ability.

Effect: Spend 1 relentless discipline point. If that unit is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 relentless discipline points instead. For the rest of the turn, that unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn.
legend: The Bonereapers disengage and charge back into the fray, heedless of any losses sustained by their own ranks.

name: RUTHLESS EXTERMINATION
description:
Used By: The unit using that SHOOT ability.

Effect: Spend 1 relentless discipline point. If that unit is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 relentless discipline points instead. Subtract 1 from ward rolls for damage points inflicted by attacks made as part of that SHOOT ability.
legend: With the enemy fully engaged, the Ossiarchs send a hail of fire raining down on them with cold efficiency.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>Shoot</ky> ability for a unit that has not used a <ky>RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE</ky> ability this phase

name: PITILESS ASSAULT
description:
Used By: The unit using that FIGHT ability.

Effect: Spend 1 relentless discipline point. If that unit is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 relentless discipline points instead. Add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made as part of that FIGHT ability.
legend: The Bonereapers deliver blows that make a mockery of enemy defences.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for a unit that has not used a <ky>RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE</ky> ability this phase

name: INVIOLATE LEGIONS
description:
Used By: A friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit targeted by that ATTACK ability. Friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS units can use this ability more than once per phase.

Effect: Spend 1 relentless discipline point. If that unit is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 relentless discipline points instead. That unit has WARD (5+) against damage points inflicted by attacks made as part of that ATTACK ability.
legend: Ossiarch warriors snap into defensive formations that grant them even greater resilience.

name: MANUFACTURED MIND
description: Effect: When picking a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS HERO to be the target of the ‘Immortal Elite’ ability this battle round, you can pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS HERO that has been destroyed.
legend: This commander's soul-stuff is a blend of some of the realms' finest military minds. This grants them moments of unparalleled insight, even in the face of utter disaster and the complete dissolution of the chain of command.
condition: Once Per Battle, Start of Battle Round

name: IMMACULATE DEFENDER
description: Effect: Ignore the first damage point allocated to each friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS INFANTRY unit in the combat phase while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This warlord knows precisely how to maximise the peerless resilience of the Ossiarch Bonereapers through defensive formations and overlapping shieldwalls.

name: IMPERIOUS WILL
description: Effect: Pick an enemy unit in combat with that non-HERO unit and that did not charge this turn to be the target. Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but only once per FIGHT ability.
legend: The exacting leadership of this commander inspires their cohorts of Ossiarch soldiery to fight with a ruthless determination to utterly vanquish the enemy.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for a %000011388non-HERO OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS% unit wholly within 12" of this unit

name: MIGHTY ARCHAEOSSIAN
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (5+).
legend: The fossilised bone from which this commander is formed is supernaturally hard.

name: FEIGNED RETREAT
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly units can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RETREAT ability in the same turn.
legend: At an unseen and unheard signal, the Kavalos Vanguard pivots effortlessly from one engagement to another.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: CALCULATED FEINT
description: Effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on friendly CAVALRY units by RETREAT abilities.
legend: To the Ossiarch legions, battle is but a plan to be enacted, each part meticulously choreographed down to the last detail.

name: IMPERIOUS COMMANDER
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn.
legend: This general is unforgiving of failure, and their demands are met with incredible swiftness.

name: REINFORCED CONSTRUCTS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.

Effect: The target has WARD (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: These mastercrafted Bonereapers were created by some of the finest bone-sculptors of the Ossiarch Empire.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: KAVALOS LANCE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the target can pass across enemy models as if it had FLY.
legend: These warriors form the tip of the spear, crashing through enemy formations with terrifying ease.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: MURDEROUS BLADE
description: Effect: Your general’s Commander’s Blade has Crit (2 Hits).
legend: Said to have been wielded by Patru Zandtos before he took up the Dark Lance, this blade is utterly lethal.

name: COLD SAVAGERY
description:
Declare: If your general has not charged this turn and is in combat, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons, including Companion weapons, for the rest of the turn.
legend: Perhaps tainted by beast-bone, this commander infects their troops with more than a hint of ferocity.

name: SUMMON NIGHTMARE PREDATOR
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Nightmare Predator on the battlefield, pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Nightmare Predator wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Nightmare Predator is a looming conjuration of Shyishan magic that takes the form of a disturbing terror.

name: SUMMON BONE-TITHE SHRIEKER
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Bone-tithe Shrieker on the battlefield, pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Bone-tithe Shrieker wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The caster conjures a four-headed, all-seeing monstrosity to hunt down those who would escape the Ossiarch tithe.

name: SUMMON SOULSTEALER CARRION
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Soulstealer Carrion on the battlefield, pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Soulstealer Carrion wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Soaring from its caster’s spread fingertips, the Soulstealer Carrion takes wing above the battlefield.

name: DREAD DESCENT
description: Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: There are fewer more unwelcome sights to an enemy than the arrival of one of the Great Necromancer's heralds.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: SHARD STORM
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 7+, roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The caster conjures forth a great cloud of bone-shards and hurls them at the foe.

name: PEERLESS COHESION
description: Effect: You can use the ’Relentless Discipline’ ability for a second time this phase but you must pick a different target to the one you picked the first time.
legend: With coordination that would be the envy of any mortal commander, the Ossiarch Bonereapers act in effortless tandem.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared the ’%000022979Relentless Discipline%’ ability

name: LODE OF SATURATION
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used for combat attacks that target this general.
legend: This ingot of nadirite-iron alloy, when pressed against a bone construct, renders its structure nigh invulnerable.

name: RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.

Effect: Make a discipline roll of D6. Add 1 to the roll if the target is wholly within 12" of your general. On a 4+, pick 1 of the effects below:
  • Your Movement Phase: Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the phase.
  • Your Charge Phase: Add 1 to charge rolls for the target for the rest of the phase.
  • Any Combat Phase: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by the target for the rest of the phase.
  • Any Combat Phase: The target has WARD (5+) for the rest of the phase.
legend: The Ossiarchs are infamous for their cohesive discipline.

name: IMMACULATE GENERALSHIP
description: Effect: Add 1 to discipline rolls you make.
legend: The Ossiarch Bonereapers instantly understand the intent of their commander and seamlessly move to act upon it.

name: MEND CONSTRUCTS
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, Heal (D3) the target.
legend: The caster seeks to undo the damage that mars the surface of their creations.

name: HELM OF TYRANNY
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 3+, subtract 3 from the control score of the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: This helm radiates the oppressive will of the wearer, filling nearby foes with supernatural dread.
condition: Once Per Battle, End of Your Turn

name: TITAN'S FANG
description: Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit in combat with this unit.
legend: This blade has been crafted from the calcified tooth of a fallen godbeast.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: CONSTRUCTS OF PETRIFIED BONE
description: Effect: Ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to each friendly PETRIFEX ELITE unit in each phase.
legend: The Petrifex craft their war-constructs from ancient bone that is as hard as granite.

name: PLUNDERER OF PARTS
description: Effect: If any enemy models were slain by this unit’s combat attacks this turn, roll a D3. On a 2+, Heal (X) this unit, where X is an amount equal to the roll.
legend: Harvesting the bones of fallen warriors mid-battle is second nature to this hero.

name: HARD AS DIAMOND
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly PETRIFEX ELITE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target that unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: Using their shaping prowess, this bone-crafter compresses osseous matter to make it even more unyielding.

name: SUMMON NIGHTMARE PREDATOR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly PETRIFEX ELITE WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Nightmare Predator wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Nightmare Predator is a looming conjuration of Shyishan magic that strikes terror into the hearts of all who glimpse it.

name: RELENTLESS ONSLAUGHT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO INFANTRY unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is lower than the number of models in the target unit, set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) in friendly territory, wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Petrifex Elite grind their enemies to dust with relentless assault waves.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn

name: SKELETAL GRASP
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly PETRIFEX ELITE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • Halve the target’s Move characteristic.
  • Subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
legend: Long-buried bone fragments worm their way through the earth, connecting into multi-jointed fingers that burst through the surface and ensnare unfortunates in their vice-like grip.

name: SHATTERING STRIKE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly PETRIFEX ELITE unit that charged this turn to be the target.

Effect: The target can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, this unit has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Iron-hard limbs lash out with little grace but terrible strength, pulverising anything within reach.

name: TREMORS FROM THE ENTOMBED
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly PETRIFEX ELITE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a terrain feature or faction terrain feature within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is a terrain feature, roll a D3 for each unit (friendly or enemy) within 3" of it. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.

If the target is a faction terrain feature, inflict 2D6 mortal damage on it. If the target is destroyed, before removing it from pl
legend: The wizard animates petrified bones buried deep in the earth, causing the ground to quake with deadly force.

name: CEASELESS ADVANCE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly PETRIFEX ELITE unit that is in combat to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, no mortal damage is inflicted on the target by RETREAT abilities, but when the target uses a RETREAT ability, it must end the move closer to or in enemy territory.
legend: This nomadic legion is always on the move, even when deep in enemy territory.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: BOLSTER CREATION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, ignore the first damage point allocated to the target in each phase.
legend: Power flowing from their talons, the Mortisan hardens the osseous frames of their crafted soldiers.

name: EMPOWER NADIRITE WEAPONS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) until the start of your next turn. If all of the target’s non-Companion melee weapons had Crit (2 Hits) when they were picked to be the target of this ability, the target’s combat attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+ until the start of your next turn instead.

Friendl
legend: Mortisans imbue the Bonereapers' blades with deadly power, acting in concert to increase the weapons' lethality to truly fearsome levels.

name: IMMOLATING FLAMES
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time a model in the target unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a number of dice equal to the target’s Health characteristic. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the
legend: The caster wreathes an Ossiarch cohort in dark, flaming magic that discharges in a burst of fiery energy should any of their number be felled.

name: INVIGORATE THE RANKS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Mortisan pours energy into nearby soldiers, multiplying their combat prowess thricefold.

name: SOUL-CLAIM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD to cast this spell, then pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the enemy target. Then, you can pick a visible friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit wholly within 12" of that WIZARD to be a friendly target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the enemy target. If any models are slain by this ability, pick 1 of the following:
  • Heal (3) the friendly target.
  • Return a number of
legend: The caster drains the spirit-essence from the foe, repurposing it to imbue their constructs with animus.

name: DRAIN VITALITY
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks and subtract 1 from save rolls for the target.
legend: This cursed spell saps a foe’s strength, leaving them weak and vulnerable.

name: PREVAILING TACTICIAN
description: Effect: If a friendly Arch-Kavalos Zandtos is not wholly within 12" of this unit, you gain 2 relentless discipline points.
legend: As one of Zandtos's direct subordinates, this Liege-Kavalos knows well how to lead the host while their lord engages in the more pressing business of egregious slaughter.

name: PRAETORIAN ELITE
description:
Declare: You must use this ability if there are any friendly LANCE OF OSSIA HEROES on the battlefield. Pick a friendly LANCE OF OSSIA HERO to be the target.

Effect: You gain a number of relentless discipline points equal to the number shown after the target’s RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE keyword. At the end of the battle round, any unspent relentless discipline points are lost.
legend: The Lance of Ossia ride to war in perfect unison, efficiently and precisely enacting Zandtos's will without the mortal inadequacies of doubt, fear or regret.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: HELM OF TYRANNY
description: Effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are within 12" of this unit.
legend: This helm radiates the oppressive will of the wearer, filling nearby foes with supernatural dread.

name: VENGEFUL OUTRIDERS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LANCE OF OSSIA unit that has not used a RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE ability this phase to be the target

Effect: Spend 1 relentless discipline point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 relentless discipline points instead. Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the phase.
legend: Zandtos hurls his forces towards the enemy with unchecked fury.

name: KAVALOS LANCE
description: Effect: When a friendly LANCE OF OSSIA unit uses the ‘Power Through’ command, the target does not have to have a lower Health characteristic than that friendly unit.
legend: Those who fight with Zandtos want nothing more than to carve a red path through those who would defile their lord's domain.

name: SILENT MENACE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LANCE OF OSSIA unit that has not used a RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE ability this phase to use this ability, then pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of it to be the target.

Effect: Spend 1 relentless discipline point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 relentless discipline points instead. The target cannot use the ‘Redeploy’ command for the rest of the turn.
