legend: As the thundering charge of the Lance of Ossia bears down upon the foe, their unblinking witchlight stares and deathly silence can unnerve even the most stalwart of enemies.

name: FURY OF ZANDTOS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LANCE OF OSSIA unit that charged this turn and that has not used a RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE ability this phase to be the target.

Effect: Spend 1 relentless discipline point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 relentless discipline points instead. The target’s melee weapons, including Companion weapons, have Crit (2 Hits) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Zandtos's ire burns so brightly that his warriors are fuelled by a bloodlust usually absent among the cold and brutal Ossiarchs.

name: BLOOD-SMEARED HOOVES
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly LANCE OF OSSIA unit that charged this turn and has not used a RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE ability this phase to be the target.

Effect: Spend 1 relentless discipline point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 relentless discipline points instead. Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s weapons, including Companion weapons, for the rest of the turn.
legend: As the charge crashes home, Zandtos's rage infects even his warriors' mounts, who grind the enemy to pulp beneath their hooves.

name: UNEARTHLY AURA
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NULL MYRIAD WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly NULL MYRIAD unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks until the start of your next turn.
legend: The caster takes the powerful magical defences of the Null Myriad and inverts them, allowing their weapons to effortlessly cleave through magical defences.

name: GOTHIZZAR CARTOUCHE
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly NULL MYRIAD units that target that unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Inscribed by Nagash himself, this cartouche is emblematic of the hatred the dead have for the living and stokes their desire for revenge.

name: SUMMON HORROR OF THE NECROPOLIS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NULL MYRIAD WIZARD to cast this spell, pick 1 of the friendly MANIFESTATIONS below that is not on the battlefield, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
  • Soulstealer Carrion
  • Bone-tithe Shrieker
  • Nightmare Predator

Effect: Set up the MANIFESTATION you picked wholly within 12" of the caster,
legend: The Mortisans of the Null Myriad are masters in manipulating the horrors that inhabit the furthest reaches of the realms.

name: AURA OF ENERVATION
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for shooting attacks that target friendly NULL MYRIAD units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Ending magics shroud this hero, sapping the force from arrows and other projectiles.

name: ARCANE IMMUNITY
description: Effect: Friendly NULL MYRIAD units have WARD (4+) against damage points inflicted by SPELL abilities, PRAYER abilities and abilities used by MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: Forged to fight wars at the Perimeter Inimical, the Null Myriad are innately resistant to even the most potent magic.

name: REINFORCE CONSTRUCT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly NULL MYRIAD WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly NULL MYRIAD unit wholly within 12" of the caster to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target has WARD (5+) until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Null Myriad are strengthened against the corrosive magic of the realms' wilds, and this endurance can be magnified to resist more terrestrial damage.

name: SUPERNATURAL ABSORPTION
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MANIFESTATION within a friendly NULL MYRIAD unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+:
  • The target is banished and removed from play.
  • If that friendly unit is damaged, Heal (X) that friendly unit, where X is the target’s Health characteristic.
  • If that friendly unit is not damaged, return a number of slain models to it with a combined Health characteristic of up to X, where X is the target’s Healt
legend: The runes carved into the warriors of the Null Myriad flare into life, absorbing hostile manifestations to power the regeneration of damaged constructs.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: FIRST OF THE MORTARCHS
description:
Effect: Each time you make a casting roll for a friendly Arkhan the Black, if all the following are true, that spell cannot be unbound:
  • The unmodified casting roll contains 2 or more results of the same value.
  • The casting roll equals or exceeds the spell’s casting value.
  • The spell is not miscast.
legend: Arkhan the Black is the closest thing to a truly trustworthy agent of the Great Necromancer. His loyalty, never in question, has been rewarded with access to mystical power above and beyond his quarrelsome peers.

name: INPENETRABLE RANKS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability.

Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to ward rolls for that unit.
legend: If given the order, Ossiarch warriors will snap into an unyielding defensive line.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: EMPOWER NADIRITE WEAPONS
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly Mortek Guard unit wholly within 12" of your general, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 5+, until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons.
legend: Soulreaper can call upon stolen life essence to bolster nadirite weapons.

name: CONTINGENT ARRIVAL
description: Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: Marching in perfect unison, a reinforcing unit of Mortek Guard arrives.

name: RE-FORM RANKS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Mortek Guard unit in combat to use this ability.

Effect: That unit can use a RETREAT ability this phase without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
legend: A group of Bonereapers swiftly disengages from combat with flawless precision.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: MURDEROUS DRIVE
description: Effect: Your general’s Soulreaper Scythe has Crit (2 Hits).
legend: This Soulreaper is animated by especially vicious and warlike spirits.

name: UNSTOPPABLE COMMANDER
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Mortek Guard unit wholly within 12" your general, then roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, add 3" to that unit’s Move characteristic this phase.
legend: This Soulreaper’s animus contains the essence of a brilliant commander that can still urge their troops to victory.

name: MARROWPACT
description: Effect: Each time your general uses a FIGHT ability, after all of their attacks have been resolved, Heal (X) your general where X is the number of damage points allocated by those attacks.
legend: The glyphs borne to war by your general bind those who view them in arcane pacts.

name: GRUESOME TROPHIES
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks that target HEROES or MONSTERS made by friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This collection of skulls, entrails and hides is an inspiring sight to this ogor’s kin, encouraging them to claim trophies of their own.

name: THE FANG OF GHUR
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: The amber magic that permeates this weapon grants it the power to bite through arcane wards.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: ELIXIR OF THE FROSTWYRM
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Then, Heal (X) this unit, where X is an amount equal to the roll.
legend: Distilled from the blood of a giant Frostwyrm, this rare elixir temporarily gives the drinker the power of those beasts to vomit forth a torrent of frost magic.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Shooting Phase

name: EYES OF THE STORM
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly BEASTCLAW RAIDERS HEROES.
legend: The members of this tribe are masked by frosty squalls and freezing mists as they follow their champions into battle.

name: POSTPRANDIAL WARFARE
description:
Declare: Pick up to D3 friendly OGOR INFANTRY units that were in combat this turn with an enemy unit that was destroyed this turn to be the targets.

Effect: Return 1 slain model to each target unit.
legend: Having slurped up their fallen enemies’ innards and picked their bones clean, these ogors rejoin the battle in search of their next repast.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: BRUTAL STOCK
description: Effect: Each time a friendly BEASTCLAW RAIDERS MONSTER uses the ‘Trampling Charge’ ability, add 1 to the amount of mortal damage inflicted, if any.
legend: The beasts of this tribe are said to be the most belligerent and tenacious of all their kind.

name: FIXATED ON FEEDING
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OGOR INFANTRY unit that is not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target can move a number of inches equal to the roll. It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units and can end that move in combat. If it ended that move in combat, the target has charged.
legend: Once they have sighted a potential meal, it is nigh impossible to stop these ever-ravenous ogors from consuming their prize.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Charge Phase

name: FEED YER CANNONS!
description: Effect: Ranged weapons used by friendly Leadbelchers and Ironblaster units have Shoot in Combat while they are within the combat range of a friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES HERO.
legend: These artillery-ogors don’t need to be told twice to blast the foe into tiny bits.

name: MASTER BUTCHERS
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES WIZARDS.
legend: These ogor shamans know many gruesome secrets of gastromantic magic.

name: TRAMPLING CHARGE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OGOR or RHINOX unit that charged this turn to use this ability, then pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. Add 2 to the roll if this unit is a MONSTER. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: At the first opportunity, an ogor will barge intocombat, using its immense girth as a weapon.

name: RAVENOUS BRUTES
description: Effect: Add 2 to run rolls for friendly OGOR units while you have not used the ‘Feast on Flesh’ ability this battle.
legend: Sighting the enemy, the ogors’ hunger intensifies, and they move with alarming speed to close the distance.

name: FEAST ON FLESH
description:
Declare: Pick each friendly OGOR unit that is in combat or that used a FIGHT ability this turn to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+:
  • Heal (X) the target, where X is an amount equal to the roll.
  • Pick an enemy unit in combat with the target. You cannot pick the same enemy unit more than once. Inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
legend: As the battlelines clash and blood is spilled, the ogors’ hunger must be sated, and they are compelled to gorge on the flesh of their enemies.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn

name: GUTSLUGGER
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s combat attacks if it did not charge in the same turn.
legend: This ogor is usually found fighting in the thick of a melee and is renowned for their uncanny ability to come out on top.

name: MAGE-SWALLOWER
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from ward rolls for enemy units while they are within 6" of this unit.
legend: Ever since they ate an entire party of wizardly scholars, the mere presence of this ogor is enough to disrupt magical defences.

name: MEGAGOBBLER
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following keywords:
  • INFANTRY
  • CAVALRY
  • MONSTER
  • WAR MACHINE
  • BEAST
For the rest of the battle, each time any damage points are allocated to an enemy unit with that keyword by this unit’s combat attacks and that enemy unit is destroyed in the same turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons. This effect is cumulative.
legend: Surveying the enemies lined up before them as if considering items on a menu, this ogor chooses today’s main course.

name: GREAT GUTLORD
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to this unit’s control score and to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s attacks.
legend: There are few opponents in the Mortal Realms that can withstand the ravenous power of this ogor.

name: BOOMING ROAR
description: Effect: Subtract 5 from the control scores of enemy INFANTRY units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: Relishing the fight, this champion roars a challenge to the enemy that makes the very earth beneath their feet tremble.

name: TOUCHED BY THE EVERWINTER
description: Effect: If this unit is not a PRIEST, it has Priest (1). If this unit is already a PRIEST, you can re-roll chanting rolls of 1 for it instead. If this unit is a WIZARD, it cannot use SPELL abilities and PRAYER abilities in the same phase.
legend: This warrior strayed close to the heart of the Everwinter and emerged with the power to commune with it.

name: CALL OF THE BLIZZARD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a terrain feature within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Place a blizzard token next to the target. Terrain features that have a blizzard token gain the ‘Obscuring’ terrain ability. In addition, if the chanting roll was 8+, until the start of your next turn, friendly BEASTCLAW RAIDERS units have
legend: An impenetrable snow squall manifests on the battlefield, blocking visibility and shielding nearby Beastclaw warriors.

name: PULVERISING HAILSTORM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a point on the battlefield within 12" of them, then pick each visible enemy unit within 3" of that point to be the targets. Then, make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If the chanting roll was 8+, double the amount of mortal damage inflicted.
legend: Fist‑sized chunks of ice rain from the sky to crush those below.

name: KEENING GALE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES MONSTER or Mournfang Pack unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the target can use a RUN ability and still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn. In addition, if the chanting roll was 8+, you can re-roll run rolls and
legend: A bone-chilling wind howls across the battlefield, giving speed to the beasts of winter and driving the Everwinter’s monstrous denizens before it.

name: SAVAGE INSTINCTS
description: Effect: Pick a friendly unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within your general’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by your general has been resolved.
legend: As this ogor lays into the enemy, nearby allies can't help but get enthusiastic about the feast to come.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for your general

name: LET'S GET STUCK IN
description: Effect: Set up this unit wholly within friendly territory, wholly within 6" of the battlefield edge, and not in combat.
legend: The Ironguts start to arrive, and woe betide whoever gets in their way.

name: IT'S A HARD LIFE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Gnoblars unit within your general’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+:
  • Heal (X) your general where X is an amount equal to the roll.
  • 1 model in that Gnoblars unit is slain.
legend: It doesn't take much to become lunch when the leader of this Scrapglutt is around. The best the gnoblars can hope for is that someone else is gobbled up first.

name: MASSIVE BULK
description: Effect: Add 2 to the Health characteristic of your general.
legend: Big, lumbering and nigh-on impossible to kill.

name: FRENZIED ARTILLERY
description: Effect: If the unmodified charge roll for a friendly Gnoblar Scraplauncher is 6+, add 3 the Attacks characteristic of the target’s Companion weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The gnoblars of this Scrapglutt's Scraplauncher are known for getting a bit carried away.

name: NASTY TRAP
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.

Effect: Give the target your general’s Trap token. While the target has a Trap token, each time the target is picked to use a MOVE or CHARGE ability, roll a dice. On a 4+, that MOVE or CHARGE ability has no effect and the target’s Trap token is removed
legend: Rusted and gnarled, the jaws of this iron trap mangle and snap the thickest bones with ease.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: VETERAN HUNTER
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s combat attacks that target that unit.
legend: This ogor hunter has a keen eye and even keener hunger, which combine to make him as dangerous as a sudden avalanche.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase.

name: TROGGOTH GUTS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES unit within 12" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this ability this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Heal (D3) the target and add 3 to the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: The shaman gobbles down the slippery innards of a troggoth to transfer the beast’s uncanny healing powers to their allies and restore their vigour.

name: GREASY DELUGE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks until the start of your next turn.
legend: The caster chews up a big mouthful of rancid fat and gall‑slime before spitting it onto the ground. In moments, enemy warriors are caught in a deluge of foul-smelling grease, slipping and sliding as they try to bring their weapons to bear.

name: BLOOD FEAST
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly OGOR INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: The liver of a powerful beast is held high over the shaman’s head. Gore drips and runs down their face before they take a great bite from it, filling nearby ogors with a frenzied blood-lust.

name: MAWMEAT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ROVING MAW WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible terrain feature within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, units on or within 1" of the target are vulnerable to Mawpits. This ability had no effect on ROVING MAW units or units that have Fly.
legend: Chunks of meat glistening with ichor are flung into overgrown ruins and undergrowth to attract more Mawpits to the battlefield.

name: FLASKS OF CONGEALED MAW-JUICES
description: Effect: Friendly Mawpits within this unit’s combat range have Ward (5+).
legend: These vessels contains greasy, pungent fluids that squirted from a Mawpit as it gobbled down a victim. They have fortifying effects on those chomping sinkholes into which they are poured.

name: TASTY MORSELS
description: Effect: Each time a model is slain by a friendly Mawpit’s ‘Throat of Ghur’ ability, you gain 1 tasty morsel.
legend: Ogors hate wasting even a scrap of meat. Any foes they do not gobble down on the spot are hacked to pieces and saved for the Butcher’s pot.

name: PRIME GUTSERVER
description: Effect: If this unit is a Head Butcher, gain 1 tasty morsel.
legend: This general has fed entire armies to the Mawpits.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: RETCHER
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ROVING MAW WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 2 to the Rend characteristic of the caster’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: As they cast this spell, the Butcher spews their stomach contents over their weaponry, giving their blades ‘extra bite’.

name: DRIVEN BY STARVATION
description: Effect: Friendly Gorger Mawpack units can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RUN ability in the same turn unless they are wholly within 3" of a terrain feature.
legend: Each offering the Head Butcher submits to the Mawpit is one fewer scrap for a ravening Gorger.

name: TRAMPLING CHARGE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Roving Maw unit that charged this turn to use this ability, then pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The charge of bellowing ogors resembles a living avalanche of blubber and metal. Anything in their path is quickly squished into an edible paste.

name: THE REALM HUNGERS
description: Effect: Units and MANIFESTATIONS are vulnerable to Mawpits while they are on the battlefield unless they are wholly within 1" of a terrain feature that is not a Mawpit. This ability has no effect on ROVING MAW units or units that have Fly.
legend: None can tell where hungry, chomping Mawpits will next manifest in the ground.

name: MAWPITS OF GHUR
description:
Effect: Roll 2D6 and add the number of tasty morsels you have to the roll. Apply the corresponding effect below for the rest of the battle round. Then, reset your tasty morsels to 0.

2-3 – Subdued: No effect.

4-5 – Peckish: Subtract 3 from the control scores of units that are vulnerable to Mawpits.

6-8 – Rumbling: Roll a dice for each unit that is vulnerable to Mawpits. On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit.

9-11 – Famished: Units that are vulnerable to Mawpits cannot use commands.

12+ – Ravenous: Roll a D3 for each unit that is vulnerable to Mawpits. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
legend: These highly aggressive, teeth-filled rents in the ground are drawn to the wider realms by the Butchers’ gastromantic magic.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: PULVERISING GIRTH
description:
Declare: Pick any number of friendly units that charged this phase.

Effect: For each of those units, pick an enemy unit in combat with it and roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that enemy unit.
legend: There are few armies in the Mortal Realms that can withstand the charge of ravenous ogors.
condition: Once Per Phase, Any Charge Phase

name: BELLOWING ARRIVAL
description: Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield, within 1" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: A mighty roar echoes across the battlefield as more hungry ogors join the fray.

name: LONGSTRIDER
description: Effect: Your general has a Move characteristic of 8" instead of 6".
legend: This warrior is said to be capable of running down a sprinting rhinox.

name: BRED FOR TOUGHNESS
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Health characteristic of your Ironblaster and your Mournfang Pack unit.
legend: Ogors choose only the toughest and most thick-skinned beasts to carry them into battle.

name: BOOMING ROAR
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units this phase while they are within 9" of your general.
legend: Relishing the fight, your general roars a challenge to the enemy that makes the very earth beneath their feet tremble.

name: FLASK OF STONEHORN BLOOD
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (3+) this phase.
legend: This icy-blue liquid imbues the one who drinks it with the toughness of a Stonehorn.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: Opponent declared an <ky>ATTACK</ky> ability and targeted your general

name: BLUBBERGRUB
description:
Declare: Pick either your Ironblaster or your Mournfang Pack unit if it is within your general’s combat range.

Effect: Heal (D6) that unit.
legend: These filthy and disturbingly large maggots are a favourite of the big beasties of the mawtribes.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Movement Phase

name: BANNER OF SIGMAR
description:
Declare: Pick an objective within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, your opponent cannot control the target objective while they have no units contesting it.
legend: The hero unfurls a mighty banner and plunges its pommel into the earth with the force of a falling comet, where it stands upright and proud, declaring Sigmar’s reckoning to all who bear witness to its majesty.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: NULL PENDANT
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Subtract 5 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: This dark amulet holds magic within that can sap the resolve of the enemy.
condition: Once Per Battle, End of Any Turn

name: SIGIL OF MORRDA
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, that command or RAMPAGE ability has no effect, it still counts as having been used and any command points spent to use that ability are still lost.
legend: This sigil is one of the god Morrda, a death god that escaped Nagash’s purge of Shyish. Their power, perhaps not what it once was, is still potent and to be rightly feared.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: Opponent declared a command or a <ky>RAMPAGE</ky> ability for a unit %000015939in combat% with this unit

name: QUICKSILVER DRAUGHT
description: Effect: This unit has Strike-first for the rest of the turn.
legend: This potion lends uncanny speed to the one who imbibes it.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: BEACON OF AZYR
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS WIZARD or PRIEST wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The next time this turn that the target uses a PRAYER or SPELL ability, instead of making a casting roll or chanting roll for them, you can use a value of 7 for the roll that cannot be modified. After that ability is resolved, if the target has any ritual points,
legend: This beacon is brimming with the magic of the Celestial Realm. When unleashed, holy lightning surges forth, empowering a nearby Stormcast Eternal who is attuned to the tempest.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase

name: MIRRORSHIELD
description: Effect: This unit cannot be targeted by shooting attacks unless the attacking model is within 9" of it.
legend: This shield reflects the rays of Hysh in questing beams that seek out the eyes of enemy marksmen.

name: THRIVE ON THE ATTACK
description: Effect: Friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS units cannot use the 'All-out Defence' command. However, up to 2 friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS units can use the 'All-out Attack' command each phase.
legend: Boisterous, courageous and hungry for great deeds, Astral Templars embody aggression.

name: CHAMPION OF URSRICHT
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for attacks that target an enemy HERO or MONSTER.
legend: This warrior is said to be of the blood of the bear, marked as one of his warrior champions.

name: GODBEAST PLATE
description: Effect: If the unmodified wound roll for an attack made with a Companion weapon that targets this unit is a 1-3, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: This armour, quenched in the blood of the mightiest beasts, is proof against the claws of feral creatures.

name: WREATHED IN THE STORM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Calling on their band to the frozen floes of Andtor, the wizard summons a storm of slicing ice-shards.

name: SPEED OF THE RIGHTEOUS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn. If the chanting roll was 6+, you can pick up to 2 eligible units to be the targets instead of 1.
legend: With a guttural and atavistic chants, the priest invokes the strength of their ursine totem-lord.

name: SUMMON EVERBLAZE COMET
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up an Everblaze Comet wholly within 18" of the caster.
legend: Reaching an arm to the heavens, the wizard calls down a comet of pure Azyrite energy that crashes into the foe's ranks with devastating effect.

name: STORM’S WRATH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • Add 3 to the target’s Move characteristic.
  • Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for shooting attacks that target the target unit.
legend: The wizard transforms their allies into a flock of amber-feathered Ghurish kites, granting them swiftness and agility.

name: LIVE OFF THE LAND
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS unit that is wholly within enemy territory and is not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Heal (D3) the target.
legend: Hunters of the Astral Templars are skilled at striking, retreating to recover, and then striking once more.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: HUNTER’S PROWESS
description:
Effect: Each time you declare an ATTACK ability for a friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS unit, you gain 1 hunter’s prowess point.

Each time a combat attack made by a friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS unit scores a critical hit, you can spend 1 hunter’s prowess point. If you do so, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target after the ATTACK ability has been resolved.
legend: Astral Templars run their foes to the ground with the fervour of a hunting pack.

name: TENACIOUS TRACKERS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly ASTRAL TEMPLARS unit to be the target.

Effect: The next time you make a run roll for the target this phase, roll 1 additional dice, to a maximum of 2.
legend: The Astral Templars are used to pursuing foes over great distances without pause.

name: PEERLESS MANOEUVERS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly VANGUARD CHAMBER unit that did not use a MOVE ability this turn and is not in combat.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: These warriors are the precision weapon of the God-King, skilled at manipulating a battlefield in their favour by feinting from view and reappearing where they are needed most.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: CYCLE OF THE STORM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SACROSANCT CHAMBER unit that had models slain in this turn to be the target.

Effect: Return 1 slain model to the target unit.
legend: Masters of the Reforging process, the most experienced members of the Sacrosanct chambers can focus their power to restore mortally wounded comrades before they are called back to Azyr, allowing them to continue the fight at hand.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn

name: SYNCHRONISED STRIKES
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly WARRIOR CHAMBER units while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly non-HERO NON-BEAST STORMCAST ETERNALS units that do not have the WARRIOR CHAMBER keyword.
legend: The core of a Thunderhead Host is often made up of fighters from the Warrior chambers; having trained relentlessly with the sworn brethren of their Stormhost, they operate like a well-oiled cogfort.

name: ONCOMING STORM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly EXTREMIS CHAMBER unit that charged this turn.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, that unit has Strike-first for the rest of the turn.
legend: First to the fight, the Lightning Echelon is akin to a spear-thrust into the heart of the enemy. Deployed only in times of great need, they smash into the foe’s vanguard with the force of an oncoming tempest.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: ANCIENT AURA
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly RUINATION CHAMBER unit.

Effect: That unit has Ward (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Storm-charged energy ebbs and flows around the warriors of the Ruination chamber, surrounding them in a scouring aura of power. Finding purchase with a weapon on these ancient heroes can be a difficult task for even the mightiest of mortal foes.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: THE CELESTIAL REALM
description:
Declare: If there are more friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS units on the battlefield than there are set up in reserve, pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit that has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up that unit in reserve in the Celestial Realm. It has now been deployed.
legend: In High Azyr, the Stormcast Eternals await their call to deliver retribution.

name: SCIONS OF THE STORM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit that is in the Celestial Realm.

Effect: Set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Upon blessed bolts of lightning do the Stormcast Eternals ride to war, the furious rumble of thunder heralding their arrival.

name: HEAVENS-SENT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-UNIQUE STORMCAST ETERNALS INFANTRY or CAVALRY unit that started the battle with 2 or more models and that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: More reinforcements are sent down from Azyr in their fellow warriors’ time of need.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: THEIR FINEST HOUR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit that has not used this ability this battle to use this ability.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to wound rolls for that unit’s combat attacks and add 1 to save rolls for that unit.
legend: Stormcast Eternals are bastions of hope for the forces of Order. In times of desperate need, each fighter does what is necessary to keep their enemies at bay.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: SHIELDS OF THE WARDEN
description:
Effect: While any friendly Stormdrake Guard units are within a friendly Ionus Cryptborn’s combat range:
  • That friendly Ionus Cryptborn has Ward (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for that friendly Ionus Cryptborn, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly Stormdrake Guard unit within its combat range after the damage sequence for that friendly Ionus Cryptborn has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Ionus often goes into battle accompanied by an elite band of Stormdrake Guard whose sole duty is to protect their commander.

name: REGAL AUTHORITY
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DRACONITH SKYWING WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly DRACONITH SKYWING unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 5 to the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: Halos of lightning surround the wizard’s allies, casting them as resplendent and terrifying paragons of war.

name: SUMMON EVERBLAZE COMET
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Everblaze Comet on the battlefield, pick a friendly DRACONITH SKYWING WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up an Everblaze Comet wholly within 18" of the caster.
legend: Reaching an arm to the heavens, the wizard calls down a comet of pure Azyrite energy that crashes into the foe’s ranks with devastating effect.

name: FEARLESS FLIERS
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat, it can immediately make a D6" move and can end that move in combat.
legend: Such is the bond between this rider and their mount that they can perform the most graceful aerial manoeuvres in order to close the distance on their prey.

name: SIGMAR’S GRACE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DRACONITH SKYWING PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a friendly DRACONITH SKYWING unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Heal (D3) the target. If the chanting roll was 8+, HEAL (2D3) the target instead.
legend: Shafts of golden light burst through the clouds to heal Sigmar’s wounded.

name: CELESTIUM ENSIGN
description: Effect: Heal (3) each friendly DRACONITH SKYWING unit wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The sight of this ancient heirloom spurs Draconith to draw upon hidden reserves of strength.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn

name: THUNDEROUS ROAR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DRACONITH SKYWING MONSTER that has not used any RAMPAGE abilities this turn to use this ability. Then, pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with it to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+, subtract 5 from that target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: A deafening roar is unleashed, drowning out the din of battle momentarily and melting the resolve of even the most stalwart foes.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: SANCTIFICATION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DRACONITH SKYWING PRIEST to chant this prayer, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from casting rolls for enemy WIZARDS while they are within 30" of the chanter. If the chanting roll was 12+, subtract 1 from casting rolls for enemy WIZARDS for the rest of the battle and friendly PRIESTS cannot use this ability again for the rest of the battle.
legend: Holy energies radiate from the cleric, disrupting the works of spellcasters who bear hostile intent.

name: EXEMPLARS OF FURY
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Companion weapons used by friendly DRACONITH SKYWING HEROES while they are within 6" of 2 or more friendly Stormdrake Guard units.
legend: The leaders of the Skywings urge their scaled companions to strike with devastating force, their bloody assault an inspiration to all who witness it.

name: AETHERIC CYCLONE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DRACONITH SKYWING MONSTER that has not used any RAMPAGE abilities this turn to use this ability. Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: The mighty Draconith whips its wings to create a ferocious squall that buffets the enemy lines, driving them to their knees.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: THE CELESTIAL REALM
description:
Declare: If there are more friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS units on the battlefield than there are set up in reserve, pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit that has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up that unit in reserve in the Celestial Realm. It has now been deployed.
legend: In High Azyr, the Stormcast Eternals await their call to deliver retribution.

name: SUMMON EVERBLAZE COMET
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Everblaze Comet on the battlefield, pick a friendly FIRST-FORGED WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up an Everblaze Comet wholly within 18" of the caster.
legend: Reaching an arm to the heavens, the wizard calls down a comet of pure Azyrite energy that crashes into the foe's ranks with devastating effect.

name: SPEED OF THE RIGHTEOUS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly FIRST-FORGED PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit wholly within 12" of them to be a target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of the target for the rest of the turn. If the chanting roll was 6+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.
legend: The warrior-priest calls upon Sigmar to speed their brethren with the winds aetheric so that they might enact his judgement with greater haste.

name: WREATHED IN THE STORM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly FIRST-FORGED WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets the target unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Lightning ripples across the armour of these warriors, delivering a lethal shock to enemies who approach them.

name: SHIELD OF SKJORDAMAR
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the battle.
legend: Said to have been forged with a sliver of the Great Bolt Skjordamar, this shield delivers a blast of celestial energy that can banish the corruption spread by malign magics.

name: THEGN OF BELLICOS
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons while it is wholly within 6" of a friendly Bastian Carthalos.
legend: In their mortal life, this warrior fought alongside Bastian at the Battle of Burning Skies and still does so after their Reforging.

name: SCIONS OF THE STORM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit that is in the Celestial Realm.

Effect: Set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Upon blessed bolts of lightning do the Stormcast Eternals ride to war, the furious rumble of thunder heralding their arrival.

name: STORM’S WRATH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly FIRST-FORGED WIZARD to cast this spell, pick up to 3 visible enemy units within 9" of them to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.
legend: The mage calls down a barrage of colossal lightning blasts that boom across the battlefield, blasting to ash clusters of the foe.

name: PUNCH THROUGH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly INFANTRY unit in combat that has not charged this turn to use this ability.

Effect: That unit can immediately use the ’Charge’ ability and can move through enemy models when it does so.
legend: Like a plated fist, the warriors of the First-Forged drive deep into the enemy's ranks, smashing aside those in their path.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army) Your Charge Phase

name: SUMMON THE STORM
description:
Declare: If a friendly Bastian Carthalos is on the battlefield and was not set up this turn, you can pick a friendly Stormcast Eternals unit that is in the Celestial Realm.

Effect: Set up that unit wholly within 6" of a friendly Bastian Carthalos and more than 3" from all enemy units. If the target is a unit of Annihilators or Annihilators with Meteoric Grandhammers, for the rest of the turn, the target counts as having used the ’Scions of the Storm’ ability for the purposes of the ’Blazing Impact’ ability.
legend: With a voice of booming thunder, Bastian can call forth his warriors, bringing them down in the heart of the enemy army.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: SHOCK AND AWE
description:
Effect: Each time this unit is set up using the ’Scions of the Storm’ ability, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit for the rest of the battle round.

In addition, each time a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit is set up wholly within 12" of this unit using the ’Scions of the Storm’ ability, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target that unit for the rest of the battle round.
legend: When this warrior and their Stormcasts take to the field, their shining visages strike fear into the foe.

name: LEGENDARY TENACITY
description: Effect: The first time this unit would be destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on it have no effect. Then, Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: This hero might well be struck down, but there is little in the Mortal Realms that can stop them from rising again, bloodied but unbowed.

name: ENVOY OF THE HEAVENS
description:
Declare: If a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit was destroyed in the previous turn, pick a visible friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target has Ward (5+) until the start of your next turn.
legend: When a Stormcast Eternal is laid low, the light that carries the warrior’s soul back to Azyr invigorates those who fight on.

name: HOUR OF GLORY
description: Effect: This unit can be picked to use the ‘Their Finest Hour’ ability even if it has already used it this battle. In addition, when this unit is picked to use the ‘Their Finest Hour’ ability, add 5 to its control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: This hero’s hour has come; their deeds will shatter the wicked, deliver the weak and protect the Mortal Realms themselves from any evil that would see them undone.

name: INTENSE PIETY
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy PRIEST or WIZARD within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from casting rolls and chanting rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.
legend: This hero’s intense and unwavering devotion to the Sigmar’s mission is one of such absolute focus that they can cause the followers of rival gods to hesitate and falter with a few well-chosen words or soul-piercing stare.

name: STAUNCH DEFENDER
description: Effect: While this unit is contesting an objective in friendly territory, add 3 to the control scores of all friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS units contesting that objective.
legend: To contest the sacred grounds of Sigmar is to invoke the almighty power of Azyr.

name: SUMMON DAIS ARCANUM
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Dais Arcanum on the battlefield, pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS INFANTRY HERO that does not have Fly and is wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Dais Arcanum within ½" of the target, visible to the caster and not in combat.
legend: The wizard calls down a single bolt of lightning to strike the ground at their feet, leaving behind a perfect sigmarite disc for a chosen Stormcast to mount and be carried into the air.

name: SUMMON CELESTIAN VORTEX
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Celestian Vortex on the battlefield, pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Celestian Vortex wholly within 18" of the caster and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The wizard casts a pair of ensorcelled hammers into the air, which begin to spin. As the vortex gets more intense, the hammers multiply to form a maelstrom of skull-crushing force.

name: SUMMON EVERBLAZE COMET
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Everblaze Comet on the battlefield, pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up an Everblaze Comet wholly within 18" of the caster.
legend: Reaching an arm to the heavens, the wizard calls down a pure comet of Azyrite energy that crashes into the foe’s ranks with devastating effect.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Mighty Flying Noble Beast's Claws is 4.

name: HEALING STORM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Heal (D3) the target. If the chanting roll was 8+, Heal (D3) each visible friendly Stormcast Eternals unit wholly within 12" of the chanter instead.
legend: The priest calls down cleansing bolts from the sky, their invigorating energies closing even the most grievous wounds.

name: BLESS WEAPONS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn. If the chanting roll was 12+, this ability affects all visible friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS units wholly within 12" of the chanter.
legend: The priest imbues the weapons of their brethren with the pure essence of the storm.

name: TRANSLOCATION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. In addition, if the chanting roll was 8+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target that unit for the rest of the battle round.
legend: The priest summons bolts of lightning to transport nearby warriors across the battlefield.

name: ANCIENT AURA
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly RUINATION CHAMBER unit.

Effect: That unit has Ward (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Storm-charged energy ebbs and flows around the warriors of the Ruination chambers, surrounding them in a scouring aura of power. Finding purchase with a weapon on these ancient heroes can be a difficult task for even the mightiest of mortal foes.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army) Any Hero Phase

name: CORVEN LORD
description: Effect: If this unit has the ’Ruination Chamber’, ability, it can use that ability once per turn regardless of whether another friendly unit has used it during the same turn.
legend: The souls of those who lead the Ruination chambers are anathema to malign influence.

name: MORRDA’S EMBRACE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly RUINATION BROTHERHOOD PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain. If the chanting roll was 10+, roll 2D6 instead.
legend: Sinister shadows converge above the priest's head before enveloping a foe in a deadly embrace.

name: HALLOWED SCROLLS
description: Effect: If this unit is INFANTRY, it has Ward (5+). Otherwise, it has Ward (6+).
legend: Parchments inscribed with Sigmarite blessings adorn this warrior's armour.

name: TEMPER THE FLAW
description:
Declare: You must use this ability at the end of each turn. Each friendly non-HERO RUINATION CHAMBER unit that used a FIGHT ability this turn is a target.

Effect: For each target, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Guided: If the target is wholly within 12" of any friendly RUINATION CHAMBER HEROES, return 1 slain model to it.
  • Tormented: If the target is not wholly within 12" of any friendly RUINATIONS
legend: The warriors of the Ruination chambers must be shepherded by the mentors of the Bleak Citadels, else they risk losing what little remains of their soul.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: MURDEROUS FLOCK
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly RUINATION BROTHERHOOD PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target unit. If the chanting roll was 10+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target unit for each 4+ instead.
legend: A flight of phantasmal ravens is summoned from the darkened skies, diving down into the enemy's ranks to peck out eyes and pierce throats.

name: RAVEN’S FLIGHT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly RUINATION BROTHERHOOD PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn. If the chanting roll was 8+, in addition, for the rest of the turn, the target can use CHARGE abilities even if they have used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: Wings of jet black frame the priest as they summon a chill wind that speeds their allies.

name: HALLOWED PRESENCE
description: Effect: While friendly non-WARRIOR CHAMBER units are wholly within 12" of any friendly RUINATION CHAMBER units, those friendly WARRIOR CHAMBER units have Ward (6+).
legend: While fighting alongside the Ruination chambers, those of the Warrior chambers are granted a measure of the incorruptible nature of their solemn brethren.

name: ENTROPIC SCREECH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly RUINATION CHAMBER MONSTER that has not used any RAMPAGE abilities this turn to use this ability. Then, pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with it to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. The unit using this ability cannot use any more RAMPAGE abilities for the rest of the turn.
legend: Cocking its head back, the Morrgryph unleashes a soul-piercing screech that causes foes to wither and collapse under its necrotic onslaught.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: LIGHTNING BLAST
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS WIZARD to cast this spell, then pick the closest visible enemy unit to them that has not been picked to be the target of this ability this turn to be the target. If 2 or more visible enemy units are tied to be the closest, you can pick which is the target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The wizard releases pent-up storm energy into the foe, the tang of ozone and the stench of charred flesh filling the air as their enemies are burned and blasted by crackling arcs of lightning.

name: THUNDERSHOCK
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks until the start of your next turn.
legend: The wizard unleashes the power of Sigmar's storm as a wave of pure force, leaving the foe stunned and disoriented.

name: STARFALL
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy INFANTRY or CAVALRY unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
legend: Gazing towards the heavens, the wizard hurls meteoric rain into the enemy's path, forcing them to turn an aggressive push into a cautious advance.

name: SHIELD OF AZYR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, that unit has WARD (5+).
legend: Roaring oaths to Sigmar, these warriors are surrounded by an aura of divine protection.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase

name: HALLOWED SCROLLS
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (5+).
legend: Sacred parchments inscribed with Sigmarite blessings adorn this warrior.

name: STRIKE WHERE NEEDED
description:
Used By: The unit using that RETREAT ability

Effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on that unit by that RETREAT ability. In addition, that unit can still use CHARGE abilities this turn even though it used a RETREAT ability.
legend: Though often outnumbered by their foes, the Stormcast Eternals are accustomed to fighting on many fronts and focusing their efforts where they will have the greatest impact.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared a <ky>RETREAT</ky> ability

name: QUICKSILVER DRAUGHT
description: Effect: Your general has STRIKE-FIRST this phase.
legend: This potion lends uncanny speed to the one who imbibes it.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: STORM CHARGE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat.

Effect: That unit can use CHARGE abilities this turn even if it used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: These warriors are driven forward by their faith, ever eager to bring Sigmar’s holy retribution to his enemies.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Charge Phase

name: BLAZE OF GLORY
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that is in combat.

Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit is slain, make a vengeance roll of D6. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on an enemy unit in combat with that unit.
legend: As these warriors are struck down, Sigmar’s holy lightning wreaks devastation around them before they are called back to the heavens to be Reforged.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: MORRDA'S TALON
description: Effect: Your general’s Hallowed Greataxe has Crit (Mortal).
legend: Enemies of the God-King know this weapon by name and fear its keen blade.

name: NULL PENDANT
description:
Declare: Roll a dice for each enemy unit contesting the same objective as your general.

Effect: On a 2+, subtract the roll from the control score of that enemy unit this turn.
legend: This dark amulet holds magic within that can sap the resolve of the enemy.
condition: Once Per Battle, End of Any Turn

name: LIGHTNING-STRIKE ARRIVAL
description: Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: With a clap of thunder, Yndrasta and her allies strike down onto the battlefield.

name: DEFEND TO THE LAST
description: Effect: Friendly units have WARD (6+) while they are contesting an objective you control.
legend: These fearless warriors refuse to fall until their task is completed.

name: THE PRIME HUNTRESS
description: Effect: The Damage characteristic of Thengavar (Yndrasta’s spear) is 2D6 for attacks that target a MONSTER.
legend: Yndrasta relishes hunting the mightiest and most terrifying quarry.

name: DRIVE THEM BACK
description:
Declare: Pick any number of friendly units that are both contesting an objective and in combat.

Effect: Each of those units can make a pile-in move. For each unit that did so, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it and roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that enemy unit.
legend: Not an inch is given to the enemies of Sigmar.

name: DAZZLING RADIANCE
description:
Declare: Pick your general to use this ability if they were set up this phase.

Effect: You can return 1 slain model to each friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general.
legend: Yndrasta’s god-touched brilliance can call stranded Stormcast souls into the fray once more.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: STRIKE WITH THE TEMPEST'S RAGE
description: Effect: Your general has STRIKE-FIRST if they charged in the same turn.
legend: Yndrasta’s enemies know that to catch her gaze is to be marked for annihilation.

name: HAWK OF THE CELESTIAL SKIES
description: Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of your general.
legend: The sight of Yndrasta’s seraphic form inspires her warriors with immeasurable resolve.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: TERMINUS CLOCK
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from casting rolls for enemy WIZARDS while they are within 18" of this unit.
legend: Created by a mad clockwright of Ulfenkarn, this bizarre cogwork piece ticks without rhyme or reason. Whenever its eclectic count ends, however, the power of magic seems to deaden across the field.

name: SHARD OF NIGHT
description: Effect: Ignore modifiers to save rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit (positive and negative).
legend: This undead lord’s armour was crafted using elements of an abyssal stalker and grants the bearer that awful creature’s shadowy aura.

name: AMULET OF GRAVES
description: Effect: If there are fewer than 3 friendly Cursed Sepulchres on the battlefield, set up a Cursed Sepulchre on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units, more than 1" from all friendly units and more than 3" from all objectives and other terrain features.
legend: The bearer of this amulet can call upon a long-dead soul in Shyish, manifesting their final resting place onto the battlefield in a storm of necromantic energy.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: THE ROYAL CRYPT
description:
Declare: This ability must be used instead of the ‘Deploy Faction Terrain Feature’ ability.

Effect: Set up 3 Cursed Sepulchres wholly within friendly territory, each within ½" of any of the others and more than 3" from all objectives and other terrain features. After you have done so, they have been deployed and they are considered to be a single Cursed Sepulchre terrain feature that has a Health characteristic of 24 instead of 8.
legend: These crumbling ruins marks the ancient holdings of a powerful wight.

name: RESTLESS TYRANT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly BARROW LEGION unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn.
legend: The skeletal warriors under this one’s command are driven ever forward.

name: RING OF STRICKEN SOULS
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (5+).
legend: Violet clouds swirl within the Shyishan amethyst set in this ring, which grants the bearer uncanny protection.

name: CROWN OF COLD COMMAND
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly BARROW LEGION unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+:
  • If the target is damaged, Heal (3) the target.
  • If the target is not damaged, return a number of slain models to it with a combined Health characteristic of up to 3.
legend: This eldritch crown compels this king’s warriors from ages past to rise from their graves and fight once more.
condition: Once Per Turn, Any Hero Phase

name: GRAVE SENTINELS
description: Effect: The melee weapons used by friendly BARROW LEGION units have Anti-charge (+1 Rend) while they are wholly within 9" of a friendly Cursed Sepulchre.
legend: Unwavering in their eternal vigilance, the deathly warriors of this legion’s overlord guard his ancient resting place.

name: SPIRIT-EATER
description: Effect: If any models were slain by your general this turn, Heal (D6) your general.
legend: The souls of slain enemies are drawn into this king of undeath, imbuing him with unholy might.

name: CRYPT DAGGER
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D6 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Foul sorcery flickers and dances across the ancient iron of this cursed blade, and its bite can bring instant death.
condition: Once Per Battle, End of Any Turn

name: ALL TO DUST
description: Effect: In the third and subsequent battle rounds, while a friendly Cursed Sepulchre is on the battlefield, subtract 1 from save rolls for enemy units.
legend: Acting as a conduit to the Shyish Nadir, the death magic that swirls around this barrow legion’s tomb causes trespassers to atrophy and their armour to corrode under the weight of ages.

name: LORD OF THE ARCANE AEGIS
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following keywords:
  • INFANTRY
  • CAVALRY
  • MONSTER
  • BEAST
For the rest of the battle, each time an attack targets this unit, if the attacking unit has the keyword you picked, an unmodified save roll of 4+ for that attack is always successful.
legend: Even in undeath, this wight still recalls all manner of warding cantrips to protect his forces from the enemy.

name: GRAVE-SAND PENDANT
description: Effect: If this unit would be destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on it have no effect. Then, Heal (1) this unit. This unit cannot use this ability again for the rest of the battle.
legend: When shattered, the Shyishan realmstone within this talisman can forestall the bearer’s final destruction, granting them one last chance to claim revenge.

name: GIFTS TO THE PETTY KINGDOMS
description:
Declare: Pick up to 2 friendly non-UNIQUE BARROW LEGION HEROES that do not have an artefact of power to be the targets (you can pick units in reserve).

Effect: Give each target 1 artefact of power from the ‘Barrow Legion’ Army of Renown rules.

Designer’s Note: These artefacts of power are given to the HEROES during the deployment phase, not during army composition.
legend: To each of his vassal kingdoms, this legion’s monarch bestowed a gift bearing a curse that bound them to his service for evermore.

name: AMULET OF NIGHTMARES
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 9" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, the target has STRIKE-LAST this phase.
legend: The nightmares of the bearer, who endures a torturous existence trapped in their mouldering undead form, are projected into the minds of the living by this onyx talisman.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: ENDLESS LEGIONS OF BONE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-UNIQUE BARROW LEGION unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of a friendly BARROW LEGION HERO or wholly within 6" of a friendly Cursed Sepulchre. It must be set up more than 9" from all enemy units.

If it is your move
legend: When the Deathrattle armies are roused to war, their numbers are unending.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: TIDE OF BONES AND BLADES
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly DEATHRATTLE units that charged in the same turn for attacks that target a unit that has fewer models than the attacking unit.
legend: The relentless advance of these skeletal undead can overwhelm even the most tenacious resistance.

name: ARISTOCRACY OF THE NIGHT
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for friendly VAMPIRE units that are not in combat and add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly VAMPIRE units that charged in the same turn.
legend: These vampires are expected to excel in all martial and mystical disciplines.

name: DRAGGED DOWN AND TORN APART
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly DEADWALKERS units in combat to be the targets.

Effect: For each target:
  • Make a pile-in move.
  • Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with the target and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
legend: Hordes of shambling Deadwalker Zombies flow around and over their victims like a rotten tide, bearing them to the ground through sheer weight of numbers before tearing them limb from limb.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: THE SPEED OF DEATH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly INFANTRY VAMPIRE HERO to be the target.

Effect: The target can move up to 12" and has FLY when it does so. It cannot end that move in combat.
legend: Many vampires are capable of swiftly traversing nearly any terrain by assuming a different form or through the application of the sheer bestial strength and agility granted them by their curse.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: HORROR UNENDING
description: Effect: You can pick 1 additional target when using the ‘Deathly Invocation’ ability.
legend: The never-ending waves of deathly minions summoned by a Legion of Shyish shatter all hopes of victory for those who stand against them.

name: WARDENS OF THE WOLF
description: Effect: Each time 1 or more slain models are returned to a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS INFANTRY or BEASTS unit wholly within 12" of a friendly Belladamma Volga, Radukar the Wolf, Radukar the Beast, Ivya Volga, Lady Annika,
legend: The might of Ulfenkarn marches forth from the shattered city, its graves emptied to bolster the tides of endless dead, as the howls of feral vampires echo across the battlefield.

name: UNHOLY SITE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Cursed Sepulchre to be the target.

Effect: The target has WARD (4+) until the start of your next turn.
legend: Some gravesites have witnessed such horrors that the death magic suffusing them makes them even more difficult to cleanse of the undead’s influence.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: ANCIENT BURIAL SITES
description:
Effect: If there is a friendly Cursed Sepulchre on the battlefield, you can set up up to 2 additional Cursed Sepulchres on the battlefield. The first must be set up more than 3" from all units, objectives and other terrain features. The second must be set up wholly outside enemy territory and more than 3" from all units, objectives and other terrain features.

Designer’s Note: The original Cursed Sepulchre is set up in Step 1 of the deployment phase using the ‘Deploy Faction Terrain’ ability. This ability allows you to set up a second and third such terrain feature and is used in Step 3 of the deployment phase, after armies have been deployed.
legend: Across the Mortal Realms stand time-worn mausoleums and barrows, housing the remains of the long dead.

name: THE UNQUIET DEAD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DEATHRATTLE or DEADWALKERS unit that has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up that unit in reserve in the grave. It has now been deployed. You cannot set up more friendly units in the grave than there are on the battlefield.
legend: Animated by necromancy, the undead rise from their graves, balefire eyes blazing with dark purpose.

name: THE RISING DEAD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that is in the grave.

Effect: Set up that unit wholly within 6" of a friendly Cursed Sepulchre and more than 9" from all enemy units, or wholly within 6" of the edge of the battlefield, wholly within friendly territory and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Clawing their way through the soil and rock, more undead warriors join the fight.

name: DEATHLY INVOCATION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS HERO to use this ability, then pick up to 3 friendly DEATHRATTLE or DEADWALKERS units wholly within 12" of that HERO to be the targets.

Effect: For each target:
  • If the target is damaged, Heal (3) the target.
  • If the target is not damaged, return a number of slain models to it with a combined Health
legend: Skilled wielders of death magic can summon hordes of undead.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: ENDLESS LEGIONS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-UNIQUE DEATHRATTLE or DEADWALKERS unit that started the battle with 2 or more models and that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS HERO or wholly within 6" of a friendly
legend: To the Gravelords, the dead are mere chattel to be raised and expended.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: THE HUNGER
description:
Declare: Pick each friendly VAMPIRE unit that used a FIGHT ability this turn to be the targets.

Effect: Heal (D3) each target. Heal (2D3) the target instead if it destroyed an enemy unit this turn using a FIGHT ability.
legend: Soulblight vampires are revitalised by feasting upon the blood of their foes.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: ENDLESS LEGIONS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Deathrattle Skeletons unit that has been destroyed.

Effect: You can set up a replacement unit with D6 models in friendly territory more than 6" from enemy units.
legend: To the Soulblight aristocracy, the dead are mere chattel to be expended at will.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: GRAVE-SAND SHARD
description: Effect: Add 1 to each legion roll made for that unit.
legend: By crushing this gem of vitrified grave-sand, the Vampire Lord can draw upon a surge of death magic to reinvigorate their resurrected warriors.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared the ‘Skeleton Legion’ ability for a unit within 9" of your general

name: SWOOP DOWN
description: Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: The sky darkens as the Vargheists descend.

name: AURA OF NIGHT
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for shooting attacks that target your general.
legend: This black leather brigandine was crafted from the hide of an abyssal stalker and grants the wearer that creature’s shadowy aura.

name: RUINOUS CHARGERS
description:
Declare: Pick your Blood Knights unit to use this ability if it charged this turn.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit it passed across during that CHARGE ability.
legend: The Blood Knights of this army leave a trail of destruction as they trample anything that lies between them and their prey.

name: THE HUNGER
description: Effect: Each time a friendly VAMPIRE unit uses a FIGHT ability, after all of its attacks have been resolved, Heal (X) that VAMPIRE unit where X is the number of damage points allocated by those attacks.
legend: Those who bear the Soulblight Curse constantly crave blood and are empowered by feasting upon their foes.

name: CLOUD OF BATS
description: Effect: Remove your general from the battlefield and set them up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: Your Vampire Lord dissolves into a swarm of bats before reappearing elsewhere.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: SPIRIT GALE
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 7+, inflict 1 mortal damage on each enemy unit on the battlefield.
legend: Your general calls forth spectral winds that tear the souls of the foe from their bodies.

name: SHYISHAN BLADE
description: Effect: The Rend characteristic of your general’s Baleful Tomb Blade is 2.
legend: Sorcerous shadows dance across the deadly sharp edge of this obsidian sword.

name: OVERWHELMING HORDES
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly non-HERO units that target a unit that has fewer models than the attacking unit.
legend: The relentless advance of these skeletal undead can overwhelm even the most tenacious resistance.

name: THE RISING DEAD
description: Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: Clawing their way through the soil and rock, more undead warriors join the fight.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: DEATHMARCH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO unit that is not in combat to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1" to the target’s Move characteristic and add 3 to its control score.
legend: With rusted armour clattering, the skeletons advance in eerie lockstep, unburdened by pain or doubt.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: PROPELLED BY HATE
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.

Effect: You can re-roll charge rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: This warrior’s insatiable urge to slaughter the enemies of Nagash drives their deathless soldiers forward with sudden haste.

name: AURA OF ANTIQUITY
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with any friendly units to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: Prolonged exposure to the necrotic energies that animate these Deathrattle warriors can cause the equipment of their foes to corrode and crumble with unnatural speed.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase

name: STOLEN ANIMUS
description: Effect: Each time your general scores a critical hit, Heal (2) your general after the ATTACK ability has been resolved.
legend: This Wight King draws their unholy vitality from spilling blood in great measure.

name: SOUL-DRAIN PENDANT
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: When the cursed words of awakening are uttered, this amethyst pendant saps the vigour of the living.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: LASH OF THE SIRE
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+:
  • If the target is not in combat, it can move D6" but cannot move into combat during any part of that move.
  • If the target is in combat, it can make a pile-in move.
legend: Such is the domineering force of this undead overlord’s willpower that it can imbue nearby vassals with sudden impetus.

name: IMMORTAL EGO
description: Effect: Each phase, you can re-roll 1 hit roll, 1 wound roll and 1 save roll for this unit.
legend: Few mortals would claim to be the mightiest slayer in the Mortal Realms or to have a peerless mastery of the blade, given the existence of gods, daemons, demigods and more besides.

name: FRIGHTENING VITALITY
description: Effect: Each time an ability would heal exactly 1 or 2 of this unit’s damage points, heal 3 damage points instead.
legend: This deathless champion is an undead juggernaut, capable of a type of regeneration that is rare even amongst the ranks of the unliving.

name: UNBENDING WILL
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DEATHRATTLE or DEADWALKERS unit that has 2 or more models and is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add D6 to the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: This immortal tyrant and their minions are a force of unliving conquest like no other.

name: A WASTREL AND A VAGABOND
description:
Effect: While a friendly Deadwalker Zombies or Deathrattle Skeletons unit is wholly within 12" of this unit:
  • Add 2 to run rolls for that unit.
  • Add 3" to the distance that unit can move when it piles in.
legend: This spiteful creature is an embarrassment to their undead peers: perhaps a vampire fallen from favour, a wight who failed in their duty to their king, or a Necromancer who pushed their luck one time too many.
