Regardless of the reason, they seem to have an affinity with the basest undead minions.

name: UNHINGED RAMPAGER
description: Effect: You can re-roll charge rolls for this unit in your charge phase.
legend: This creature’s bestial hunger sees them close on the foe without hesitation.

name: CHALICE OF THE BLOOD DRAGON
description: Effect: Heal (3D3) this unit.
legend: Said to have been possessed by the Crimson Keep’s first castellan, this chalice can be drained to renew a vampire’s vigour.
condition: Once Per Battle, End of Any Turn

name: IMMORTAL DEDICATION
description:
Effect: This unit receives D3 martial prowess tokens. Each martial prowess token can be spent to do 1 of the following:
  • Re-roll a hit roll for this unit.
  • Re-roll a wound roll for this unit.
  • Re-roll a save roll for this unit.

At the start of the next turn, remove all this unit’s martial prowess tokens.
legend: Having spent centuries in undeath honing their martial skill, this Gravelord is a master of combat.

name: THE CRIMSON KEEP
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CRIMSON KEEP unit that has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up that unit in reserve in the Crimson Keep. It has now been deployed. You cannot set up more friendly units in the Crimson Keep than there are on the battlefield.
legend: None can predict where the Crimson Keep will manifest next, but wherever it appears, the slaughter its occupants will wreak will be total.

name: SIPHON STRENGTH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CRIMSON KEEP WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the caster.
legend: The vampire draws on the life essence of the enemy to flood their limbs with strength and heighten their senses.

name: SUMMON UNHOLY RELIQUARY
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Unholy Reliquary on the battlefield, pick a friendly CRIMSON KEEP WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up an Unholy Reliquary wholly within 18" of the caster.
legend: Pulled forth from the underworlds, the remains of a long perished vampire rises from the ground amidst a vortex of death magic.

name: CARVE A BLOODY PATH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Blood Knights unit that is in combat to use this ability.

Effect: That unit can use a CHARGE ability even though it is in combat and even if it has already used a CHARGE ability this turn.
legend: With unstoppable force, a wedge of Blood Knights punches through the enemy’s lines leaving a trail of broken foes in their wake.

name: DEATHLY GALE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CRIMSON KEEP WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly CRIMSON KEEP unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a maximum of 3.
legend: A foul wind carrying a stench of death and decay races across the battlefield, speeding the charge of the Knights of the Crimson Keep.

name: FROM A QUARTER UNSEEN
description:
Declare: You cannot use this ability in the first battle round. Pick each friendly unit that is in the Crimson Keep to be the targets.

Effect: Set up each target wholly within 9" of the battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units. If you set up any units using this ability in the third or a subsequent battle round, do not spend any command points when using the ‘Carve a Bloody Path’ command this turn.
legend: Prince Vhordrai has mastered the art of trapping the foe between his main force and reserves that sally forth from the Crimson Keep at his signal.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: AWAKENED FURY
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CRIMSON KEEP WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly CRIMSON KEEP unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the target’s Companion melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: At the sorcerer’s gesture, hooves are wreathed in balefire and monstrous talons grow elongated and wickedly sharp.

name: BLOOD RAMPAGE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CRIMSON KEEP MONSTER that is in combat and has not used any RAMPAGE abilities this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: This unit can make a move of 2D6". It must end that move in combat with the target unit. Then, roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target unit’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.

After this ability has been resolved, this unit cannot use RAMPAGE abilities for the rest of the turn.
legend: The nightmarish behemoths that roost among the upper spires of the Crimson Keep tear through the enemy’s ranks, sending bloody chunks and gore flying in all directions.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: SUMMON HAND OF NAGASH
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Hand of Nagash on the battlefield, pick a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Hand of Nagash wholly within 12" of and visible to the caster and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: From out a yawning portal looms a colossal skeletal arm, infused to its cursed marrow with the magic of Shyish.

name: SUMMON SANGUINE SWARM
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Sanguine Swarm on the battlefield, pick a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Sanguine Swarm wholly within 12" of and visible to the caster and more than 9" from all enemy units. A Sanguine Swarm spell has 2 parts that must be set up within 9" of each other.
legend: The skies darken as screeching swarms of spectral bats descend upon the battlefield, hungry for blood.

name: SUMMON UNHOLY RELIQUARY
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Unholy Reliquary on the battlefield, pick a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up an Unholy Reliquary wholly within 18" of the caster, visible to them and more than 3" from all enemy units.
legend: Pulled forth from the underworlds, the remains of a long perished vampire rises from the ground amidst a vortex of death magic.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Mighty Grave Beast’s Talons is 5.

name: KEEPER OF THE ROYAL MENAGERIE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Dire Wolves or Fell Bats unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Those vampires who maintain the bleak menageries of Nulahmia have an instinctive bond with undead beasts.

name: AMULET OF LEECHES
description:
Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly Dire Wolves or Fell Bats unit:
  • This unit has WARD (5+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly Dire Wolves or Fell Bats unit within this unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for this unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: This ancient and corroded talisman allows the wielder to draw upon the necromantic energies of their minions for protection.

name: INVOCATION OF NULAHMIA
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SCIONS OF NULAHMIA WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly Dire Wolves or Fell Bats unit wholly within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: You can return 1 slain model to that unit.
legend: This ancient spell, said to hail from the sun-blasted birthplace of necromancy, is wielded by each of Neferata’s chosen.

name: THAUMIC REALIGNMENT
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any EXQUISITE PLOT abilities this turn. Pick a friendly WIZARD to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to casting rolls for the target. In addition, at the end of this turn, if the target successfully cast any spells this turn, add 1 to its power level for the rest of the battle.
legend: The seeding of deathly energies soon sees the fell winds rise…
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: RECRUITMENT DRIVE
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any EXQUISITE PLOT abilities this turn. Pick a friendly unit to be the hunter and an enemy unit with 5 or more models to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for the hunter’s combat attacks that target that enemy unit. In addition, if the target is destroyed this turn by the hunter, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the hunter’s melee weapons for the rest of the battle.
legend: The butchery of a few peons yields a reserve of future ‘recruits’.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: THRALL DRAIN
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SCIONS OF NULAHMIA WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: D3 models in the target are slain. Then, remove all damage points from the caster.
legend: Vampires are consummate and ruthless survivors; they will gladly drain the energy of their subordinates in order to heal their own wounds.

name: SEEK WORTHY BLOOD
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any EXQUISITE PLOT abilities this turn. Pick a friendly unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the target’s weapons have Anti-HERO (+1 Rend). In addition, if the target destroys any enemy HEROES this turn, the target’s weapons have Anti-HERO (+1 Rend) for the rest of the battle.
legend: Only the finest ichor will suffice for the vampires of Nulahmia. It is considered an art to eviscerate an enemy champion whilst collecting as much of their blood as possible.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: SCARLET THIRST
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SCIONS OF NULAHMIA WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly SCIONS OF NULAHMIA VAMPIRE units while they are wholly within 12" of the caster.
legend: At the wizard’s command, a fierce compulsion to feed flares up inside the vampiric court, who eagerly await the chance to indulge their blood hunger without restraint.

name: THE QUEEN’S PRIZE
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any EXQUISITE PLOT abilities this turn. Pick a friendly unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 5 to the target’s control score.
In addition, at the end of this turn, after determining control of objectives, if the target is contesting an objective that you control and that was controlled by your opponent at the start of this turn, add 5 to the target’s control score for the rest of the battle.
legend: What Neferata desires, Neferata receives.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: VILE TRANSFERENCE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit. If any enemy models were slain by this spell, Heal (D3) the caster.
legend: The caster siphons the animus from nearby enemies and uses it to restore their deathless form.

name: PRISON OF GRIEF
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST until the start of your next turn.
legend: Victims of this curse relive their tragedies, their will to fight replaced by overwhelming self-pity.

name: WASTE AWAY
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.
legend: The wizard causes the muscles of the foe to atrophy, robbing them of their strength.

name: COATL FAMILIAR
description: Effect: Add D6 to the casting roll for that spell.
legend: Though only a juvenile example of the great feathered serpents, this winged creature is still sacred to the mage-god Tepok.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared a <ky>Spell</ky> ability for a friendly Seraphon Wizard within this unit’s combat range

name: INCANDESCENT RECTRICES
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: This vibrant plumage imbues the bearer with the restorative power of the heavens.

name: BLOODRAGE PENDANT
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons. Add 2 instead if the number of damage points allocated to this unit is equal to or greater than half of this unit’s Health characteristic (rounding up).
legend: Carved from the bones of savage reptilian megafauna, the Bloodrage Pendant spurs a warrior’s killing rage – all the more should they themselves shed gore.

name: SCALY MONSTROSITIES
description: Effect: Add 2 to the Health characteristic of friendly SERAPHON MONSTER units.
legend: The great beasts of the Seraphon are almost invincible when they march forth as a pack.

name: NIMBLE AND QUICK
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly SKINK INFANTRY or SKINK CAVALRY units that are not in combat to be the targets.

Effect: Each target can move D6". Each target cannot move into combat during any part of that move.
legend: The skink warriors of a Shadowstrike Starhost outmanoeuvre their enemies at every turn.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: VENGEANCE OF AZYR
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly SAURUS or KROXIGOR units that are in combat to be the targets.

Effect: For each target:
  • Make a pile-in move.

  • Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with the target and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
legend: The celestite weapons carried by the warriors of a Sunclaw Starhost are supercharged with the power of Azyr.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: CELESTIAL TRANSLOCATION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SERAPHON unit wholly within 12" of a friendly SERAPHON WIZARD to use this ability.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: In a flash of starlight, an Eternal Starhost arrives to enact the will of the Old Ones. Tapping into the celestial power that surrounds the slann, they teleport across the battlefield to catch the foe off guard.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: THE GREAT PLAN
description:
Declare: Pick an ASTERISM ability.

Effect: That ASTERISM ability can be used for the rest of the battle, but the others cannot, unless allowed by the ‘Further the Great Plan’ ability.
legend: The Seraphon look to the heavens for guidance, scrying the stars above in the hope that the Great Plan is revealed to them.

name: FURTHER THE GREAT PLAN
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if you meet the condition below that corresponds to the ASTERISM you picked in the deployment phase.

Itzl the Tamer: 3 or more enemy units have been destroyed.

Quetzl the Preserver: There are no enemy units wholly within friendly territory.

Sotek the Deliverer: The enemy general is in combat or has been destroyed.

Tepok the Seer: There are any friendly SLANN units on the battlefield and no friendly SLANN units are in combat or have been destroyed.

Effect: Pick a different ASTERISM ability. It can be used in addition to the
legend: As the battle unfolds, so do the machinations of the Old Ones.
condition: Once Per Battle, Start of the Third Battle Round

name: ITZL THE TAMER
description: Effect: Companion weapons used by friendly SERAPHON units have Crit (2 Hits).
legend: Itzl is the most bestial of all the Old Ones and his asterism fills the Seraphon with ferocity.

name: QUETZL THE PRESERVER
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of melee weapons for attacks that target friendly SERAPHON units that are wholly within friendly territory.
legend: Quetzl grants protection from the dangers of the physical realms.

name: SOTEK THE DELIVERER
description: Effect: Add 2 to the Move characteristic of friendly SERAPHON units.
legend: The Asterism of Sotek emboldens the Seraphon with a war-hungry aggression.

name: TEPOK THE SEER
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for friendly SERAPHON units.
legend: The sign of Tepok, resplendent in the stars above, enlivens the land with thrumming geomantic energy.

name: BEING OF THE STARS
description: Effect: Ignore modifiers to save rolls for this unit (positive and negative).
legend: This hero has a particularly strong connection to their astral heritage, causing their corporeality to wax and wane.

name: KEEPER OF THE OLD WAYS
description: Effect: You can pick 2 different ASTERISM abilities instead of 1. They are both used in addition to the one you picked in the deployment phase.
legend: Having spent centuries poring over tablets of the Old Ones or in deep meditation, or perhaps through some primal intuition, this Seraphon possesses knowledge of ancient secrets concerning the workings of the cosmos.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: You declared the ‘%000013630Further the Great Plan%’ ability

name: CHILD OF THE STARS
description: Effect: If this unit would be destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on it have no effect. Then, Heal (D3) this unit. This unit cannot use this ability again for the rest of the battle.
legend: This warrior is made of pure star-matter, immortal and eternal.

name: REPTILIAN CUNNING
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, if a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘All-out Attack’ command in the combat phase, no command points are spent.
legend: With cold-blooded calculation, this general looks for opportunities to strike.

name: CHOSEN OF QUETZL
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly non-MONSTER SKINK unit that is in combat and is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target can move up to 8". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.
legend: This champion of Quetzl the Preserver is a master tactician, coordinating the movement of nimble skinks to outmanoeuvre the foe.

name: BEASTMASTER
description: Effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly SERAPHON CAVALRY and SERAPHON MONSTER units for the rest of the phase if they are wholly within 12" of this unit at the start of the move.
legend: This mighty leader has a primal dominance over the beasts of the Seraphon hosts, driving them forward to battle.

name: TITAN OF THE LAND
description: Effect: This unit counts as a terrain piece for the purpose of picking targets for the friendly Realmshaper Engine’s ‘Power Unleashed’ ability. Do not inflict any mortal damage on this unit as part of that ability.
legend: This warbeast has absorbed so much of its environment’s latent magic that it has become a locus of the natural energies of the Mortal Realms.

name: ANCIENT DEFENDER
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by this unit’s Companion weapons.
legend: This venerable beast has seen countless battles, as evidenced by its heavily scarred hide.

name: ARMOUR CRUNCHER
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Save characteristic, subtract 1 from save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: The sheer heft and strength of this beast sees it crush and crumple well-protected foes in their own armour before it even gets around to tearing into them with tooth, horn and claw.

name: LIGHT OF CHOTEC
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SERAPHON WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly SERAPHON unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of damage points the target has. For each 4+, Heal (1) the target.
legend: The wizard calls upon the sun god Chotec to energise an injured warrior with rays of invigorating solar magics.

name: MYSTICAL UNFORGING
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SERAPHON WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of the target’s weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: The magic of unmaking flies from the wizard’s outstretched hands.

name: THE EARTH TREMBLES
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SERAPHON WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a point on the battlefield within 18" of them to be the target point, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Draw a straight line between the target point and the closest part on the caster’s base. Roll a D3 for each unit (friendly and enemy) that has models passed across by this line. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
legend: With a focused pulse of will, the Starmaster sets the energy of the ley lines spiking until the ground is violently torn asunder.

name: COMET’S CALL
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SERAPHON WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Their consciousness soaring up to the heavens, the wizard summons a celestial comet that plummets down into the enemy ranks.

name: SPEED OF HUANCHI
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SERAPHON WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly SERAPHON unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target can use a RUN ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: With the grace and momentum of a prowling beast, the allies of the priestly mage are filled with a celestial haste.

name: EMPOWERED CELESTITE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SERAPHON WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly SAURUS unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Tapping into the ancient technologies within the weapons of the Coalesced, a light is birthed in each; for a few moments, every strike shatters armour in an explosion of sparks.

name: SOTEK'S GAZE
description: Effect: Roll a dice. Add the roll to your general’s control score this turn.
legend: The eyes of this gilded war-mask resonate with the pitiless hunger of the Serpent God. With it, the Oldblood brutally cows lesser foes.

name: PREDATORY FIGHTERS
description:
Declare: Roll a dice for each enemy unit in combat with any friendly units.

Effect: On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the unit being rolled for.
legend: These warriors bite bloody chunks of flesh from their foes in battle.
condition: Once Per Phase, End of Any Turn

name: BEAST OF THE DARK JUNGLES
description:
Declare: Pick your general to use this ability if they are in combat.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following:

Gargantuan Jaws: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general and roll a dice. If the roll exceeds that unit’s Health characteristic, 1 model in that unit is slain.

Roar: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general. Subtract D6 from that unit’s control score this turn.
legend: The perilous jungles of the Seraphon are the hunting grounds of the mighty Carnosaur, a reptilian titan that strikes fear and awe into the hearts of its enemies.

name: TEMPLE-CITY GUARDIANS
description: Effect: Friendly units have WARD (6+) while they are wholly within friendly territory.
legend: Patrolling the lands on the outskirts of their domain, these defenders will stop at nothing to see intruders driven back.

name: BLADE OF REALITIES
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s Relic Celestite Weapon.
legend: Entrusted only to the most formidable Oldbloods, this pan-dimensional weapon exists to bring about the end of tyrants.

name: ANCIENT STRATEGIST
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general. You cannot pick your general.

Effect: That unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: This Oldblood has centuries of experience in commanding their cohorts.
condition: Once Per Battle, Enemy Movement Phase

name: THE WRATH OF CHOTEC
description: Effect: The Attacks characteristic of your general’s Sunbolt Gauntlet is 6 instead of D6.
legend: An ancient relic removed from the deepest temple vaults, this gauntlet allows an Oldblood to channel the full might of the Seraphon’s solar god.

name: CHAMELEON AMBUSH
description: Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: The Hunters of Huanchi and the Spawn of Chotec emerge from hiding to unleash a hail of potent poisoned projectiles.

name: SCALED AEGIS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SAURUS unit to be the target

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, that unit has WARD (6+) until the start of your next turn.
legend: The tenacity of the saurus Sunbloods is legendary, and that of the cohorts under their command equally so.

name: INSTINCTIVE COMMANDER
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general and not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target can immediately use the 'Normal Move' ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: The saurus Sunblood has no need to utter orders, his warriors advancing with instinctive understanding.

name: VENGEANCE OF AZYR
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with a friendly SAURUS unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The celestite weapons carried by the warriors of a Sun blooded Prowlers host are supercharged with the power of Azyr.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: FOLLOWERS OF HUANCHI
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKINK unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target’s ranged weapons have Crit (Auto-wound) for the rest of the turn, including Companion weapons.
legend: Huanchi guides the shots of the skinks and their bestial companions.

name: VENOMITE SWARM
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.

Effect: If your general’s Venomites token is on the battlefield, roll a D3. On a 1, remove that token from the battlefield. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Lethal venom drips from the fangs and claws of Sotek's Venomites.

name: SAVAGE MAULING
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.

Effect: Ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: Once the saurus Sunblood begins the dismemberment of the enemy, even mystical defences crumble under his terrible strength

name: BLESSED BY THE OLD ONES
description:
Declare: Your general must use this ability if it has been destroyed. Roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, you can set up a replacement unit with 1 Sunblood model anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: The Sunblood is whisked away by powers unseen moments before a fatal blow can fall, perhaps granting his indomitable spirit time enough to bring him to his feet once more.

name: AMBERBONE TOTEM
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, this unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: Somewhere along the way, this gargant has picked up a totem of Ghurish realmstone. No matter how long they run for, the urge to hunt burns within them.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Charge Phase

name: GLOWY LANTERN
description: Effect: This unit can use SUMMON abilities from the manifestation lore you picked during army composition as if it had Wizard (1).
legend: Stolen from the aelves of Hysh after a botched alliance, this aetherquartz jar was at first carried around just because it was shiny; however, over time, it has granted this Mega-Gargant an innate power over malign sorceries.

name: MANTLE OF TUSK AND HORNS
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly SONS OF BEHEMAT units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Trophies taken from slain behemoths adorn the shoulders of this gargant, and through them they can channel the power of the Waaagh!.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Combat Phase

name: EXTRA-CALLOUSED FEET
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic, Rend characteristic and Damage characteristic of this unit’s Almighty Stomp or Almightier Stomp.
legend: This gargant has become so used to stomping on even the toughest enemies that their feet are legendary weapons in their own right.

name: GLOWY SHIELD OF PROTECTINESS
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: While raiding a lair belonging to the ratty pipsqueaks, this gargant found a shield studded with sickly green rock – and promptly strapped it to their body. Enemies who get close sometimes have their heads explode, which is always good for a laugh.

name: KINGSLAUGHTER COWL
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons while this unit is in combat with an enemy HERO.
legend: Those who wear this blood-encrusted leather hood make it their business to crush upstart monarchs and warlords across the realms.

name: BIG MOUTH
description:
Used By: MEGA-GARGANT using that FIGHT ability.

Effect: Pick a friendly GARGANT unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Mancrusher Gargants are used to being bossed around by the colossal Mega-Gargants. The orders they are given usually boil down to ‘hit that thing’ or ‘squish them ones there’.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for a friendly <ky>Mega-Gargant</ky>

name: MORE STUFF FOR ME COLLECTION
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-UNIQUE SONS OF BEHEMAT HERO that does not have an artefact of power.

Effect: Give that HERO 1 artefact of power from ‘Titanic Trophies’.

Designer’s Note: This artefact of power is given to the unit during the deployment phase, not during army composition.
legend: These gargants are avaricious hoarders who love collecting all kinds of baubles and artefacts – even ones that are too small for them to use.

name: STRIKE! HUR HUR!
description:
Declare: Pick up to 2 friendly MEGA-GARGANT units within 3" of any terrain features and pick any friendly GARGANT units within 3" of any terrain features to be the targets.

Effect: Double the Attacks characteristic of each target’s ranged weapons for the rest of the turn. If the target has no ranged weapons, pick an enemy unit within 12" of the target instead and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
legend: These gargants are particularly enthusiastic participants of the game of Manskittles: seeing how many pipsqueaks they can knock down or squish by hurling bits of the landscape... or its inhabitants.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: LOFTY LOUTS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Mancrusher Gargant unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly GARGANT units while they are wholly within 12" of the target and not wholly within 12" of any friendly MEGA-GARGANT units.
legend: Whether because they insist that they are ‘just a bit taller’ or because they are simply insufferable bullies, these Mancrusher Gargants have an authority over the other Footsloggas that is close to absolute. So long as no one bigger is around, of course.

name: REVEL IN WAR
description: Effect: You can pick 2 friendly MEGA-GARGANTS or GARGANT units that have not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn to use the ‘Jump Up and Down’ ability instead of 1.
legend: These boisterous gargants launch themselves into enemy lines, revelling in crushing the puny pipsqueaks below their feet.

name: BESIEGING BULK
description: Effect: Friendly MEGA-GARGANTS have Ward (6+) while they are within the combat ranges of any other friendly MEGA-GARGANTS.
legend: When a group of Mega-Gargants take to battle together, they are able to use each other’s enormous bulk to shelter themselves from harm.

name: TIMBERRRRR!
description: Effect: Each time a friendly MEGA-GARGANT or GARGANT model is slain, before removing it from play, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield within 3" of that model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point that has a lower Health characteristic than that model.
legend: A dying gargant is a weapon of ruin in its own right, though it is anyone’s guess where their body will fall.

name: GARGANT CHARGE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MEGA-GARGANT or GARGANT unit that charged this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit that has not been picked as the target of this ability this turn and that is in combat with that unit to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

Designer’s Note: This ability can be used by any number of friendly MEGA-GARGANT and GARGANT units that charged in each turn.
legend: A charging gargant will flatten anyone in their path.

name: EARTHSHAKING ROAR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MEGA-GARGANT or GARGANT unit that has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: A blast of this gargant’s hot, stinking breath delivered at volume bowls over those nearby.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: COLOSSAL SLAM
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MEGA-GARGANT that has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy MONSTER or WAR MACHINE that has a unit size of 1 and is within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of the unit using this ability. Then, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Mega-Gargant hoicks the foe over their shoulder and slams them full force into the ground.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: JUMP UP AND DOWN
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MEGA-GARGANT or GARGANT unit that has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, roll a dice for each model in the target unit. If the unit using this ability is a GARGANT, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target for each 6. If it is a MEGA-GARGANT, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target for each 5+.
legend: A gargant’s massive, stomping feet are devastating against smaller opponents.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: FURIOUS TEMPER
description:
Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons.
  • Subtract 1 from save rolls for this unit.
legend: Nothing can stop this Mega-Gargant when the rage of battle clouds their mind.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: GRABBY
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s combat attacks that target an enemy unit contesting an objective you do not control.
legend: If you have something this gargant wants, you won’t have it for long.

name: TERRIFYING HULK
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, you can change one of the dice in that charge roll to a 1.
legend: As the enemy rushes forward, a raised eyebrow and an even bigger raised club causes them to seriously re-think the choices that brought them to confront this notably fierce-looking example of gargant kind.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: Your opponent declared a <ky>CHARGE</ky> ability for a %000010532visible% non-<ky>MONSTER</ky> enemy unit within 12" of this unit

name: MONSTROUSLY TOUGH
description: Effect: This unit has a Health characteristic of 40 instead of 35.
legend: This MegaGargant is incredibly hard to kill.

name: RABBLE ROUSER
description: Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for friendly SONS OF BEHEMAT units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This Mega-Gargant bellows at their kin to race forward and pummel the enemy into the dust.

name: MEGA-GRUMP
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (5+) while it has 25 or more damage points.
legend: This gargant’s stubbornness and refusal to die in the face of adversity is the subject of local legend.

name: HIGH EXPECTATIONS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly BRODD’S STOMP PRIEST to chant this prayer, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly BRODD’S STOMP units while they are wholly within 12" of the chanter. If the chanting roll was 9+, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic instead.
legend: In an effort to sort the weak from the strong among his stomp, this Mega‑Gargant encourages his followers to match their strength by seeing how much destruction they can wreak with their bare hands.

name: I CAN DO THAT BETTER
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Wrath of Brodd’ ability immediately after the ‘Wrath of Brodd’ ability used by the other friendly unit has been resolved. This unit can do so even if it has used another RAMPAGE ability this turn.
legend: King Brodd can outmatch and overpower even the most belligerent gargants in his Stomp, proving himself the biggest bully around.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Reaction: You declared the ‘Wrath of Brodd’ ability for a friendly unit

name: LUCKY SHINY HAT
description: Effect: This unit has Ward (4+) against damage points inflicted by SPELL and PRAYER abilities and by abilities used by MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: Torn from the head of a defeated aelven lord – and barely large enough to be noticed – this tiny helmet somehow provides its bearer with mystical protection.

name: TIMBERRRRR!
description: Effect: Each time a friendly MEGA‐GARGANT or GARGANT model is slain, before removing it from play, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield within 3" of that model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point that has a lower Health characteristic than that model.
legend: A dying gargant is a weapon of ruin in its own right, though it is anyone’s guess where their body will fall.

name: THE WORLD TITAN’S PROPHET
description:
Effect: While any other friendly BRODD’S STOMP units are within a friendly King Brodd's combat range:
  • That friendly King Brodd has Ward (5+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for that friendly King Brodd, allocate 1 damage point to another friendly BRODD’S STOMP unit within its combat range after the damage sequence for that friendly King Brodd has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Brodd is a living legend amongst his towering kin, the only being in existence they would risk themselves to protect.

name: SMASH IT ALL TO BITS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MEGA-GARGANT that has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn to use this ability, then pick a terrain feature within its combat range. Then, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of that MEGA-GARGANT to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each friendly and enemy unit on the terrain feature that was picked. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll. After rolling for all those units, roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: As part of his crusade of vengeance against Sigmar, Brodd has charged his gargants with the complete destruction of any settlement, outpost or inhabited terrain that they come across on their march.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: WRATH OF BRODD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MEGA-GARGANT that has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn to use this ability.

Effect: If the unit using this ability charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 3+, that unit can move 3D6" but must end that move in combat.
legend: When Brodd’s faithful stride into the fray, the mountains themselves tremble in terror.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Charge Phase

name: CRAFTY CREEPERS
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MEGA-GARGANT that has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn to use this ability. Then, pick an enemy HERO that has an artefact of power and is in combat with that MEGA-GARGANT to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target no longer has that artefact of power.
legend: These mischievous critters scrabble down the limbs of their massive host when the enemy is near, pilfering the valuables of the foe.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: DOUBLE STOMP
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MEGA-GARGANT that has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn to use this ability.

Effect: Roll a D6. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, add the result to the Attacks characteristic of the Almighty Stomp or Almightier Stomp of the unit using this ability.
legend: It is quite a sight to see a Mega-Gargant perform a precarious hop, bringing both enormous feet down with enough force to squash a Steam Tank flat.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: WATCH THIS!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MEGA-GARGANT that has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: If the target is a HERO, BEAST, MONSTER or WAR MACHINE, roll 6 dice. Otherwise, roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each roll that is equal to or greater than the target’s Save characteristic, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

The MEGA-GARGANT using this RAMPAGE has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: Eager to prove themself the meanest titan around, this Mega-Gargant embarks on an ungainly – yet terrifyingly destructive – rampage.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: FOE-CHOMPERS
description: Effect: Each time an enemy model is slain by a friendly unit’s ‘Stuff ’Em In Me Bag’ ability, Heal (D3) that unit.
legend: The Mancrushers hoist hapless enemies up into the air mid-battle, letting them tumble into their cavernous jaws before giving a mighty belch of satisfaction.

name: BELLOWING ROAR
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target, then roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit this phase.
legend: An ear-splitting bellow let loose by a Mancrusher can send the enemy battleline into disarray.

name: MONSTROUSLY TOUGH
description: Effect: Your general has a Health characteristic of 15 instead of 12.
legend: This greedy gargant always takes the juiciest spoils of battle and has an impressive gut as a result.

name: 'GRAB THOSE ROCKS AND CHUCK 'EM!'
description:
Declare: Pick your general to use this ability, then pick another friendly unit wholly within 12" of them.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit’s Throwin’ Rocks this turn.
legend: Your general commands their fellow gargants to hurl as many rocks at the enemy as they can.

name: LANKY GIT
description: Effect: When you make a charge roll for your general, roll 3D6 instead of 2D6.
legend: This long-legged gargant strides across the battlefield at a frightening pace.

name: EARTH-SHAKING CHARGE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that charged this phase to use this ability, then roll a dice for each enemy unit in combat with it.

Effect: On a 3+, that enemy unit has STRIKE-LAST this turn.
legend: The ground shakes as the colossal gargants charge head-first into the fray.
condition: Once Per Phase (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: EXTRA-BIG BAG
description: Effect: When your general uses their ‘Stuff ’Em In Me Bag’ ability, you can pick 2 enemy units instead of 1 (roll for each).
legend: Made from the tattered remains of enemy banners, even more screaming warriors can be stuffed into this large and garish bag.

name: FURIOUSLY TERRITORIAL
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by your general that target an enemy unit that is contesting an objective you do not control.
legend: Nothing infuriates this gargant more than pipsqueaks laying claim to the lands around them.

name: Foulhide
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Fashioned from the flensed flesh of Rat Ogors and soaked in cloying alchemical agents, this stinking armour sticks to its wearer like a bloated second skin and regrows as fast as it can be hacked apart.

name: Warpstone Charm
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: This foul talisman radiates mutating energy that can be directed at an enemy unit to erode their armour.

name: Skavenbrew
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO SKAVEN INFANTRY unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: This foul concoction, brewed from blood and warpstone, is dispensed to expendable underlings to drive them into a short-lived but devastating killing frenzy.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: BACKSTABBING ALLIES
description: Effect: Pick up to 2 other friendly SKAVEN units that are not in combat and are wholly within 13" of the unit using the ‘Redeploy’ command to be the targets. Each target must have at least one of the following keywords: VERMINUS, SKRYRE, MOULDER, PESTILENS,
legend: The Skaven often form uneasy alliances between clans, but none of them want to suffer the brunt of the fighting when the enemy draws near.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009837Redeploy%’ command for a friendly %000001298SKAVEN% unit

name: WILL OF THE HORNED RAT
description:
Effect: While a friendly SKAVEN DAEMON is within the combat range of a friendly non-HERO SKAVEN INFANTRY unit:
  • That SKAVEN DAEMON has WARD (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for that SKAVEN DAEMON, allocate 1 mortal damage on a friendly
legend: Although they tower over the rest of the swarm, Verminlords are as craven and cunning as any Skaven – in truth even more so – and will readily use their underlings as fodder to protect their own hides.

name: Corrupted Earth
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly PESTILENS units that are in combat to be the targets.

Effect: For each target:
  • Make a pile-in move.
  • Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with the target and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
legend: The Clans Pestilens are relentless in advancing the spread of plague and corruption.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Prized Creations
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly non-HERO MOULDER units to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target and apply the corresponding effect:
$000001417
legend: Moulder warbeasts are studded with warpstone crystals and pumped full of vile serums that spur their battle-rage – at the occasional cost of overtaxing their forms.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Claw-picked
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly VERMINUS units that charged this turn to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Stormvermin and Clanrats of a Verminus Claw‑horde are amongst the most ferocious of all ratmen.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase

name: Skryre Prototypes
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly SKRYRE units to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target and apply the corresponding effect:
$000001416
legend: The fell contraptions wielded by these ratmen were created by the Clans Skryre’s most ingenious weaponsmiths.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Kill-Kill! Scurry-Flee!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, if the target has been destroyed, add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly ESHIN units
legend: A kill‑pack has one purpose: slay the target. Once this goal has been achieved and the element of surprise lost, the Eshin agents must see to their own survival…

name: THE LURKING VERMINTIDE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKAVEN unit that has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up that unit in reserve in the tunnels below. It has now been deployed.
legend: What scurries beneath the surface?

name: ALWAYS THREE CLAWSTEPS AHEAD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-MONSTER SKAVEN unit that is not in combat and was not set up this turn to use this ability.

Effect: That unit can use the ’Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: The best laid plans of the Skaven never go awry (or so they claim).
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: TOO QUICK TO HIT-HIT
description: Effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on friendly SKAVEN INFANTRY and CAVALRY units by RETREAT abilities.
legend: These skittish ratmen dart and run in all directions, avoiding retribution as they flee from combat.

name: SPLINTERS OF THE VERMINDOOM
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if there are fewer than 3 friendly Gnawholes on the battlefield.

Effect: Set up a Gnawhole on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units, more than 3" from all objectives and more than 1" from all other terrain features.
legend: In the aftermath of the Vermindoom, reality continues to fracture and tear as gnawholes bore into reality, spewing forth endless tides of ratmen.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: GNAWHOLE AMBUSH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKAVEN unit that is in the tunnels below to use this ability.

Effect: Set up that unit wholly within 6" of a friendly Gnawhole and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Emerging from a green, glowing rift, the Skaventide pours onto the battlefield.

name: WAY OF THE SKITTERING SHADE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that is wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: It is said that a soul marked for death is never more than a few feet from lurking Eshin agents.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: MURDEROUS ACROBATICS
description: Effect: When your general uses the ‘Charge’ ability, they can pass through enemy models.
legend: Glowing eyes locked on his target, Crixxit deftly weaves past and leaps across any who would impede him.

name: CLOAKED IN SHADOW
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HERO to use this ability. Then, pick a different friendly unit that has 2 or more models to be the target.

Effect: Make a shadow-travel roll of D6. On a 3+, remove the HERO using this ability from the battlefield and set them up again wholly within 6" of the target. They can be set up in combat with any enemy units that are already in combat.
legend: By the time enemies have uncovered a band of Skaven assassins, the ratmen are already in place to strike.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: JUST ANOTHER SHADOW
description: Effect: While your general is wholly within the combat range of a friendly unit that has 3 or more models, your general has WARD (4+).
legend: Crixxit is adept at stalking unseen until the moment to strike arrives.

name: WAY OF THE FIENDISH CLAW
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HERO to be the target.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Veteran Deathmasters are experts in many wicked martial arts that harness their natural twitchy agility.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: MASTER OF SHADOWS
description: Effect: When your general uses the ‘Cloaked in Shadow’ ability, add 1 to the shadow-travel roll.
legend: Swathed in darkness, Crixxit can slip in and out of the gloom with ease, his victims’ cooling corpses the only sign of his passing.

name: DEATH SCREECH
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 6" of your general to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks.
legend: When needs must, Crixxit can unleash a deafening screech to stun foes.

name: WARPSTONE-LACED BULLETS
description:
Declare: Pick a ranged weapon a friendly unit is armed with.

Effect: That weapon has Crit (Mortal) this phase.
legend: Saturated with the energies of ruin, these munitions pack a deadly punch.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Shooting Phase

name: LEAD THE SEETHING HORDE
description: Effect: Instead of using the set-up instructions in the ‘Call for Reinforcements’ ability, the replacement unit can be set up wholly within 13" of this unit and not in combat.
legend: With screeched war cries, this Clawlord directs their vermin underlings to swarm the enemy.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000022329Call for Reinforcements%’ ability

name: THE LURKING VERMINTIDE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that has not been deployed to be the target.

Effect: The target unit is set up in reserve in the tunnels below. Units in the tunnels below that have not used the ‘Gnawhole Ambush’ ability by the end of the third battle round are destroyed.
legend: What scurries beneath the surface?

name: TOO QUICK TO HIT-HIT
description: Effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on friendly units when they use RETREAT abilities.
legend: These skittish ratmen dart and run in all directions, avoiding retribution as they flee from combat.

name: WARPSTONE CHARM
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from save rolls for enemy units in combat with your general.
legend: This foul talisman radiates mutating energy.

name: GNAWHOLE AMBUSH
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that is in the tunnels below to use this ability.

Effect: Set up that unit wholly within 6" of a corner of the battlefield and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: A pack of Skaven emerges onto the battlefield from a glowing green rift in reality.

name: SKRYRE CONNECTIONS
description: Effect: Your general’s Ratling Pistol has an Attacks characteristic of 2D6 instead of D6.
legend: This Clawlord has tasked the Skryre engineers under their command to overcharge their ratling pistol.

name: CLOAK OF STITCHED VICTORIES
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (5+).
legend: This cloak is made from the stitched pelts of traitors and inflicts a rabid paranoia upon the bearer, making them hard to hit and even harder to stab in the back.

name: Scurry Away
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: This Skaven chief does not think twice about scampering to safety when things look to be going south. Perhaps that’s why they have lived so long.

name: DEVIOUS UNDERLING
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly SKAVEN HERO on the battleeld with a Health characteristic that equals or exceeds this unit’s Health characteristic to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the battle:
  • While the target has not been slain, friendly SKAVEN INFANTRY units have WARD (6+) while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
  • Once the target has been slain, add 2 to charge rolls for friendly SKAVEN INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
    • </
legend: Sly in the extreme, this ratman has mastered the art of biding his time, content to wait until his superiors’ demise before violently seizing control for himself.

name: FLESHMEDDLER
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MOULDER unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Pick 1 of the target’s melee weapons. Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of that weapon for the rest of the turn.
legend: This Skaven carries syringe darts filled with warpstone serum that can be fired into the patchwork hides of nearby Moulder creations to give them a ‘bit of extra bite’.

name: Short-tempered
description: Effect: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly SKAVEN units while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
legend: This twitching and irascible Skaven has succeeded in making their minions more afraid of their displeasure than of the enemy.

name: PIT TINKERER
description: Effect: You can re-roll the random characteristic rolls for the Move characteristic of friendly SKRYRE WAR MACHINES while they are wholly within 13" of this unit. In addition, each time a friendly SKRYRE WAR MACHINE wholly within 18" of this unit uses the ‘Rolling Doom’ or ‘Whirling Doom’ ability, add 1 to the amount of mortal damage inflicted, if any.
legend: This mechanically minded Skaven has a compulsion to make ‘improvements’ to the Skryre devices under his command.

name: Skilled Manipulator
description:
Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly non-HERO SKAVEN INFANTRY unit:

  • This unit has Ward (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly non-HERO SKAVEN INFANTRY unit within this unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for this unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: This Skaven warlord is particularly devious and selfserving, deftly ensuring that their minions are always conveniently positioned between themselves and potential threats.

name: Summon Warp Lightning Vortex
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Warp Lightning Vortex on the battlefield, pick a friendly SKAVEN WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up the first part of the Warp Lightning Vortex within 18" of the caster and visible to them, then set up the second and third parts exactly 7" from the first part and exactly 7" from each other so that they form a triangle.
legend: Warpstone shards are cast into the air, growing impossibly large and discharging bolts of warp lightning.

name: Summon Vermintide
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Vermintide on the battlefield, pick a friendly SKAVEN WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Vermintide wholly within 13" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: A Skaven spellcaster can summon forth a seething mass of arcane rodents that consumes everything in its path.

name: Summon Bell of Doom
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Bell of Doom on the battlefield, pick a friendly SKAVEN WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Bell of Doom wholly within 13" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Invoking ancient creation myths, the spellcaster causes a great Bell of Doom to manifest upon the battlefield.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Moulder-beast’s Monstrous Limbs is 3.

name: Filth-crust
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKAVEN PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly SKAVEN INFANTRY unit wholly within 13" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks until the start of your next turn. In addition, if the chanting roll was 8+, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (Mortal) until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Great Horned Rat heeds the call of this priest to encrust the weapons of their minions with irresistible contagions.

name: Bile-torrent
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKAVEN PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 13" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. If the chanting roll was 8+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target for each 4+ instead.
legend: The priest screeches with glowing green eyes as a torrent of bile sweeps over their foe.

name: Rabid-tough
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKAVEN PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly SKAVEN INFANTRY unit wholly within 13" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target that unit until the start of your next turn. In addition, if the chanting roll was 8+, add 1 to save rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.
legend: The priest snarls and conjures a dense cloud of toxins that sends their followers into a frenzy that numbs them to pain.

name: Skitterleap
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKAVEN WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly SKAVEN HERO wholly within 13" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Vanishing in a puff of foul-smelling smoke, the verminkin reappear elsewhere on the battlefield an eye-blink later.

name: Wither
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKAVEN WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 13" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The spellcaster hurls a glowing green globe of magical energy at the foe. Anyone touched by the globe starts to shrivel and wither away.

name: Warpgale
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKAVEN WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Screeching in an unholy tongue, the caster parts the veil of reality and draws a ravening gale of unnatural energies forth.

name: Warpstone Innards
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO MUTATED MENAGERIE MONSTER unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the battle. However, at the end of each turn, allocate D3 damage points to the target.
legend: A 'gift' from Thanquol, these warpstone-studded organs have been inserted into a prized warbeast to augment its power.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Summon Warp Lightning Vortex
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Warp Lightning Vortex on the battlefield, pick a friendly SKAVEN WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up the first part of the Warp Lightning Vortex within 18" of the caster and visible to them, then set up the second and third parts exactly 7" from the first part and exactly 7" from each other so that they form a triangle.
legend: Warpstone shards are cast into the air, growing impossibly large and discharging bolts of warp lightning.

name: Untapped Mutation
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MUTATED MENAGERIE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick up to 3 visible friendly MUTATED MENAGERIE units wholly within 13" of them that are affected by the ‘More-more Mutation!’ ability to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For each damage point allocated to the target at the end of this turn by the ‘More-more Mutation!’ ability, add 1 to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: This wizard manipulates the warpstone melded into the flesh of their minions, pushing the limits of their physicality before they are inevitably destroyed.

name: Monstrous Entourage
description:
Effect: The Companion weapon ability has no effect on MUTATED MENAGERIE units. While a friendly Thanquol is within the combat range of another friendly MUTATED MENAGERIE unit:

  • That Thanquol has Ward (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for that Thanquol, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly MUTATED MENAGERIE unit within its combat range after the damage sequence has been resolved.
legend: Thanquol is well practised in getting Moulder mutants to die on his behalf.

name: Pack Tactics
description:
Declare: Pick up to 2 friendly non-HERO MUTATED MENAGERIE MONSTER units wholly within 13" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: The targets can each use the ‘All-out Attack’ or ‘All-out Defence’ command this phase even if that command has been used by a friendly unit this phase.
legend: Though insane with frenzy, the beasts of Thanquol's menagerie retain some of their predatory swarming instincts..
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Spiteful Swarms
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO MUTATED MENAGERIE MONSTER unit that has not used any RAMPAGE abilities this turn to use this ability.

Effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn. However, at the end of the turn, this unit is destroyed. When this unit would be destroyed, before it is removed from play, roll a dice for each enemy unit within 6" of this unit. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of that enemy unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the battle.

After this ability has been resolved, this unit cannot use any other RAMPAGE abilities for the rest of the turn.
legend: Always one for a cunning trick, churning rat-swarms have been stitched into the guts of Thanquol's beasts, ready to burst free in a wave of disorienting fangs and claws when their host is slain.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: More-more Mutation!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO MUTATED MENAGERIE unit to be the target. You cannot pick the same unit to be the target of this ability more than once per battle.

Effect: For the rest of the battle:

  • Add 2 to the target’s Health characteristic.
  • Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic.
  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.
  • The target has Ward (5+).
  • At the end of each turn, allocate D3+2 damage points to the target.
legend: The sponsorship of a Grey Seer gives Thanquol's flesh-grafting lackeys licence to pursue their most deranged experiments.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Rampaging Demise
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO MUTATED MENAGERIE MONSTER unit that has not used any RAMPAGE abilities this turn to use this ability.

Effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn. However, at the end of the turn, this unit is destroyed. When this unit would be destroyed, before it is removed from play, roll a D3 for each enemy unit within 6" of this unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.

After this ability has been resolved, this unit cannot use any other RAMPAGE abilities for the rest of the turn.
legend: Thanquol cares little for the survival of his beasts and is more than willing to have them sacrifice themselves in spasms of fury.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Disciples of Vizzik
description:
Effect: While a friendly Vizzik Skour is within the combat range of another friendly GNAWHORDE unit:

  • That Vizzik Skour has Ward (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for that Vizzik Skour, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly GNAWHORDE unit within its combat range after the damage sequence has been resolved.
legend: The clawpacks of the Great-grand Gnawhorde protect their daemon-prophet by any means necessary.

name: Icon of Great-total Supremacy
description: Effect: You can return up to D3 slain models to each friendly GNAWHORDE INFANTRY unit with a Health characteristic of up to 3.
legend: Within this jagged brass reliquary lies a cutting from the Horned Rat's whiskers. It exerts a natural hold over the Skaven, drawing frothing warriors to it.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Harbinger of the Great Ascendancy
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat, you can use 2 different WARPSHATTER THROES abilities this turn instead of 1.
legend: In the eyes of this Skaven warlord, nothing can stop the Horned Rat's ascendancy and the ruination of the Mortal Realms.
condition: Once Per Battle, Start of Any Turn

name: Summon Vermintide
description:
Declare: If there is not a friendly Vermintide on the battlefield, pick a friendly GNAWHORDE WIZARD to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up a Vermintide wholly within 13" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: A Skaven spellcaster can summon forth a seething mass of arcane rodents that consumes everything in its path.

name: Reverberating Ritual
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GNAWHORDE PRIEST to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly GNAWHORDE INFANTRY unit wholly within 13" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target can move an extra 3" when it makes a pile-in move. In addition, if the chanting roll was 8+, add 1 to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: The priest chants in time with the tolling of the Warpshatter Bells, sonically shattering the last dregs of sanity from nearby ratmen and filling them with dreadful hunger.

name: Deafening Frenzy
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GNAWHORDE WIZARD to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly GNAWHORDE INFANTRY unit wholly within 13" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6. The casting roll for this spell cannot be modified.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:

  • The target has STRIKE-FIRST.
  • The target cannot use commands.
legend: The caster enhances the clangour of the thirteen Warpshatter Bells in the minds of a nearby swarm, driving them to even greater heights of fury.

name: Unstoppable Warp-volley
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any WARPSHATTER THROES abilities this turn. Pick up to 3 friendly GNAWHORDE units to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:

  • Add 3" to the Range characteristic of the targets’ ranged weapons.
  • The targets cannot use commands.
legend: The Warlocks of the Gnawhorde are no less aggressive than their Verminus kin - they are simply able to strike from further away.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Frenzied Momentum
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any WARPSHATTER THROES abilities this turn. Pick up to 3 friendly GNAWHORDE units to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:

  • Add 2 to run rolls and charge rolls for the targets.
  • Subtract 1 from the targets’ control scores.
legend: Hateful bells clanging in their minds, the swarms of the Great-grand Gnawhorde surge into the fray.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Reckless Abandon
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any WARPSHATTER THROES abilities this turn. Pick up to 3 friendly GNAWHORDES units to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:

  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons.
  • Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks that target those friendly units.
legend: With the death frenzy upon them, the Gnawhorde's warriors show a most unusual disregard for self-preservation.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: WARPSTONE-LACED ARMOUR
description:
Used By: Your Stormfiends unit

Effect: Your Stormfiends unit has WARD (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Lurid green lightning begins to crackle across the armour of the Stormfiends, momentarily deflecting any blows levelled at them.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: Opponent declared an <ky>ATTACK</ky> ability and targeted your Stormfiends unit

name: SKILLED MANIPULATOR
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (4+) while they are within 1" of any friendly Clanrats units.
legend: This Grey Seer is particularly devious and self-serving, deftly ensuring that their minions are always conveniently positioned between themselves and potential threats.

name: ALWAYS THREE CLAWSTEPS AHEAD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat.

Effect: That unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: The best-laid plans of the Skaven never go awry (or so they claim).
condition: Once Per Phase, Enemy Movement Phase

name: CAGE OF WARP LIGHTNING
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of your general and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, the enemy unit has STRIKE-LAST this phase. On a 1, inflict 1 mortal damage on your general.
legend: A ‘gift’ to the Grey Seer from the Clans Skryre, when this unstable device works correctly, it can momentarily trap its victims in a prison of thrashing galvanic tendrils.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: ENDLESS SWARM OF RATS
description: Effect: When a friendly Clanrats unit uses its ‘Seething Swarm’ ability, you can return D6 slain models to that unit instead of D3.
legend: From the many gnawholes that encircle the battlefield, more and more verminkin swarm forth without cease.

name: SKITTERLEAP
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, remove your general from the battlefield and set them up again on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units. They cannot use MOVE abilities in the following movement phase.
legend: The Grey Seer vanishes in a puff of foul-smelling smoke, reappearing elsewhere on the battlefield an eye-blink later.

name: SCURRY AWAY
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase. If it does so, no mortal damage is inflicted on it.
legend: This Grey Seer is a staunch believer in the Skaven philosophy that prudent cowardice is a virtue, and they do not think twice about scampering to safety when things look to be going south.

name: AMULET OF CHAOS
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the enemy target. Then, you can pick a friendly DARKOATH INFANTRY unit in combat with that enemy unit to be the friendly target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the enemy target equal to the roll.
  • If there is a friendly target, return a number of slain models to it equal to the roll.
legend: Life, death, creation, obliteration. Maddening potential swirls within the gemstone set in this talisman. It need only be loosed by belief.

name: INFERNAL PUPPET
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy WIZARD within 24" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, each time the target is picked to use a SPELL ability, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target as a reaction. If the target is destroyed by this ability, do not resolve the effect of that SPELL ability.
legend: As it dances upon the aetheric winds, this eldritch marionette violently disrupts the spellcraft of enemy mages.
condition: Once Per Battle, Start of Any Turn

name: THE VARANITE SHACKLE
description: Effect: Friendly non-WARRIORS OF CHAOS SLAVES TO DARKNESS units have WARD (6+) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This writhing torque radiates an aura that twists reality, aiding those who serve the will of the Dark Gods yet are blind or indifferent to the import of their actions.

name: THE CONQUEROR’S CROWN
description: Effect: Subtract 5 from the control scores of enemy INFANTRY units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: This blasphemous diadem grants the bearer dominion over the minds of lesser mortals.

name: REALMWARPER’S TWIST-RUNE
description:
Declare: Pick a terrain feature within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: If the target does not have the ‘Obscuring’ terrain ability, it gains that ability until the start of your next turn. Then, roll a dice for each model (friendly and enemy) within 1" of the target. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that model’s unit.
legend: One who bears this cursed rune can bind warped landscapes to their will. Ruptured chasms open as thick palls of dark energy obscure the favoured and their servants from view.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: HEAD OF THE UNWORTHY
description: Effect: If a friendly SLAVES TO DARKNESS HERO with any Dark Apotheosis points is destroyed, give this unit 8 Dark Apotheosis points.
legend: This grim trophy is a bleak reminder that the gods’ favour, even if earned over centuries of battle, can be lost and bestowed on another in a heartbeat.

name: IRONCLAD ONSLAUGHT
description:
Declare: Pick an objective that is contested by any friendly units to be the target.

Effect: Place a defiled token next to the target objective. Then, roll a D3 for each enemy unit contesting an objective that has a friendly defiled token. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
legend: When a Chaos horde is on the march, the realms tremble. Hundreds of heavily armoured warriors desecrate all in their path as they roar oaths to the Dark Pantheon.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn

name: RALLY THE TRIBES
description:
Declare: If there is a friendly DARKOATH HERO on the battlefield, pick a friendly non-HERO non-UNIQUE DARKOATH unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) on the battlefield, wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more th
legend: One of the horde’s commanders looses a terrifying battle cry, calling more of their blade-sworn warriors to their side.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: DEVOTEES OF RUIN
description:
